name: Erica Smith
subject: re: The Grim Reaper of rural communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Monopolies
are hollowing out rural communities like mine. I’m running for Congress to
stop them.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36959?refcode=em20220125-814&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Will you please donate $5 to our campaign to help send me
to Congress, where I’ll fight back against monopolies and be a champion
for working people?

Let’s take dollar store chains, for example.

The closest town to my home is Gaston, North Carolina. It’s a small town
with a household median income of $23,824.

Not so long ago, two stores opened up shop: Family Dollar and Dollar
General.

Well, you know the story. They sell not fresh (but cheap) groceries, and
everyone started shopping there (including myself), making our communities
less healthy^1. They put our mom-and-pop shops out of business and pay
employees unlivable wages^2 — dragging them into poverty and making their
low prices even more essential. But that’s their business model.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36959?refcode=em20220125-814&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Bloomberg Businessweek: Dollar General Hits a Gold Mine in Rural
America

These dollar stores prey on low-income towns in rural areas and become
local monopolies^3. They’re the Grim Reaper of our rural communities.

Dollar stores like Dollar Tree, Dollar General, and Family Dollar are
growing rapidly, with more stores than Walmart, McDonald’s, and Starbucks
combined^4 — and their proliferation won’t stop unless we make them.

It’s time for anti-trust laws to stop the spread of dollar stores, and
it’s time for a Democratic Party that fights monopolies again.

That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement — with $0 from corporate
PACs — to take power from the monopolies that have torn up our communities
and give it back to working people, but I need your help.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36959?refcode=em20220125-814&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Can you make a contribution to ensure we have the resources to put our
message in front of voters in North Carolina’s 2nd District and win this
open U.S. House seat for the people? Your donation will make a direct
impact on the outcome of this race.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36959?refcode=em20220125-814&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Donate $5

Thanks for being in this fight with me,

Erica Smith
Candidate for North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36959?refcode=em20220125-814&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ][IMG]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1 - [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36967?t=1024&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Axios
2 - [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36968?t=1025&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]The Guardian
3 - [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36969?t=1026&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]The Atlantic
4 - [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36970?t=1027&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p ]Washington Post

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220125-814-footer&t=1028&refcode2=814_3698_g5CT6p&akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=814%2E3698%2Eg5CT6p

clean_body: He really shouldn’t be celebrating. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, It’s been one year since Sleepy Joe was sworn into the Oval Office. He’s accomplished A LOT! ✅ War on the unvaccinated ✅ Inflation at a 40-year high ✅ Botched Afghanistan departure ✅ School lockdowns ✅ Unconstitutional mandates ✅ Greater politicial division But his BIGGEST accomplishment yet... ✅ Record number of Americans left the Democratic Party and joined the GOP! Progressives are worried about their ability to shove their socialist agenda down our throat... but this is ✨ AMAZING ✨ news for us! It means we CAN take back the House, Peter. Americans are tired of the radical socialist agenda. Fighting back starts with electing America First conservatives focused on fiscal responsibility and shutting down the woke Left. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Catalina Lauf and I’m running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative in Illinois’ 11th Congressional district against Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. I was born and raised in this district – and I KNOW what issues matter to my friends, family, and neighbors. We care about a thriving economy, protecting individual liberties, and making it possible for our children to achieve the American Dream. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi continually throw this GARBAGE socialist agenda at us, and Bill Foster is complicit! Foster’s an out-of-touch tax-and-spend politician who is a secure vote for EVERY Biden/Pelosi bill wrecking our economy and our country. We can’t afford to continue on this disastrous path that Biden and Pelosi have put our country on. It’s time to take our country back from crooks like Nancy Pelosi. It’s time to protect the American Dream from the Left’s socialist nightmare. It’s time to defend our individual freedoms before Washington consumes them. # Emails Show Connection Between Fitzgerald and Fake GOP Electors
---
| Recent documents show that Scott Fitzgerald conveniently reserved space for the Republican Party of Wisconsin for the same date and time as the GOP sent fraudulent paperwork claiming Donald Trump won the 2020 election.
---
|
---
| A recent statement from State Sen. Chris Larson reported:

"An open records request initiated by State Sen. Chris Larson (D-Milwaukee) has revealed that U.S. Rep. Scott Fitzgerald (R-5th District), then Majority Leader of the Wisconsin State Senate, reserved meeting space in the State Capitol for the Republican Party of Wisconsin (RPW) on December 14, 2020, at the **same date and time it convened its slate of fraudulent presidential electors there**."

You can Larson's full statement [HERE](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=ff5532b5dc&e=42a933bda9).

This is how they tried to overturn a free and fair election in Wisconsin. I fully support a [federal investigation](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=c0773b721d&e=42a933bda9) into all those involved with submitting fake elector certifications.

It's just another reason why we must fire Fitzgerald in 2022. We cannot afford any more Republican conspiracy theories while they literally attempt to overturn our democracy. [**Will you chip in $5 to help stop Fitz's corruption?**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=d72fff6e05&e=42a933bda9)

body:
I’m running to take back Virginia
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=7d98f728f1e843779b5c5df7862f91ad&_e=hjqgoV-9vQHAzDGJ9HOpOAKTte-sl2NVKr2sHAgh55UuWayb0EeZ01dY0BfsmkcTlkVE7aZw7Mo2WzaSVWY1GbpF9NuufT1AKrPozgqaXcTRsiJbPwMcTOWZ3C5WoWZmjvgpfsxxPwnKYe7FnBkelZMqP-tlgDzPvXki0ai6XvY4l4aMT_R0ve29QUAnQKIdrPXiHPRPufa8kzREmKT6HnCcv3W1aFlgG980a98Y02g6sX9qb2cmvvKhyJEqvEyT3UAhSnBPm6XsjQeKzmOnhoJVz8KWjKe57NUqHYhKF1ADQ2hDqnPTO9rxAUuRZ2_lyBuJgPAAnwfxujBlu5CAVYZk2IIe71H1vFEqu_umFpyHqncrMq-GcFEWzCgNiEAFZzkeLRIJBazYYJD9HsU0XjFuavTWwVq_HpYYjCyg1esEj3Wf4aGauF_Ns7viFlejlOSoArhHmlaFqzJoOlDdKrjmpnjOLSGl54TX0M7MYL4%3D)
Dear Fellow American,

I’m Yesli Vega, and I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. As a **deputy sheriff** , I put it all on the line for my community.

**Now, I see a new threat.**

We’re seeing our _**borders open**_ again, causing a humanitarian crisis. _**Wasteful spending**_ is driving up the cost of living to levels we haven’t seen in decades. _**Crime**_ is skyrocketing across the country due to the far-left’s dangerous Defund the Police agenda. _**Enough’s enough.**_

[**WATCH BELOW TO HEAR MORE ABOUT WHY I’M RUNNING TO REPRESENT As a deputy sheriff , I put it all on the line for my community. Now, I see a new threat. We’re seeing our borders open again, causing a humanitarian crisis. Wasteful spending is driving up the cost of living to levels we haven’t seen in decades. Crime is skyrocketing across the country due to the far-left’s dangerous Defund the Police agenda. Enough’s enough. When my parents fled war-torn El Salvador, they came to this country hoping for a better future. And in doing so, they gave me the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. From the child of immigrants to military wife to Prince William County supervisor, I’ve always been a conservative fighter. For far too long, we have watched Liberal politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Abigail Spanberger tear apart our communities with their divisive, anti-American Agenda. Join me in the fight. \-- Kaptur for Congress

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: ALERT: ONE WEEK LEFT
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **ALERT: YOUR[PRECINCT CAUCUS](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=2) IS ONLY ONE WEEK AWAY** The most important night of the political year is on Tuesday, February 1st. It's THE BEST chance you have to show up and force the Political Class to get on board with our Stop Vaccine Mandates and Never Again Bill agenda. Trust me, they would prefer you sit at home and watch Netflix instead. Politicians do not like being forced to stand up for your liberties.
## TOO BAD!
Things are going to change. I need YOU to join the thousands of other Action 4 Liberty supporters who have committed to attending their precinct caucus in ONE WEEK. The Precinct Caucus is a gathering of people who want to determine the direction of the Political Parties in this state. All of us can attend on February 1st at 7 pm. **In this short video I break down what the caucus is and why it's so important. Please give it a look:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=3) NEED MORE INFO? We are training hundreds of concerned citizens like you every day about what to do at precinct caucuses on February 1st. I would like to invite you to attend one of our caucus training events at the Brand New A4L Headquarters in Roseville. We're doing them every week night and on this Saturday afternoon. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/events?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=4 "RSVP for Training") [RSVP for Training](https://www.action4liberty.com/events?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=4)
---
If you aren't from the metro area, don't worry, we're also hosting events around the state - from Rochester up to East Grand Forks. Look at the link above.
**Even if you can't make one of our various training events, we still need you to attend on February 1st. All the information you need to know for that night can be located at our[Caucus Info](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=5) page. **
I look forward to seeing you at one of our several upcoming events.
Want to help Stop Vaccine Mandates and pass the Never Again Bill even more? Please consider making a donation to our huge field operations that's activating and training thousands of Minnesotans to TAKE BACK our government!
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 TODAY. We need your help!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=6)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_one_week_left&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Breaking News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for COLORADO
body:
It's official, the Democrat I’m running against has thrown in the towel. They’re afraid, and we need to capitalize on this opportunity!
**_**BREAKING NEWS ALERT**_**
_**Just two weeks after I announced my run for Congress**_**, the Nancy Pelosi liberal that I was running against has thrown in the towel and will not be running for reelection!**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb302cd7ae1542a391d281fc1bcaa669&_e=U-6glk2bG65wQI5ITHrEv2HfalhmI_0Drh7KYYrXvmhOhZzQXHZgT4rgWAKDq_PWsQEUN0V4GBEq3lKpWHcfSv89R1Y-dnH0DXZGS_d6aKM0kI5mWJh6LfsWDK_klT6Ed8YdYuQT03wI7KVq50zHL_BTWXtbhLcKiYzRF7TH5oEu-pfneH4JsFP8ZqDv0o7ju4Qj6Lm0KvN38gqvUE3VZ0yX9izh85Bc4lqVLR3o3-CQoLa-gGP1DMsnDL_L2Fe-9JrF9iw7DCytiHKfcxiMdB9cCfAcifZVzoT7YdIwl-wQednywDjenW3HCKuqJIqpvOMMwC_lN6pmLodVTLdkeK1W9Jhi9evghnGz4nwr_F9f7Q2I4UoY61T3QBhGbmbdIFBfn-oAagA7-8_fIpGjsc9J_9QCawUCWXLBpEG5IEU%3D)

This is a huge win for us in this critical swing seat, but while the Democrats scramble for a replacement [**we need to be ready to fight off whomever they throw at us.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb302cd7ae1542a391d281fc1bcaa669&_e=U-6glk2bG65wQI5ITHrEv2HfalhmI_0Drh7KYYrXvmhOhZzQXHZgT4rgWAKDq_PWsQEUN0V4GBEq3lKpWHcfSv89R1Y-dnH0DXZGS_d6aKM0kI5mWJh6LfsWDK_klT6Ed8YdYuQT03wI7KVq50zHL_BTWXtbhLcKiYzRF7TH5oEu-pfneH4JsFP8ZqDv0o7ju4Qj6Lm0KvN38gqvUE3VZ8EmVvrXt0CtJ_0blebJpZPp6qFbQyYrLWru8ApG3VvRqIVdowRFvBCnvD-d0cy4Nd4Vhs5IYOw2cyhL30QJkSV9zi-2qgwcKFCvWf1nUwrjday52HWf8-TBli8AekwvbdlMyFUylPkfmT2dxKpw6P0O63hUCXCo17AiaEcAxbccHpwZstTxZajVZexjPHGjYKkjR2o5C76dFHlRUbI50sE%3D)

Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9638017d8a5a4f018143d587c2fd909a&_e=iUQNISmeSYXR9grZYjvsa3IRU4vlLOHVS4wjA6qAs_LVBIEiFZVUs9tjPA5aNNo6DOohJs9D-buL9a8wwHxbTFVR716_M-zzYPmXzJ1Psxv89Za_hP-clLV9ZDYgWBNyARiPG9X1ImmiHoM0EFDm7pIgF3wb4AiB-rHYtoGMVqbL7vimagjoBtwhWbkKda-uNOfeHQ7Fg8zFEpw-s-eZ0zDNRgEWATzyyGu16lTtyC38di_-NlvQLJbrY9zATh-ken3C7XAH0LyHHmQ0cdCU4GoWbuLOA3c3Bnj7kGv1ZoHlsnSGsB77SQOqctMxAAZbr6uvO3uEb4obYBZcnu2XNlDvg1oyrRzmv-H_8CizZQ5-uwlnlz3oW-yBtxjU6eEXVzSf-dNp-5wbX4PgLouWHU0XY4vUB_tzuizbMCohEcoLqdtMTPgviJ5h67NJJtH8hDJSvGKzJNF76-shhG_VSbAGdfGLQRckvGMm2kIUXjM%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9638017d8a5a4f018143d587c2fd909a&_e=iUQNISmeSYXR9grZYjvsa3IRU4vlLOHVS4wjA6qAs_LVBIEiFZVUs9tjPA5aNNo6DOohJs9D-buL9a8wwHxbTFVR716_M-zzYPmXzJ1Psxv89Za_hP-clLV9ZDYgWBNyARiPG9X1ImmiHoM0EFDm7pIgF3wb4AiB-rHYtoGMVqbL7vimagjoBtwhWbkKda-uNOfeHQ7Fg8zFEpw-s-eZ0zDNRgEWATzyyGu16lTtyC38di_-NlvQLJbrY9zATh-ken3C7XAH0LyHHmQ0cdCU4AybUgFFDPtSpj7QY9S-WgW0-Xhx1wkwRSQctesb-67XPQQfHa5-Js8gEs954PNq_BmqEO0aIzhvtPc0FtbhUskw30VO695RqV5KuRUPYzHFZfY8_dtdTHruJl0gYiiQl02ojcKwLaxmwkvOb1h63kkDQCOuDzN0YT8qloQoJWBMDJLyzn0tALT6Tru4OC1oVVZqp9FyDhTveDYkfy3dzsA%3D)

body:
Do you think Congress should OVERTURN the Citizens United ruling? >>
| | _**POLITICO REPORT:
Republican super PACs could DESTROY Democratic Senate Majority**_

| We're DISGUSTED.

A breaking report from POLITICO just revealed that ultra-wealthy mega donors and their super PACs are pouring money into the races of top anti-democracy Senate Republicans.

And the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision, which helped unleash a FLOOD of dark money into our elections, is to blame.

**Now, with our Majorities on the line, we 're calling on 9,000 grassroots Democrats to take a stand.**

[******Let us know: Do you think Congress should OVERTURN the _Citizens United_ ruling? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Poll Response: [PENDING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-GsEA8_)
| [Take the Poll >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfxz-)
---

This is not a drill.

_POLITICO_ just reported that Republican mega donors are funneling UNPRECEDENTED levels of dark money into MUST-WIN Senate races.

Our Majorities are on the line - so let us be clear: **For over a DECADE, the Supreme Court 's _Citizens United_ ruling has allowed the ultra-wealthy to buy power for dangerous Republicans who will do their bidding without question.**

But with our democracy under threat, it's never been more important that we stop mega donors like Charles Koch and Betsy DeVos from packing Congress with even more of their puppets.

That's why we're calling for 9,000 grassroots Democrats to join us in standing up to the GOP's dark money donors by taking our poll today.

---
[Let us know before midnight: Do you think Congress should OVERTURN the _Citizens United_ ruling? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/78ZXTZ-)
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46301867&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjc1NTA2NQS2&l=14366676&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46301867&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjc1NTA2NQS2&l=14366676&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Do you think Congress should OVERTURN the Citizens United ruling? >> | | POLITICO REPORT: Republican super PACs could DESTROY Democratic Senate Majority | We're DISGUSTED. A breaking report from POLITICO just revealed that ultra-wealthy mega donors and their super PACs are pouring money into the races of top anti-democracy Senate Republicans. And the Supreme Court's Citizens United decision, which helped unleash a FLOOD of dark money into our elections, is to blame. Now, with our Majorities on the line, we 're calling on 9,000 grassroots Democrats to take a stand. NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com Poll Response: | This is not a drill. POLITICO just reported that Republican mega donors are funneling UNPRECEDENTED levels of dark money into MUST-WIN Senate races. Our Majorities are on the line - so let us be clear: For over a DECADE, the Supreme Court 's Citizens United ruling has allowed the ultra-wealthy to buy power for dangerous Republicans who will do their bidding without question. But with our democracy under threat, it's never been more important that we stop mega donors like Charles Koch and Betsy DeVos from packing Congress with even more of their puppets. That's why we're calling for 9,000 grassroots Democrats to join us in standing up to the GOP's dark money donors by taking our poll today. Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Thank you, Mr. President!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I am grateful and humbled |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=392f011a66&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today because I am **_grateful_** , and I am **_humbled._**

_After just speaking at President Trump’s first 2022 rally in Arizona, I am honored to stand beside such a great Patriot and so very thankful he came to our great state._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=22e21a9f6c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I have worked long and hard hours in 2021 fighting for President Trump and Election Integrity. I have also run a historic grassroots campaign to win Secretary of State of Arizona in 2022.

**None of this would be possible if it weren’t for the support of the PEOPLE and for the support of President Trump.**

When he endorsed me for office, this is what he had to say:

**_“Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!” – President Trump_**

Because of President Trump’s support, our campaign is extremely well positioned to win in 2022 – we have a DOMINATING campaign!

In 2021, my campaign raised a historic amount - $663,000! And this is almost entirely from small-dollar donors, showing just how widespread this grassroots support is.

**Election integrity cannot die because the people back and support Election Integrity.**

**_Numbers don’t lie._**

So thank you Mr. President, I could not be doing this without you!

_And I won’t let you down!_

**Together we are building a historic coalition to fight back against the fraud perpetrated by the thieving left in 2020. And we build this coalition on a bedrock of faith, and on a foundation of Constitutional Conservatism.**

_There is no room in the Constitution for fraud, no place in our elections for robbery, and no shelter in our Democracy for traitors._

**I will fight fraud, expose the robbers, and have no mercy on the traitors.**

_It’s time to clean up Arizona, and make Arizona the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity!_

[**Please help our grassroots movement to secure our elections with a generous donation today!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ab3c4b600&e=44b8c466b0)

**[Donate $25, $100, $250 or more to protect our elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7f36304903&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=adc100136a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e1c20ff499&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8617dc8da4&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!” – President Trump Because of President Trump’s support, our campaign is extremely well positioned to win in 2022 – we have a DOMINATING campaign! In 2021, my campaign raised a historic amount - $663,000! And this is almost entirely from small-dollar donors, showing just how widespread this grassroots support is. Election integrity cannot die because the people back and support Election Integrity. Numbers don’t lie. So thank you Mr. President, I could not be doing this without you! And I won’t let you down! Together we are building a historic coalition to fight back against the fraud perpetrated by the thieving left in 2020. And we build this coalition on a bedrock of faith, and on a foundation of Constitutional Conservatism. There is no room in the Constitution for fraud, no place in our elections for robbery, and no shelter in our Democracy for traitors. I will fight fraud, expose the robbers, and have no mercy on the traitors. It’s time to clean up Arizona, and make Arizona the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity! | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. name: American Action News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z466uc3afirp8401kp7s2h1le1fgpe05vr3vel6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chie2o71clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfedtk6oon0tbnmdim4sb461rm8ctle5gnco5m6cq7cd5kmaoj4tbjclgb4s75msrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5cr0s1rm8phmcsqr8dtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvd92oi3hteuqk91lgdavdcgg6b4rupdlkprldgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chie2o71clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgd619n358o7bvuei2ht0n8f56v9anaup8118c30_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chie2o71clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8mhdkcgtg46ne3ju034a5lth6g3k7u7ctv6kki0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6chie2o71clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zju2sdqtdu74k6dmag2hiv6hnockq7ugnghe58vo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cpi69ob0s5im49fg)

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: In the Loop Updates
body:
# We are going to need 83,000 signatures to get on the ballot.
### As a Democratic candidate I had to pay a hefty filing fee to get on the ballot, but as an Independent the requirement is petition signatures. Texas is the only state that requires that large amount of signatures, a tactic to try to discourage candidates from running on an independent ticket. My fee paid to the Democratic party was denied although I changed party affiliation within the deadline. The plan is to forge ahead and we will be on the ballot in November, however I am looking for 200 dedicated volunteers to help me with this effort. If you are interested in assisting with petition signing, join us on Thursdays on our regular zoom meetings at 7:00 Pm (CST) and sign up at info@gilbert4gov.com.
https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [VOLUNTEERS NEEDED](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-okdiidd-iduiyhurdd-r/)
## A Bold Conversation
## Lawmakers in more than 20 states[ have introduced or passed legislation](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-okdiidd-iduiyhurdd-y/) that would directly target the principles underlying critical race theory by banning schools from teaching about structural racism. These efforts to demonize critical race theory are gaining traction more than a year into a national reckoning with racism, following the murders of George Floyd and Breonna Taylor, and the ensuing protests.
**Join us tonight on Facebook Live as the discussion begins with Independent****Gubernatorial**** ****Candidate Deirdre Gilbert and Dr. Dana********Thompson-Dorsey is the**** ** David C. Anchin Endowed Chair in Education Innovation, Director of the David C. Anchin Center for the Advancement of Teaching, and an Associate Professor of Educational Leadership and Policy Studies at the University of South Florida.
## Fireside Chat-Meet & Greet
Not many candidates take the time to spend quality time with the community, but that changes with ME. I will be available for candid conversations with the community. Drop by, bring your friends and family and let's just talk about what really matters to you. We will also be signing up for volunteers to help us with our signature gathering. Hope to see you there! [Make a donation today](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-okdiidd-iduiyhurdd-j/) | 9119 Highway 6 Suite 230Missouri City, TX 77459 www.gilbert4gov.com [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor.updatemyprofile.com/y-okdiidd-E305D3C8-iduiyhurdd-t) | [Unsubscribe](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-okdiidd-iduiyhurdd-i/)
---

name: Dr. Robert J. Lorinser, Jr. =?utf-8?b?4oCT?=  MD, MSW, MPH
subject: My opponent’s response to masking lift is wrong, absolutely wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
, I listen to experts. Jack Bergman isn’t one of them. **Dr. Bob slams opponent’s response to masking lift “I listen to experts. Bergman isn’t one of them."** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062453/327185899/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=) _**Here's what Bergman's campaign said about lifting the elementary school mask requirement – "It was never about the science - it has always been about the political science. The Democrat Marquette Health Director is running for Congress and has obviously seen the polling data - parents are fed-up!" - Team Bergman**_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062455/327185900/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062456/327185901/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062457/327185902/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=) **MY RESPONSE ** MARQUETTE, Mich. — Since the start of my campaign, we have ensured that any announcements regarding public health come from my official capacity as the Marquette County Health Department (MCHD) Medical Director. Let me be clear. No public health decisions have been influenced by my run for Congress, political affiliation, or in consultation with my campaign team. [Jack Bergman's insult](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062458/327185903/608203670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=&emci=7044ae41-677e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=55eebbde-9a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) to my health department, suggesting we used political polling data to make these decisions is wrong, plainly, and absolutely wrong. My opponent criticized my colleagues' decisions to mask up in September and then mocked the health department for lifting the order. Physicians and public health officers are doing what's right — at the appropriate times — for the health and safety of the community, not a political agenda. I am incredibly disappointed that Jack Bergman decided to play partisan politics with people's health. His attacks are shameful, harmful, and dishonest. He creates more division and discord and isn't interested in solving real problems. I do not see my opponent contributing to mitigation strategies in any meaningful way. I challenge my opponent to offer meaningful solutions to today's problems. Tell us what you would do, please. Offer something substantive. Just once. Public health is not subject to polling data. I will not play partisan games with science. MCHD [explained their decision](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41062459/327185904/1185784548?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVlYmJkZS05YTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upUran2BeiPRIvgWqkEa5jHZAmxZ1rfFe6nESpPTo4A=&emci=7044ae41-677e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=55eebbde-9a7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) in detail, something my opponent rarely does. A civil debate on the merits of our decision is worthy of discussion without empty rhetoric and unwarranted political attacks. I implore Jack Bergman to use science and facts in his arguments so we can have an honest debate. As the Medical Director for Marquette County Health Department during COVID-19, I'm reminded of the importance of principled leadership. Leaders make tough decisions — decisions that might not always be the most popular, but they ought to be the most informed. I have done this as a medical director. I participate in these conversations daily — locally, in our state, and nationally. At times I have agreed with approaches. At other times I have disagreed with approaches. Others have disagreed with me, but we all follow science, data, and expert opinions. We do not follow empty political slogans. The pandemic is far more complex than a tagline or a Tweet. Soon, we will transition and learn how to live with COVID-19. I see it fast approaching, but I know we are not out of the woods yet. In time, COVID-19 will join other respiratory illnesses, and our approach will be different than it is today. Our current strategies are inevitably different than last September. Many of us see the political climate today in disgust. We distrust our leaders. Americans are fed up, and we have lost our ability to have civil conversations about important issues. This is precisely why I am running to unseat Jack Bergman as our representative in Congress. We need to use democracy to unelect politicians who refuse to pursue truth, and it's time for ethical, transparent, honest leaders to take the helm. clean_body: , I listen to experts. Jack Bergman isn’t one of them. Dr. Bob slams opponent’s response to masking lift “I listen to experts. Bergman isn’t one of them." = Here's what Bergman's campaign said about lifting the elementary school mask requirement – "It was never about the science - it has always been about the political science. The Democrat Marquette Health Director is running for Congress and has obviously seen the polling data - parents are fed-up!" - Team Bergman = = = MY RESPONSE MARQUETTE, Mich. — Since the start of my campaign, we have ensured that any announcements regarding public health come from my official capacity as the Marquette County Health Department (MCHD) Medical Director. Let me be clear. No public health decisions have been influenced by my run for Congress, political affiliation, or in consultation with my campaign team. to my health department, suggesting we used political polling data to make these decisions is wrong, plainly, and absolutely wrong. My opponent criticized my colleagues' decisions to mask up in September and then mocked the health department for lifting the order. Physicians and public health officers are doing what's right — at the appropriate times — for the health and safety of the community, not a political agenda. I am incredibly disappointed that Jack Bergman decided to play partisan politics with people's health. His attacks are shameful, harmful, and dishonest. He creates more division and discord and isn't interested in solving real problems. I do not see my opponent contributing to mitigation strategies in any meaningful way. I challenge my opponent to offer meaningful solutions to today's problems. Tell us what you would do, please. Offer something substantive. Just once. Public health is not subject to polling data. I will not play partisan games with science. MCHD in detail, something my opponent rarely does. A civil debate on the merits of our decision is worthy of discussion without empty rhetoric and unwarranted political attacks. I implore Jack Bergman to use science and facts in his arguments so we can have an honest debate. As the Medical Director for Marquette County Health Department during COVID-19, I'm reminded of the importance of principled leadership. Leaders make tough decisions — decisions that might not always be the most popular, but they ought to be the most informed. I have done this as a medical director. I participate in these conversations daily — locally, in our state, and nationally. At times I have agreed with approaches. At other times I have disagreed with approaches. Others have disagreed with me, but we all follow science, data, and expert opinions. We do not follow empty political slogans. The pandemic is far more complex than a tagline or a Tweet. Soon, we will transition and learn how to live with COVID-19. I see it fast approaching, but I know we are not out of the woods yet. In time, COVID-19 will join other respiratory illnesses, and our approach will be different than it is today. Our current strategies are inevitably different than last September. Many of us see the political climate today in disgust. We distrust our leaders. Americans are fed up, and we have lost our ability to have civil conversations about important issues. This is precisely why I am running to unseat Jack Bergman as our representative in Congress. We need to use democracy to unelect politicians who refuse to pursue truth, and it's time for ethical, transparent, honest leaders to take the helm. = = = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Great America Update
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6778%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0ORxYIE8jNAuJSSn2Wt91Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69722%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZpNGjhN7WuXeimSYY1hjg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69723%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lZ6EDIWeAZ3EHblxBM4OBw&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69724%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pJeUPD2Z7zDxXb6ctMTr9w&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6778%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0ORxYIE8jNAuJSSn2Wt91Q&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6778%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0ORxYIE8jNAuJSSn2Wt91Q&sysid=1)

name: Firearm Man
subject: Mask Wearers Deserve to Know.
body:
Today may be your last chance to get one -- before they run out and prices go up...
---
| If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can _[unsubscribe](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/262/56327/beb9f15bae0c05e80f0f64bf0dd2da8aab4689c2/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0)_ here at any time. [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/262/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) **January 26th, 2022** [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/262/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) | Mask wearers deserve to know how safe their masks are really keeping them...

Especially since new research is showing some masks can increase your chances of getting sick!

That’s right.

A recent study shows that 99% of the masks people wear are not only **useless for stopping infection...**

They may actually be the reason you get infected in the first place.

That’s because most masks have huge **GAPS** due to improper fit.

Even worse...

When you breathe in, those gaps create **vortexes that suck polluted air straight into your lungs.**

Until recently, the only way to fix this problem was to buy a custom-fitted N95 or full respirator...

...both of which are extremely expensive and uncomfortable... and in many places only available to medical workers.

HOWEVER...

A small medical safety manufacturer recently released an ** _adjustable fit R95 mask_** that works almost just as well.

And despite the fact that this mask can compete with an N95 in terms of filtration...

It’s ** _far more comfortable_** and can be had at a ** _tiny fraction_** of the cost.

If you’re interested in owning one...

My friends at the Self Reliance Association are **[currently offering them up to 40% off](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/262/56327/26531f26c3fa1477391a332e686375239915fd89/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0)** \-- in response to the recent surge in Delta cases and “breakthrough” infections.

The **bad news** is that they’re already running low in inventory... and I’m told the cost of manufacturing these masks will soon go up.

Which means they’ll likely have to pass that new cost on to customers.

[So today may be your last chance to get one](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/262/56327/26531f26c3fa1477391a332e686375239915fd89/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) \-- before they run out and prices go up.

**Thank You.**
---

| | This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by **newsletter@firearmman.com**

US

[1-Click Unsubscribe](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/one_click_unsubscribe/262/56327/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) | [Edit Profile](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/edit_profile/262/56327/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) | [Manage Subscriptions](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/unsubscribe/262/56327/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) | [Report Spam](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/report_spam/262/56327/d8a6ac8ed086edcde84f75db3935f88f6a2d93e0) |

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfqn1v1bp9j6h88fpnfcoprkaj7f51butm75ngu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjmcpgneddle9pr1clim6pjatdhe5h6cddlempm0t1jceoe8sj6cco79o716uoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup36phksspm0ptim9j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg4s3mpl3im7hc8plqs8disv7o9iopnr5bc0e648_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqmdsiqu6njmf7fv4mut7rnd03cun381b27i3ato_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z28d558lgb6hjt2h7qv0h6lbgp6kkmqqtlt8g488_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Katrina Pierson
subject: THIS is how a real election audit happens…
body:
HINT: Change starts at the top [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlljydl-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, **Do you get the feeling that Greg Abbott spends a lot of time asking himself and his advisors, "How can I make this go away and still look good?"**I do.Just look at the effort to get to the bottom of the 2020 election. Governor Abbott has never said, "Texans deserve the truth and democracy requires it!"Of course not. He said...**" How can I make this go away and still look good?"** [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlljydl-yuddtktydi-y/) [Chip-in $5 to secure our elections](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlljydl-yuddtktydi-j/) That is how we got his pointless "targeted recount" of a tiny number of counties...and that took over a year! He wanted to convince us he was doing something when he just wants us to shut up, vote for him, and be obedient little serfs. [Chip-in $5 for a statewide audit of 2020](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlljydl-yuddtktydi-t/) I don't know about you, but I'm sick of this game. **Greg Abbott has run this same playbook over and over. He gives conservatives a nod while giving his RINO backers a wink.**_Thank God that Don Huffines is running for governor._ [Chip-in $5 for honest elections](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlljydl-yuddtktydi-i/) Don has pushed Abbott much further in our direction than he ever wanted to go. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Teachersmanipulated my daughter to change her gender”
body:
How would you feel as a parent... ...If you learned that your son or daughter was being groomed by their teachers to become
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zka3uga8dn1jrh87ft5qtsmdu492qm0464i1b1mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk6oqm8s766er79ob6mhgrdcbhe4q36cpgs3ibed1l69j77djhcir78d5hceqjfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdgmfdj0coqe1cr4suobapbi4no)
Friend, How would you feel as a parent... ...If you learned that your son or daughter was being **groomed** by their teachers to become “transgender” _behind your back?_ ...If your child was **instructed** to keep it a secret because you – their parent - _“can’t be trusted?”_ ...If the school’s faculty **demanded** that you MUST call your own child by a different name and pronouns – _without your input or consent?_ I’m sure you would be outraged if it were your children or grandchildren! But that’s exactly what happened to a twelve-year-old girl in California, who was brainwashed by leftist teachers into believing she was a boy and was told to intentionally hide their vile scheme from the girl’s mother, Jessica Konen. **Now, the Center for American Liberty is helping Jessica defend her parental rights by suing the predatory leftist teachers who tried to brainwash her daughter with transgender propaganda – and we need your help.** [**If you believe parents have the right to raise their children how they see fit, can I count on you to make an urgent tax-deductible gift to the Center for American Liberty today as we launch this critical lawsuit?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj9la4t1t655vo0avmadcq5eao27srq7s6ge052o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkgm8gcn4ac7ao1fn13j3be0vfn3u9qbt10ebp80_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) It should go without saying: It’s a parent’s job to raise their children – NOT anyone else’s. But the radical left doesn’t think so. They think they own our children. And there’s a simple reason they’re after our kids... Leftists inside public schools know if they can sever the ties between you and your children, they can replace the values you raised your kids to have with theirs. They know if they can brainwash our youth, it won’t take long to transform America into an authoritarian utopia of socialism and “wokeness.” **Sadly, for Jessica Konen and her daughter, they were targeted in the war leftists are waging against kids and their parents in our nation’s schools.** But Jessica isn’t going quietly. Instead, she’s fighting back, and I’m proud to represent her in this pivotal case. Jessica knows exactly what’s at stake and I think you do too. [**That’s why I hope you’ll make a gift today to ensure Jessica wins in court and deals a decisive blow to leftist attempts to corrupt our kids with their twisted ideology.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4kg2asr5thq0p738eetj0jja1crp5qj4cgu7apo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zok9qiq8eacm3u9lf0tuti5jlnqu96fisakc1ja0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) I’ll be honest, the more I tell you about this case, the more you’ll be horrified... It all started when school staff formed a secret “equality club,” where they recruited preteens, including Jessica’s daughter, to “question sexual and gender identities.” At club meetings, these radical teachers planted the seed in her mind that not only was she really a boy trapped in a girl’s body, but that she also was sexually attracted to BOTH men and women. Keep in mind, Jessica’s daughter was only twelve at the time. Jessica had no idea her daughter was in this “club.” She had no idea her daughter was being subjected to near-constant manipulation by leftist teachers. Only when these radicals were sure they had successfully “transitioned” her daughter did they bother to contact Jessica. **Even worse, she was told she was _expected_ to call her very own daughter a boy’s name with male pronouns – and that her daughter’s name and gender had already been changed in official school records. ** This isn’t just immoral. This is flat-out evil. It’s child abuse. And, Friend, you can guarantee this isn’t just isolated to California. In fact, our office has been inundated with calls from parents with experiences similar to Jessica’s. **_How much would you like to bet it’s happening at the public school down the street from you?_** Because if it’s not already, it’s only a matter of time before radical leftists bring their insane and twisted ideas about sex and gender to your local public schools. They don’t care about education...They don’t care about your kids or their mental health...They may not even care whether or not a child actually becomes transgender... Their aim is to recruit as many children as possible to become foot soldiers for their dangerous ideology, regardless of the children they hurt or the families they shatter. ** ** [**That’s****why it’s critical you and I stop these leftists before it’s too late to save our kids or our country – and you can do that with a tax-deductible gift to The Center for American Liberty today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9ens4tsngse16tt7jihsg2s1jnhg2h5s74avng_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7bm775o8brogdv4c9kb4mntu59744m0b28fofo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) But let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I am the founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty. Over the last few years, we’ve sued a laundry list of radical left-wing politicians, organizations, and companies for trying to destroy our fundamental rights. Just one example of our work: When California Governor Gavin Newsom attempted to ban in-home private religious gatherings, in the name of COVID-19, we stepped in and sued Newsom over this unconstitutional mandate. **And we won at the United States Supreme Court!** ** ** Thanks to the support of patriots like you, we won 3 cases at the U.S. Supreme Court last year and were able restore the religious liberty rights of millions of Californians, while at the same time creating legal precedent to deter other leftist governors from implementing similar mandates. But back to the issue at hand... When I heard about Jessica Konen’s case, I knew I wouldn’t be able to rest until I was sure that what happened to her daughter doesn’t happen again. But it’s only possible for The Center for American Liberty to leap into action to defend parental rights through the generous support of patriots like you... You see, my team at the Center for American Liberty initiated legal action in Jessica Konen’s case last week. But this JUST the beginning. From what we know of this case, it looks like we’re in for a protracted legal battle... Which means this case promises to be an expensive fight – _and one you and I simply cannot afford to lose._ [**If you believe parents have the right to raise their children as they see fit, can I count on you to make an urgent tax-deductible gift to help Jessica win this case and hold radical leftist teachers and school districts accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmpb841ir2mrook013ljpl9dv19v79p64adksv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuevqe75snr4606a216p9jr56esi9tk9nlckgs9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) It doesn’t matter how large or small your gift is, every single dollar counts. And make no mistake, we cannot win without the support of patriots like YOU. As soon as we receive your gift, I’ll make sure to let Jessica know you’re standing with her in this quest to deliver justice for her and her daughter. I know she’ll be encouraged by your generosity, as well as your commitment to securing the rights of every parent in America. **For Freedom,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** P.S. I wanted to leave you with a parting thought. If there’s a silver lining in Jessica Konen’s story, it’s this... Everything Jessica and her daughter experienced happened right before COVID hit and schools went to remote learning. Her daughter came home from school using a boy’s name with male pronouns. But then a funny thing happened... **With Jessica’s daughter no longer being constantly groomed and conditioned by the staff at school, she reverted to her original gender - once again using her given name and the pronouns that match her biological sex.** You see, Friend, that’s because if truth has a chance, it will overcome lies. And we must stop these leftist attempts to brainwash our children into believing they’re something they’re not before our kids are damaged for life. [**No child, no parent, no family should ever go through what the Konen family has endured. And with your support of the Center for American Liberty today, you can make sure no one else does.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkc3cjook1onls2jn83b8k0dmv1cveu854gvv0vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) Thank you for all you do. [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc31dj8adltbvvn2900u27h0r3pmc7kolt4mts3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeb610nm9ep3k0iocnvdkiva77loubg2t6tds2ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4m9ns049msh5jik90po6o8o2gtbe1ebgacta00_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8cj5587s9pmt5hj64uo03ok80ntn9gq29goii68_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g60oj2cjh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfgl7k0deb9kav6imlg3tomeibjbm74h31dcdpj8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlcdorasr363ij8olme5orbcdmctgmaddje9h74t9n6qrj2djic9ieeo5jeqr3fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdgmfdj3cor69cr2cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob6c9g6co74c5h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs1ej7phqgju8kpki6a5dbmgti7hsvjis01kttsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g6co74c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh17b3pm7brnipai70vjq8ftdimpsfpmnhonigj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g6co74c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo0ra7a584as8la2ok9g5evqttb55ciq7q9p66f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9g6co74c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zg28514bigs4hdrf5tnevbhcgmqp6e7atb4qd2sg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z79l3s74k7vg8d79dvtiv9ehodlm97s63s6kpnj8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cph60pj0shgm49fg)

name: Nina Turner
subject: I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I wanted you to hear it directly from me
#

Hello Somebody!
I have some HUGE news that I want to share directly with you: _**I'm running for Congress in 2022.**_
**[Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor to our campaign? We’re not taking money from special interests or corrupt Super PACs, but that means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and WIN.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41067917/327196247/1798563261?refcode2=93c9f089-af7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M5ZjA4OS1hZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LrzG33pq7fENnbYrGQbKM-XsW4Y6bchKJYNCIa7NZQ=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41067918/327196248/1798563261?refcode2=93c9f089-af7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M5ZjA4OS1hZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LrzG33pq7fENnbYrGQbKM-XsW4Y6bchKJYNCIa7NZQ=)**
Cleveland needs a change maker — not someone who’s only in Washington to go along and get along.
Cleveland deserves a representative that understands that health care is a human right that’s been denied to millions of Americans for far too long and will fight for Medicare for All.
A representative who knows poverty is a policy choice and the minimum wage must be raised to a living wage of AT LEAST $15 per hour.
A representative who has served on the front lines of the fight for criminal justice reform and voting rights — not for days, _but for decades_.
And a representative with a record of speaking truth to power and unapologetically fighting for working people.
Because here’s the truth: We can get an agenda through Congress that puts working families first. _And that is something worth fighting for._
**I’m committed to this fight, but I cannot do it alone. The ONLY way our campaign is going to be able to take on the powerful special interests and Super PACs that are going to organize against us is with a massive grassroots movement of folks like you.**
**[Can you make a contribution today and become a Founding Donor of our campaign? We’re counting on lots and lots of small contributions to fund this campaign, so anything you can afford to give makes a BIG difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41067919/327196249/1798563261?refcode2=93c9f089-af7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M5ZjA4OS1hZjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LrzG33pq7fENnbYrGQbKM-XsW4Y6bchKJYNCIa7NZQ=)**
All of the great social justice advances that we ever had in this country have come not from people with big titles and not from people at the top, but from everyday people getting together and saying _'Enough is enough. I'm going to change this, and I'm going to get involved, and I am going to be engaged.'_
That is what we are trying to do here on this campaign. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being a part of it.
With these hands,
Nina Turner

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41068126/327197826/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjViZjkzZS1iMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRG1rCHxSsCbg7ZYIzSez4ihFxhhm9zTPfCGDcnWvcg=)
Remember when the Democratic Texas House Representatives fled to Washington in 2021 to warn the rest of the country about what was happening in Texas? We’re now seeing the impact on voters. Here in Austin, Texas, Travis County is reporting that they had to reject about half of applications for mail-in ballots. And, voter registrars now say they have a shortage of voter registration forms ahead of the March 1 primary. This restriction on voting by mail is a direct result of the GOP trifecta that rules over Texas. **We must stand up to this tyranny.** Donna Imam is running for Congress to fight back, and win a brand-new open seat in Texas. And she needs your help to GET OUT THE VOTE when early voting starts in just a few weeks. **[Maximizing Democratic voter turnout in Austin — the bluest city in Texas — is the way to help flip statewide races where gerrymandering is not a factor. Fight voter suppression and elect more Democrats to the House. To fight back, our campaign is doing the work in the field to drastically ramp up our GET OUT THE VOTE work. **We need your help so we can get more field organizers to voters' doors — meeting them where they are. Hello,
I don’t want the NRA’s money. The only thing I want from them is an “F” rating so I can wear it like a badge of honor. But not my opponent Chuck Grassley.
Last year, Grassley took yet another big check from the NRA. And then the NRA got exactly what they paid for: **Days after 4 more kids were murdered in a school shooting, Chuck Grassley stood up and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases.**
There is a gun violence epidemic in this country, and we need to finally pass meaningful gun safety reform. The only way we’ll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA and all their blood money.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley, and the polls show we can win. But I need your help if we’re going to defeat Grassley and the NRA:**
