clean_body: Hello, I don’t want the NRA’s money. The only thing I want from them is an “F” rating so I can wear it like a badge of honor. But not my opponent Chuck Grassley. Last year, Grassley took yet another big check from the NRA. And then the NRA got exactly what they paid for: Days after 4 more kids were murdered in a school shooting, Chuck Grassley stood up and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. There is a gun violence epidemic in this country, and we need to finally pass meaningful gun safety reform. The only way we’ll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA and all their blood money. I’m running against Chuck Grassley, and the polls show we can win. But I need your help if we’re going to defeat Grassley and the NRA: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Mike Pompeo (iPhone)
subject: I’m going to let you in on a secret.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3dazq--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0kf-4qqlpo2/)
---

I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.

See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.

**But, things are about to change in a BIG way.**

2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power.

Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. **[If Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0kg-4qqlpo3/ "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0kh-4qqlpo4/)
---

The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted.

**[That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0ki-4qqlpo5/ "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?")**

I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that.

---
| | [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0kj-4qqlpo6/)
---

**I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in.** That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate.

**[We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3dazq-1v0kk-4qqlpo7/ "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. ")**

With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around.

Are you with me?

-Mike

---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Peter, I’m proud to endorse my good friend Andy Levin, and I’m asking if you can pitch in to support his reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress
body:
One of my strongest partners in Congress is facing his toughest reelection race yet.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41069092/327199777/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220126_f_s_warren&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUyZDJmMy1iMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKDSOZXloob9ptKI2a1EFFPD664XBYlp1C2_pjfAi9I=&emci=488b5e5f-447e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0952d2f3-b07e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22034926)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41069093/327199779/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220126_f_s_warren&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUyZDJmMy1iMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKDSOZXloob9ptKI2a1EFFPD664XBYlp1C2_pjfAi9I=&emci=488b5e5f-447e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0952d2f3-b07e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22034926)
---
| | Peter, One of my strongest partners in Congress is facing his toughest reelection race yet. **Today, I’m endorsing Congressman Andy Levin for reelection in Michigan’s new 11th District — and in a moment, I’m going to ask if you can make a donation to support him.** But first, some background. I’ve teamed up with Congressman Andy Levin to fight this pandemic. To combat climate change while creating good-paying union jobs. To hold the Trump administration accountable. To put our government on the side of families, not just the rich and powerful. When I need a partner in the U.S. House of Representatives who’s ready to get in the fight for working people, I call Andy. And he always throws himself into the battle. Just in the past few months, he organized and held the line to make sure the House would pass the Build Back Better bill — and that it would actually include the childcare expansion that families need. **We need to keep Andy’s voice in Washington. But Michigan just released their new congressional maps, and they’ve set Andy up for his most competitive campaign yet.** [_**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t powerfully important: Can you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense right now to support my good friend Andy Levin’s reelection campaign? If we get in this fight by his side, we can send him back to Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41069095/327199781/882283677?refcode=em_20220126_f_s_warren&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUyZDJmMy1iMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKDSOZXloob9ptKI2a1EFFPD664XBYlp1C2_pjfAi9I=) Your donation would help make sure this campaign has the resources to reach new voters, now that the maps have been moved around. But here’s the good news: Andy’s new district fits him like a glove. His family’s roots in the new 11th District go five generations deep. He’s lived there, and worked there, and raised children there, and sent them to the district’s public schools. He knows what this district’s working families need: a fighting chance, and a member of Congress who won’t hesitate to fight for them. He didn’t get into politics because he wanted a fancy title. No — he ran for office because he was on a mission. A mission to raise the standard of living for families. To put power in the hands of the working class. To make it quick and easy to form a union and bargain collectively. To advance human rights around the world. To defend our planet from climate change while delivering a bright new era of good-paying, union jobs in clean energy. He fights from the heart AND he knows how to get results. That’s my favorite type of fighter. **We need his voice in Washington. But he’s going to need our help to get reelected.** [**_If you can, please make a donation to help reelect Andy right now. This race could come down to the wire, and $3 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41069097/327199784/882283677?refcode=em_20220126_f_s_warren&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUyZDJmMy1iMDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKDSOZXloob9ptKI2a1EFFPD664XBYlp1C2_pjfAi9I=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
---

clean_body: One of my strongest partners in Congress is facing his toughest reelection race yet. | | | | | Peter, One of my strongest partners in Congress is facing his toughest reelection race yet. Today, I’m endorsing Congressman Andy Levin for reelection in Michigan’s new 11th District — and in a moment, I’m going to ask if you can make a donation to support him. But first, some background. I’ve teamed up with Congressman Andy Levin to fight this pandemic. To combat climate change while creating good-paying union jobs. To hold the Trump administration accountable. To put our government on the side of families, not just the rich and powerful. When I need a partner in the U.S. House of Representatives who’s ready to get in the fight for working people, I call Andy. And he always throws himself into the battle. Just in the past few months, he organized and held the line to make sure the House would pass the Build Back Better bill — and that it would actually include the childcare expansion that families need. We need to keep Andy’s voice in Washington. But Michigan just released their new congressional maps, and they’ve set Andy up for his most competitive campaign yet. = Your donation would help make sure this campaign has the resources to reach new voters, now that the maps have been moved around. But here’s the good news: Andy’s new district fits him like a glove. His family’s roots in the new 11th District go five generations deep. He’s lived there, and worked there, and raised children there, and sent them to the district’s public schools. He knows what this district’s working families need: a fighting chance, and a member of Congress who won’t hesitate to fight for them. He didn’t get into politics because he wanted a fancy title. No — he ran for office because he was on a mission. A mission to raise the standard of living for families. To put power in the hands of the working class. To make it quick and easy to form a union and bargain collectively. To advance human rights around the world. To defend our planet from climate change while delivering a bright new era of good-paying, union jobs in clean energy. He fights from the heart AND he knows how to get results. That’s my favorite type of fighter. We need his voice in Washington. But he’s going to need our help to get reelected. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

name: Clay Aiken
subject: happy you’re here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Hey folks! Happy to have you on the team. When we announced my run for Congress, I was overwhelmed by the immediate support we received.
Things are moving fast and the election will be here before you know it. That’s why my team is wasting no time building up the resources we need to run a winning strategy. Can I count on you to chip in $5 (or whatever you can) right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=Welcome&amount=5]
Not quite ready? That’s ok. Let me tell you a bit more about me and why I decided to run in North Carolina's 6th district...
I was born and raised in the Triangle. In fact, my family has lived in the Triangle since 1768! To say I love my home state of North Carolina is an understatement. It’s where I first discovered I had a voice, where I grew up and was taught character and compassion.
This district is an open seat for the first time in 55 years. Democratic congressman David Price is retiring. It is Congressman Price who first sparked my interest in politics back when I was in the eighth grade. And for almost four decades, he has shown all of us what it means to be a real public servant.
In recent years, leaders have found their way to power that do not speak to the North Carolina I know and love. I talk to my neighbors and know I’m not alone in those feelings. Folks like Madison Cawthorn and Mark Robinson take up all the oxygen in the room, and frankly, I’m sick of it. They don’t represent me, my state, or our community. I don’t see them fighting to make our lives better, I just see them... well... just fighting.
And I know these folks ain’t quieting down any time soon. So I’m going to do what I do: use my voice to speak up and stop them from ruining our state’s reputation and standing in the way of progress for our communities.
That’s why I’m running for Congress. I’m running here in this community that raised me and I'm now raising my family in, and where I first discovered my voice.
Are you with me? Instantly add your name to let me know I can count on you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_ty?refcode=Welcome&amount=25]
More soon!
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

I promise you that I will never stop fighting, Friend. But, before I give my BIG SPEECH in TEXAS, I want to get your input. I'm requesting the help of Patriots across the Nation to help me prepare for my Official Rally Speech. How would you rate the state of our nation right now? I need to know what you think, Friend. I 'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES tomorrow. I'll be looking for your answers because your input is critical to my speech. Thank you, Donald J. | Friend,
My team and I got ahold of Biden's to-do list for 2022, and it looks a lot like 2021.
Biden and his Far-Left Radicals are still pushing their authoritarian agenda. What does that mean for America? It means it'll only get worse.
Biden is still trying to pass the most expensive bill in history: the Build Back Broke bill. Which, of course, will cause prices to rise even higher and further empty store shelves. Even worse, he is trying to FEDERALIZE our elections to keep the federal government under his control PERMANENTLY.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41070500/327205193/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQxZjIwOC1iMzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsTus_91VJTgr4Rl_Bo44fKC8MXwu5_K3_85e1iAcfc=&emci=6cc7854d-f16f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9d41f208-b37e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Hi – Welcome to Team Andy! We wanted to tell you a little about why we're in this fight and let you know what you can expect from our favorite congressman, Andy Kim: **Andy first ran for office in 2018** because someone needed to step up and fight for health care coverage for his newborn son and millions of others with pre-existing conditions. In a political climate that can feel toxic, Andy and thousands of volunteers built a different kind of campaign – one rooted in the respect and humanity of his South Jersey community, where neighbors come together to solve problems, regardless of political party. Ever since, Andy's been proving that politics grounded in empathy and civility are what we need to move our country forward. **When COVID-19 hit,** Andy recognized that the pandemic doesn't distinguish between political parties. He worked to get Lysol to our paramedics and first responders, PPE to homebound caregivers and our most vulnerable neighbors, and critical resources to our community. Andy also fought for the American Rescue Plan, which delivered shots in arms, money in pockets, and people in jobs. **When insurrectionists attacked our Capitol on January 6, 2021,** Andy showed we could all still have hope and courage. His simple act of clearing debris in the Rotunda reminded us that we can care for and defend our democracy. **When the AAPI community was targeted,** Andy stepped up to publicly denounce Asian hate, support and recruit AAPI leaders, and highlight the resilience and contributions of the Asian American community. He always speaks up when he sees injustice. Time and time again, Andy has shown that he is there for us. And as one of only five Democrats running for re-election in a district that Trump also won, he needs our continued support. Just as we've had his back, he's always had ours. Andy is the type of leader who makes us optimistic because his actions inspire us to create a better future. That sense of hope powers a grassroots movement unlike any other. We've weathered some tough times, but the fact that we've gotten through them shows what we can do when we stick together. When the AAPI community was targeted, Andy stepped up to publicly denounce Asian hate, support and recruit AAPI leaders, and highlight the resilience and contributions of the Asian American community. He always speaks up when he sees injustice. Time and time again, Andy has shown that he is there for us. And as one of only five Democrats running for re-election in a district that Trump also won, he needs our continued support. Just as we've had his back, he's always had ours. Andy is the type of leader who makes us optimistic because his actions inspire us to create a better future. That sense of hope powers a grassroots movement unlike any other. We've weathered some tough times, but the fact that we've gotten through them shows what we can do when we stick together. Thank you for being a part of this team. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Greg needs this team’s help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today, I’m proud to announce my support for Greg Casar in the race for Texas’s 35th District.
Greg has a strong record of fighting for working families and standing up to powerful interests, which is exactly what we need in Congress.
But first, he needs this team’s support to send him to Washington.
If you can, will you support this people-powered campaign by donating $35 today to help get out the vote? His primary is coming right up on March 1 -- so your donation right now would go a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]Greg has fought to raise the wages of Austin’s lowest-income employees, worked with tenants to block evictions and boost affordable housing, and partnered with organizations like Planned Parenthood to stop the attacks on reproductive rights in Texas.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]People across this country are still hurting – and they need action on issues like affordable housing, immigration reform, voting rights, and our climate crisis that have been left unaddressed. They need members of Congress who will fight back against the assault on our democracy and on fundamental rights like the right to an abortion.
I’m proud to support Greg because I know he will join me in those fights. He will spend every day fighting for good jobs, a livable wage, Medicare for All, and reproductive freedom – things he has spent his career fighting for at the local level.
At this critical time in our country, we need leaders like Greg who will fight and deliver for working families. With less than a month until early voting starts, Greg needs this team’s support NOW to get out the vote. Can you chip in $35 to support Greg’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

I’m excited to welcome new voters into MI-11 and am looking forward to seeing familiar faces on the campaign trail. In the coming months, I’ll continue to do what I’ve always done: listen, learn, and lead – in that order.
First, I'll organize everywhere. My number one priority has always been to bring our community together, and there’s no better way to do that than by meeting voters where they are.
Second, I am listening to what voters’ top needs are. I know it’s important to many Michiganders in the 11th district that Congress supports their small businesses, promotes good-paying jobs, and protects their access to healthcare.
Third, I’m being the leader MI-11 has elected me to be. The core principles of my campaign have always been innovation, education, and supporting advanced manufacturing.
Our strategy is centered around meeting as many folks as possible in the district and doing what we do best: communicating my plans for providing cutting-edge solutions to support Michigan’s working families.
As excited as I am to be organizing and mobilizing new voters, it’s also one of the most expensive parts of campaigning. Our end-of-month deadline is fast approaching, and I couldn’t think of a better time for you to show your grassroots support than right now.
[**Will you donate $25 or more to jumpstart my re-election campaign today? subject: RSVP: Join our virtual town hall to #CancelStudentDebt!
body:
Tomorrow @ 5 p.m. ET!

| | | Join our town hall with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Ayanna Pressley, and more!

| [I'm in](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41074330/327219018/-419849270?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJjN2ZhMy1iODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03TmvO_VHgRJYJAjYU037T5lTHcVyX6mE7JyzEAzFow=&emci=c971527a-107e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4ebc7fa3-b87e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Last week marked 100 days until student loan payments resume for millions of Americans on May 1.** Before then, we are making our voices heard and showcasing our unwavering support for federal student loan debt cancellation.
**NextGen America is partnering with Student Debt Crisis Center, Public Citizen, and MoveOn to host a virtual town hall to amplify the work lawmakers are doing to relieve the burden of student debt for millions of Americans. **
**Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Senator Elizabeth Warren, and Representative Ayanna Pressley** will join us live to share their strong endorsement of broad student debt cancellation. We’ll also feature messages from other leading lawmakers and advocates who will speak to the work they are doing to alleviate the great financial weight of student debt for millions of borrowers and let us know how we can continue to get involved in this movement.
[**Join our virtual town hall tomorrow, January 27, at 5 p.m. ET for a powerful conversation about canceling federal student loan debt once and for all.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41074331/327219021/-917242131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJjN2ZhMy1iODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03TmvO_VHgRJYJAjYU037T5lTHcVyX6mE7JyzEAzFow=&emci=c971527a-107e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4ebc7fa3-b87e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172)
Student debt takes away from our ability to pay for food, housing, health care, and to save for our future. Cancellation can jumpstart our economy, help close the racial wealth gap for borrowers, and put an end to predatory practices that harm and trap borrowers in years of debt.
**President Biden can, with the stroke of a pen, cancel student debt for millions of Americans by signing an executive action. **
He promised to improve access to a quality education and lessen the financial burden of the student loan crisis that impacts nearly 45 million people holding a total of $1.6 trillion in debt. We are keeping him to his promise.
[**Sign up to attend our student debt town hall tomorrow, January 27, at 5 p.m. ET before seats fill up!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41074345/327219022/1811641224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJjN2ZhMy1iODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03TmvO_VHgRJYJAjYU037T5lTHcVyX6mE7JyzEAzFow=&emci=c971527a-107e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4ebc7fa3-b87e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172)
[Sign up now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41074347/327219036/245557283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJjN2ZhMy1iODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03TmvO_VHgRJYJAjYU037T5lTHcVyX6mE7JyzEAzFow=&emci=c971527a-107e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4ebc7fa3-b87e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172 "Send message")

clean_body: Tomorrow @ 5 p.m. ET! | | | Join our town hall with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Ayanna Pressley, and more! | | | Friend, Last week marked 100 days until student loan payments resume for millions of Americans on May 1. Before then, we are making our voices heard and showcasing our unwavering support for federal student loan debt cancellation. NextGen America is partnering with Student Debt Crisis Center, Public Citizen, and MoveOn to host a virtual town hall to amplify the work lawmakers are doing to relieve the burden of student debt for millions of Americans. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Senator Elizabeth Warren, and Representative Ayanna Pressley will join us live to share their strong endorsement of broad student debt cancellation. We’ll also feature messages from other leading lawmakers and advocates who will speak to the work they are doing to alleviate the great financial weight of student debt for millions of borrowers and let us know how we can continue to get involved in this movement. Student debt takes away from our ability to pay for food, housing, health care, and to save for our future. Cancellation can jumpstart our economy, help close the racial wealth gap for borrowers, and put an end to predatory practices that harm and trap borrowers in years of debt. President Biden can, with the stroke of a pen, cancel student debt for millions of Americans by signing an executive action. He promised to improve access to a quality education and lessen the financial burden of the student loan crisis that impacts nearly 45 million people holding a total of $1.6 trillion in debt. We are keeping him to his promise. "Send message" See you there, Justin Atkins National Political Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Team, In a moment, [**we’re going to ask if you can make a grassroots contribution to help us hit our end-of-month goal before Monday’s midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41074789/327221987/284315840?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220126eom2_TV_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjFkYWViOS1iOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycku6_GbsVm9S_jN2L5T3O7quBniH30F9R4bxhL4-ps=) But first, we wanted to make sure you got a first look at our NEW issues page on our campaign website, detailing where Gabe stands on the issues most important to New Mexico’s 2nd District. Here’s a preview of some of the issues we cover and how Gabe plans to address them as our next member of Congress:
* **Building a Thriving Economy:**
New Mexico’s workers and small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and we must put them first. For too long the nation’s largest corporations haven’t paid their fair share, while CEOs and wealthy investors inflate their salaries and dividends. They do this while refusing to increase pay or benefits for workers. We can’t afford to allow this to continue. Gabe will work every day to help our workers and small businesses thrive and ensure that corporations are paying their fair share. This starts with raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour, increasing support for our small businesses, and repealing the Trump tax cuts for the wealthiest one-percent. Gabe also understands that New Mexicans are struggling to pay their bills because of rising prices, and that’s why he’ll support policies that cut taxes on working families while lowering the cost of healthcare, childcare, and utilities.

* **All New Mexicans Deserve Affordable, High Quality Healthcare:**
Every New Mexican deserves access to high-quality, affordable healthcare. This pandemic has shown us how fragile our healthcare system truly is and how high medical costs can quickly bankrupt entire families. In Congress, Gabe will work to lower healthcare costs for New Mexicans by fighting for a public option, adding dental and vision benefits and lowering the eligibility age for Medicare to 55, and ensuring that Medicare can negotiate for lower prescription drug costs, because everyone should be able to afford life-saving care without going broke.

* **Free and Fair Elections:**
Ensuring safe, secure, and fair elections is important to all of us – every eligible American deserves to have their voice heard and their vote counted, regardless of their political party. But the fundamental right to vote is being threatened by politicians who want to prevent eligible Americans from voting, strip the ability to oversee our elections from non-partisan election officials, and allow partisan politicians to overturn valid election results if they want a different outcome. Many of these same politicians refuse to investigate the January 6 attack on our capitol and spread conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. Gabe will fight to protect every eligible American’s right to cast a ballot and have their votes counted and to make sure that, when the votes are counted, the will of the people prevails.

If we’re going to make progress on these critical issues, we absolutely need to flip this swing seat from red-to-blue, send Gabe to Congress, and defend our Democratic House majority in November. [**But first, we need to reach our January goal to make sure we’re prepared to win the June primary. Rush your first $10 to help us do it >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41074790/327221995/284315840?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220126eom2_TV_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjFkYWViOS1iOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycku6_GbsVm9S_jN2L5T3O7quBniH30F9R4bxhL4-ps=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

# **Friend — Raphael Warnock is Georgia’s self-proclaimed “pro-choice pastor.” And he uses his platform to dismiss the rights of the unborn. **

---
He most recently did so on _National Sanctity of Life Day_.
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/dd4eac7ab116bf25/83f52cbb1fcaf2e5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
Raphael Warnock stands 100% with the abortion on demand lobby. **[If you help me defeat him, things will be very different when I’m in the U.S. Senate.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/dd4eac7ab116bf25/21e43f68e2f955d9c3d6b838967d376c/37793) ** I believe life begins at conception and that every life is precious. Period. The contrast couldn’t be clearer — **[and if you think we need a Senator and a Senate majority that protects the unborn, I hope you’ll help us win now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/dd4eac7ab116bf25/65336049ea7ca58ac3d6b838967d376c/37793) **

_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

Peter,

Had enough of far-left Biden rubber stamp Mikie
Sherrill?

Want to help send her packing on November 8th?

If you
answered “YES!”,
https://secure.winred.com/toby-anderson-for-congress-inc/welcome?utm_so
urce=Link&utm_campaign=AndersonT_PG-E-WelcomeEmail3-01112022_20220111&ut
m_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-E-WelcomeEmail3-01112022&utm_agency=alpha
then please take action today to help fuel our fight!

I'm running for
this seat because I’m FED UP. I’m extremely concerned with the
direction our nation is headed under Democrat “leadership” in
Washington, and as a proud patriot and veteran I decided it was time to
get off the sidelines and do something about it.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Need Peter’s input on this
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

I’m running for Governor to bring something new to Florida — to undo the damage that Ron DeSantis has done to our state and deliver results for workers, families, and small businesses.

But ultimately, this campaign isn’t about DeSantis. It isn’t about me. It’s about you.

As your next Governor, I’ll work every day to make your voices heard and serve your interests. And until then, I’ll continue to build my campaign around the issues that matter most to you.

So today, I’m asking you to tell me what you think — to let me know what issues matter most to you as we head towards a critical election. If you can, I hope you’ll take two minutes to fill out a quick priorities survey and make your voice heard. [https://s.surveyplanet.com/7i2vekwk]

I can’t wait to hear from you!

— Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jan-2022?refcode=priorities]

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Folks, even though we have Democratic House and Senate majorities, they are _so_ slim that our agenda is still vulnerable to Republican obstruction.
When I was a boy, voting rights advocates were sprayed with fire hoses and had dogs sicced on them.
That oppression continues today in the form of long lines, gerrymandering, and voter ID laws.
It's shameful that Senators refuse to repair this broken system.
_That’s_ why expanding our majorities is so important – if we want to take any meaningful action on voting rights, we need even more Democratic voices to outweigh Republicans.
**The midterm elections are fast approaching, and we’re going to need all hands on deck if we want to not only hold our majority but expand it.**

| | Peter, Republican extremist Madison Cawthorn is once again making headlines for his divisive and toxic behavior. Just last week, Cawthorn decided he felt it was appropriate to fidget with a gun, pretending to clean it, during a Veterans’ Affairs hearing on how toxic chemicals are killing U.S. soldiers. Yes, you read that correctly. Veterans are worthy of respect, and the very real challenges they face require our attention. Instead of doing his job on behalf of the people of WNC, Cawthorn decided to pull a callous political stunt. This was disrespectful and immature. In response to the controversy, Cawthorn’s spokesman asked “What could possibly be more patriotic than guns and veterans?" But Cawthorn acting out during this hearing on Veterans’ health and safety had nothing to do with honoring veterans, addressing their needs, or patriotism. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41079159/327240511/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220126_FR_EOM2CawthornGun_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTEyNGQwMy1jMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0GqLiAtLZ94dV9WS2xg4_Gy7ujZAn-AIzK3y6z53ug=) Cawthorn has demonstrated over and over again that he doesn’t care about the job he was actually elected to do – representing the people of Western North Carolina. He’s more concerned with building a celebrity brand on the fringes of the far-right. **He does not represent our values in WNC, and we deserve better. That’s why I’m running for Congress to replace him. ****If elected, I will not fidget with a gun during a Veterans’ Affairs hearing. ** [**My team and I set an end-of-month goal of $45,000 so that we can counter Cawthorn’s toxicity with love, hope, and empathy – and we need you on our side. clean_body: | = | | Peter, Republican extremist Madison Cawthorn is once again making headlines for his divisive and toxic behavior. Just last week, Cawthorn decided he felt it was appropriate to fidget with a gun, pretending to clean it, during a Veterans’ Affairs hearing on how toxic chemicals are killing U.S. soldiers. Yes, you read that correctly. Veterans are worthy of respect, and the very real challenges they face require our attention. Instead of doing his job on behalf of the people of WNC, Cawthorn decided to pull a callous political stunt. This was disrespectful and immature. In response to the controversy, Cawthorn’s spokesman asked “What could possibly be more patriotic than guns and veterans?" But Cawthorn acting out during this hearing on Veterans’ health and safety had nothing to do with honoring veterans, addressing their needs, or patriotism. = Cawthorn has demonstrated over and over again that he doesn’t care about the job he was actually elected to do – representing the people of Western North Carolina. He’s more concerned with building a celebrity brand on the fringes of the far-right. He does not represent our values in WNC, and we deserve better. That’s why I’m running for Congress to replace him. If elected, I will not fidget with a gun during a Veterans’ Affairs hearing. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Your grassroots donations will go a long way towards giving our team the resources we need to win. We appreciate your support. – Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: You’ve been assigned to: Hillsborough County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello – Maggie Hassan wouldn’t have won in 2016 without a key strategy: talk to voters in all 10 counties of New Hampshire. She’ll win in 2022 the same way: by campaigning equally hard in Rockingham, Cheshire, Coos, and everywhere in between. Since Maggie only won her last race by 1,017 votes, losing any given county could mean losing this seat – and with it, Democrats’ Senate majority. We’re doubling down on our county-by-county strategy, and we need your help. The majority of Americans agree that the _2020 Election_ was filled with tremendous **FRAUD**.
Last night, the **Wisconsin Assembly** took a courageous step to address the fraud in their state by moving forward to **withdraw its' Electors** from Former Vice President Joe Biden.
What this entails is still to be determined but it's a **step in the right direction**.
Tonight at 8:30PM CT, I will be hosting a _livestream discussion_ with **Senator Wendy Rogers** to address what just happened in Wisconsin and much more.
The livestream will take place on my [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2233.1.8854f8db297fd4a9b098cda644074386), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2234.1.bf1312ad246da8a48ced9d7394d76347) and [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2235.1.c35574fdd6ed61385ceb27ca3bf0da39) pages.
I look forward to having you join us!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2236.1.9da60dd81a7e8db9790b97af693f115e), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2237.1.909a7dae8d24c3d34b42a7ea28de1df9), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2238.1.5f56457b0ee9786d6e357dc442d9c9ff), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2239.1.704cf6e4701b7a04cd0eda7528678ea3), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2240.1.d932f438b8927bf3f828593e44dac6c3)).

America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and the legendary, **Roger Stone** , are joining me in **Oklahoma** for _2 Nights in 2 Cities_ (**OKC and Tulsa**)
General Flynn nudged me into running for the US Senate here in Oklahoma and Mr. Stone now leads the **#LahmeyerForSenate** campaign to oust _RINO_ Senator James Lankford.
I would like to invite you to hear what I call, "_Inside Baseball_ " from two men that are in the know. We are releasing the event details today and these two events will be the hottest tickets in Oklahoma.
Reserve your spot ASAP:
**[Oklahoma City](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2243.1.07c12db8cc34d6e788f8a6e888fa2311)** : Friday, March 4th at 7pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2244.1.c7389dc192569b2734edf5aa4cf95678)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641935](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2245.1.01354b9826f48822823460b314f24641)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2246.1.5eb0c31f655454a3264face735ee9051)
**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2247.1.c9e045cfaaf69a1a04e793bbf80ae419)** : Saturday, March 5th at 6pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2248.1.474a870ea24222b089cb046642bff6b0)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641941](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2249.1.aa63d2984ee8d89044485be087b05ea1)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2250.1.0134f08d1a2685304ceb3bd41ff778f3)
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
## Updates:
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2251.1.d663b293be99065c9f1d3ec6376f3624)
---
I spent this last weekend in _Phoenix, Arizona_ at the **Re-Awaken America Tour** event and I had some incredible conversations with many great heroes such as **Eric Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** and **Mike Lindell**.
_Mike Lindell_ wanted me to specifically let you know how grateful he is for the support great Americans like you have shown him and [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2252.1.d4ed2683cd7889cd5c9812977b45fc83) over the last year in this fight to #SaveAmerica.
Right now, the Patriot movement is under attack, and we must stand **UNITED**! We have to recognize this is a fight between good and evil.
**Mike Lindell** has just found out that his bank, Minnesota Bank & Trust, has **cancelled the accounts of his business and his charities**.
This is UNBELIEVABLE!
We need to **support Mike in this fight**.
We must use our **3 Ts** to fight back:
1\. **Time** \- Attend events with other like-minded Patriots such as the Re-Awaken Tour (Ohio in February, San Diego in March. Get more info at www.timetofreeamerica.com )
2\. **Talent** \- Use the gifts and abilities that God has given you to contribute to saving of America. _America needs you_!
3\. **Treasure** \- We must stop funding Deep State companies and start funing America First companies. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in this war.
**If we will fight, we will win.**
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2253.1.749c03208ae43a3c6f8e75d329f3b08e), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2254.1.cbc4bfff58ef4f2602aaa9f98dc0303b).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2255.1.8da03b1de96f8f9bde79b6abd6bfe3d4) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2256.1.c283a9299fc8319156b09b4002f04b15)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3241821.2257.1.915d32830ab2bbc8064bd8c16a15ca6a) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Why today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Why is today the day it’s so important for you to make your first donation to this campaign? Let us explain:
#

Why today?
We send a number of fundraising emails, and all of them are important to Malcolm’s success.
But why is today’s different? Why is today the day it’s so important for you to make your first donation to this campaign?
Let us explain:
Malcolm is the one candidate in this race that can reassemble and energize the same coalition that won Pennsylvania for President Joe Biden in 2020.
He’s been doing that by traveling all across the commonwealth to hear directly from working people about the issues affecting them.
But building our coalition across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties will take an enormous amount of resources.
And since this campaign is powered by grassroots supporters, Malcolm is counting on you to help fund our grassroots outreach program across Pennsylvania.
So we are sincerely asking:
[Could you pitch in $3 today to support our work to build momentum behind our movement in all 67 of Pennsylvania’s counties?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081165/327250242/-358086307?refcode2=9b32f5e8-c57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjMyZjVlOC1jNTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvQCB78OCiI_DZ0zDTPpMlTbF_RSLtGtbAD5eGYUn6U=)

**In order to ramp up our campaign, we need to expand our grassroots team. I’m ready to hit the ground running, but I could really use your help.**

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: It's that time again: Help us pick the worst Pennsylvanian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

It's that time again: Help us pick the worst Pennsylvanian. We will anoint the winner of this poll with the foulest of honors: the Marjorie Taylor Greene Award!

This month, we have an Election 2022-theme going on with these terrifying candidates:

Dr. Oz: He's the Oprah protege she won't endorse! This "TV doctor" is running for Senator in PA, and man does he have all the wrong ideas about our health or what? He flip-flopped on his stance on abortion and is now OK with the Supreme Court potentially overturning our right to safe, legal abortion. He's also always railing against COVID-19 health mandates, ones that keep the economy running and us safe. He even called Dr. Fauci a "petty tyrant" for promoting COVID safety and challenged him -- a public health official -- to a debate. [Insert eyeroll emoji] We'll tune in for that one!

Jake Corman: This guy is always doing something questionable to earn his place in our poll. He's not only running for Governor, but he's bringing Trump's main lying story-spinner Kellyanne Conway in tow as a pollster and special adviser. Corman is doing what he can to tear down our democracy. A wannabe mini-Trump, he attended and bussed Pennsylvanians to the Jan. 6 insurrection. This guy is all about the spin, pushing false and costly election fraud claims in PA and now trying to impeach Philly DA Larry Krasner to cause a stir and get attention. He's as vile as it gets. But does he beat out the Oz?

Joe Gale: This Montgomery County commissioner is running for Governor and his brother is running for Senate. He's a self-described "true pro-life conservative" — and he's also the kinda guy who neither Democrats NOR Republicans like. Gale is a Trump fanboy who called Black Lives Matter a “radical left-wing hate group” and is against mail-in voting and COVID-19 restrictions. Not someone we want in charge.

Help us decide who is as rotten as MTG, but from Pennsylvania, by voting here.

VOTE [https://www.kpef.info/gtm-poll-january-2022]

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: BAD news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter:

I'm going to cut right to the chase because I have some bad news.

**Communist Democrats, Never Trump traitors, and bloodsucking swamp lobbyists poured millions of dollars into my race to defeat me.**

And thanks to this multi-million-dollar smear campaign, the latest poll shows me in a statistical tie with the Liz Cheney-style RINO running against me.

If I don't have the resources to fight back, I could be in real trouble.

**[That's why I hope I can count on you to chip in a contribution of $17.76 or $25 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r) The swap knows I'm the most dangerous woman in Washington.

**And from day one, the D.C. establishment, fake news media, and Silicon Valley cartel colluded to take me out.**

Nancy Pelosi and her allies kicked me off my committees.

Big Tech censored me by banning my Twitter account.

And insiders loaded up my district with 30,000 new Democrat voters.

Democrats, Social Media oligarchs, and Liz Cheney's band of Never Trumpers coordinated to take me out because I fought for Trump after Democrats stole the 2020 election.

_And I led the America First fight in Congress to:_

*** **IMPEACH** Joe Biden for allowing an illegal alien invasion along our Southern border;

*** **FIRE** Dr. Fauci for lying to Congress about funding the research that helped create the China virus; and

*** **ELIMINATE** tyrannical mask and vaccine mandates.

_But I'm not backing down. In fact, I'm going on offense_.

You see, my goal for my re-election isn't just to win...

My goal is to beat the Democrats and the Never Trumpers so badly that they will never show their face in my district -- or Georgia -- again.

**[So I need the support of Patriots like you to step up and chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help America First patriots like you and I will take our country back this November](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r) FIRST, not only am I facing some of the most well-funded Democrats in the country...

...now I have to get through a tough Primary against a Liz Cheney/Adam Kinzinger type "Republican" who will have MILLIONS of dollars behind her...

George Soros. Hollywood celebs, the Chamber of Commerce, Never Trump sellouts like the Lincoln Project, dark-money super PACs...the list goes on.

**All of them will spend TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars in negative attack ads, smear campaigns, and dirty tricks to defeat me in 2022.**

This new poll will just whet the appetite of the RINOs, Jihad Squad, and fake news media to defeat me.

**[So please help me fight back by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r).** [_**STAND WITH MTG
CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r) You see, it's not me they fear.

It's you.

After Donald Trump won the 2016 election in an historic uprising of everyday Americans against the failed elites and their America Last agenda, the D.C. establishment resolved never to allow anything like that to happen again.

**When you ignored the fake news media lies and Democrat smears to help me win the election in 2020, swamp creatures pitched a fit.**

Nancy Pelosi and the Communist Democrats tried to expel me from Congress FOUR times.

But I knew I could count on you to stand by my side.

And together, you and I defeated Pelosi's scheme to purge America First, pro-Trump conservatives like me from Congress.

**Now I need your help again.**

Liz Cheney, Nancy Pelosi, the fake news media, and Big Tech are desperate to defeat me.

Never Trumpers, George Soros, Hollywood elites, and the RINO establishment dumped millions into this race to defeat me.

The latest poll shows I need your help to defeat the Liz Cheney-style RINO running against me.

**[So please chip in your most generous contribution of of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59545979:sPSuyiHNO:m:1:2365227053:6BD54AD029E698E2635768D71FAA6996:r).**

With your help, you and I can save America and stop socialism.

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

Communist Democrats, Never Trump traitors, and bloodsucking swamp lobbyists poured millions of dollars into my race to defeat me. And thanks to this multi-million-dollar smear campaign, the latest poll shows me in a statistical tie with the Liz Cheney-style RINO running against me. If I don't have the resources to fight back, I could be in real trouble. . The swap knows I'm the most dangerous woman in Washington. And from day one, the D.C. establishment, fake news media, and Silicon Valley cartel colluded to take me out. Nancy Pelosi and her allies kicked me off my committees. Big Tech censored me by banning my Twitter account. And insiders loaded up my district with 30,000 new Democrat voters. Democrats, Social Media oligarchs, and Liz Cheney's band of Never Trumpers coordinated to take me out because I fought for Trump after Democrats stole the 2020 election. And I led the America First fight in Congress to: * IMPEACH Joe Biden for allowing an illegal alien invasion along our Southern border; FIRE Dr. Fauci for lying to Congress about funding the research that helped create the China virus; and ELIMINATE tyrannical mask and vaccine mandates. But I'm not backing down. In fact, I'm going on offense. You see, my goal for my re-election isn't just to win... My goal is to beat the Democrats and the Never Trumpers so badly that they will never show their face in my district -- or Georgia -- again. . FIRST, not only am I facing some of the most well-funded Democrats in the country... ...now I have to get through a tough Primary against a Liz Cheney/Adam Kinzinger type "Republican" who will have MILLIONS of dollars behind her... George Soros. Hollywood celebs, the Chamber of Commerce, Never Trump sellouts like the Lincoln Project, dark-money super PACs...the list goes on. All of them will spend TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars in negative attack ads, smear campaigns, and dirty tricks to defeat me in 2022. This new poll will just whet the appetite of the RINOs, Jihad Squad, and fake news media to defeat me. . You see, it's not me they fear. It's you. After Donald Trump won the 2016 election in an historic uprising of everyday Americans against the failed elites and their America Last agenda, the D.C. establishment resolved never to allow anything like that to happen again. When you ignored the fake news media lies and Democrat smears to help me win the election in 2020, swamp creatures pitched a fit. Nancy Pelosi and the Communist Democrats tried to expel me from Congress FOUR times. But I knew I could count on you to stand by my side. And together, you and I defeated Pelosi's scheme to purge America First, pro-Trump conservatives like me from Congress. Now I need your help again. Liz Cheney, Nancy Pelosi, the fake news media, and Big Tech are desperate to defeat me. Never Trumpers, George Soros, Hollywood elites, and the RINO establishment dumped millions into this race to defeat me. clean_body: | | | | An incredible endorsement Peter, As we see the radical Left continue to lash out and spew hateful rhetoric against our law enforcement, it’s more important now than ever for Americans to stand up for Law & Order. Today, I am honored to announce that Madison County Sheriff Michael Moore has endorsed my campaign for Congress. See Sheriff Moore’s full endorsement statement below: "Law enforcement has never been under greater attack. We need a rock-solid conservative that will stand up for our law enforcement officers and first responders.That is why I’m endorsing Marc McMain for Congress in Georgia 10th district, which now includes Madison County. Marc has a history of supporting law enforcement and will push back against any federal efforts to defund the police or law enforcement agencies. Marc is not a career politician.He has never run for office before, but he does have real-world experience running a business. He’s built successful businesses from the ground up. He’s not afraid of hard work and will have the strength to do what needs to be done in Washington." I’d like to ask for an endorsement of your own when you | | | | | | Conservatives need to stand together amid the radical Left’s attempt to defund our law enforcement. There is no doubt whose side I’ll be on. In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10_ | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

Hey, friend.
I want to ask you for a favor today.
When I launched this campaign for Congress, I set out to build a movement that brings people together — not only because our current Congressman is, well, the way he is (ineffective, totally out-of-sync with constituents, and flat-out dangerous), but because I believe there’s a better future worth fighting for.
Whether you’ve donated $5 or $500, whether you just joined us or if you’ve been with us since the start, everyone in this fight to deliver real leadership to FL-15 has a reason for wanting a better future — and I want to hear yours!
[Will you add your name to say that you’re with me, and tell me a little bit about why you’re part of this team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081903/327254527/-1176019972?refcode=fl_email_su_20220126withme_EG_op_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_8thK4tixVVzNHwr9DkXG1du9ZDuQPyqUynoogZTac=&emci=2a139260-a178-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=073d8b65-c97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12772398)

Maybe it’s because you or someone you care about is paying too damn much for healthcare, whether it be life-saving insulin, hearing devices for seniors, mental healthcare services, or something else.
Maybe it’s because you’re deeply worried about the state of our democracy, with people like my opponent openly supporting anti-democratic attempts at voter suppression and intimidation.
Maybe it’s because you’re absolutely terrified, like I am, about the rapid escalation of climate change that threatens Florida more than almost any other state.
Maybe it’s for all of those reasons or none of them — whatever the case may be, I want to hear about it.
[So, will you add your name to show your support for this campaign, and tell us a little bit about why you’re in this fight with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081916/327254540/-1176019972?refcode=fl_email_su_20220126withme_EG_op_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_8thK4tixVVzNHwr9DkXG1du9ZDuQPyqUynoogZTac=&emci=2a139260-a178-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=073d8b65-c97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12772398)
Thanks so much,
Eddie

**Here’s the truth: Right now, Brad doesn’t have the resources to fight back against that kind of attack.**

But if he can hit Monday's end-of-month fundraising goal, he’ll be able to mount the kind of defense he needs to counter these lies. He only needs to raise $5,500 more to hit his goal!

name: Team Tina
subject: We are proud to stand with Oregon nurses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081896/327254522/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=&emci=41a03bcd-ae7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=063d8b65-c97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter --

We wanted to catch you up on some great news.

Team Tina is honored to have the endorsement and support of the **Oregon Nurses Association** \-- our state's largest union for nurses and health care professionals, working hard every day on behalf of health care workers across the state.

We are proud to stand alongside them, and this endorsement is deeply personal for Tina.

Fifteen years ago, when Tina's mom traveled to Oregon for Tina's first swearing-in to the Oregon Legislature, she wasn't feeling well and ended up in the hospital and being diagnosed with stage 4 cancer.

This was a difficult time for Tina and her family, but the one thing she always remembers is the nurses who cared for her mom during this time.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081898/327254523/-1746339895?refcode=em22_220126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=)
---
[DONATE TO SUPPORT TINA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081904/327254524/-1746339895?refcode=em22_220126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=)
Tina saw how hard they worked, how much they cared, and what they needed to do their job, and that is why she fights so hard for them. From understaffing to challenging working conditions and being underpaid, this pandemic has exacerbated all of the issues nurses face each day when they show up for work.

It is important to Tina that we take a stand alongside them to demand _safer working conditions, better pay benefits, and fair contracts at hospitals across the state._

We are proud to stand with our Oregon nurses because of their continued commitment to the health and wellbeing of all Oregonians.

We stand with Tina in memory of her mom.

**[Will you support our campaign by donating $5 today so that we can continue to help support those who make our state a better place to live?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081905/327254530/-1746339895?refcode=em22_220126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081906/327254531/-1746339895?refcode=em22_220126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=)
Here at Team Tina, we are committed to working hard to create an Oregon where everyone, all workers and their families, can _thrive._

Thank you for standing with us today,

– Team Tina

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081908/327254533/-294883092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=&emci=41a03bcd-ae7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=063d8b65-c97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41081910/327254534/-1484875328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNkOGI2NS1jOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFgBgr0nTJBdOsJbG0H3G228oWrVm1HcvC6caXREmWA=&emci=41a03bcd-ae7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=063d8b65-c97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729) Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Newt Gingrich
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Hey Derek, As you may have seen over the weekend, former Speaker of the House turned Fox News pundit, close Kevin McCarthy ally, and Trump propagandist — Newt Gingrich — made headlines threatening me and my colleagues personally. Gingrich threatened jail time for those who are investigating the violent January 6 attack on our Capitol. As a member of that committee, I won’t dignify this obscene statement. But I do want to talk to you about something else he said that is part of a new, disturbing pattern. In an op-ed, Gingrich singled me out for a whole series of baseless attacks. In an act of projection worthy of the man he is desperate to impress, Donald Trump, he called me a “vicious, dishonest smear artist.” But that isn’t the worst part. He claimed I “should not be allowed to serve on any committee with legislative jurisdiction” and that I should be removed. These comments from the former Speaker are troubling. Not because of their weight, but because of the trend. It comes at the heels of Marjorie Taylor Greene calling for me to be stripped of all responsibility in Congress — in retaliation for her disgrace barely a month into her term. Greene’s threats were followed by threats made by the former President. And then made by the GOP Leader, Kevin McCarthy. They are all in lockstep in this messaging, following wherever the most extreme person leads them. **It’s no longer an idle talking point to drive Greene’s Twitter engagement. Republicans, behind closed doors, appear to be planning to seek retribution against anyone who has the courage to tell the truth — if they win in the midterms. We simply cannot allow that to happen. If they do, that’s the end of any serious oversight and the beginning of a new wave of corruption.** **Will you pitch in $10 or anything meaningful to you right now to my re-election campaign? Openly threatening to kick members off their legislative committee assignments and imprison them, all for doing our jobs. And in my case, because I held the former president to account for his serial abuses of power.
This is the authoritarian impulse we’ve been warned about for so long. Republicans have made jailing their political opponents a central plank of their campaigns since at least 2016. Their autocratic cult of personality is attempting to flex its muscle in broad daylight. And we must stop it.
**We cannot allow the GOP to take the House in November. That future is grim. Will you pitch in right now to my re-election campaign? We cannot sit idly by.**

name: Defend the Senate
subject: Mitch McConnell’s words were insulting and wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41082766/327258724/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjVjOWFjYy1jYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDCLUkRiimV4n8Ma3oSziMLPWssZDwzO-K07iGO2ths=)
Friends — We would say this is unbelievable but Mitch McConnell has proven time and again that he will put political power above everything else. After Senate Republicans blocked our efforts to protect the right to vote, Mitch McConnell suggested that African Americans are not Americans by saying, **“African American voters are voting in just as high a percentage as Americans.”** That is insulting and wrong. Democrats are fighting for the right to vote for EVERY American while Mitch McConnell is insulting African Americans and continuing to erode one of our most sacred rights just so Republicans can win elections. I hope you're having a good day today.

You may have heard a lot of talk in the media
lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding
Fathers, is flawed and outdated.

It may make you wonder, as it does me: How
should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?

Well, a few early defenders of the
Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-have
given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.

These essays were written between October
1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist
Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials
intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist
Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government
which ever was written."

There is no better guide to understanding the
principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through
the words of the Founders themselves. That's why I'd like to give
you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale's free online course, "The
Federalist Papers," today.

Taught by Hillsdale College's politics
faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of
this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of
majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the
nature of the three branches of government, and the argument
concerning the Bill of Rights.

Thanks for reading my email, and I hope
you'll activate your free enrollment in "The Federalist Papers"
today.

Activate your free course now »

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have
deepened my education and enriched my life."
- Fred D.
"Extraordinary in their simplicity and so
fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue
to knowledge."
- John C.

subject: what does the word "patriot" mean to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
until we secure equal access to voting for every American!

| |
---
Team, Donald Trump and members of the Trump Republican Party like to regularly invoke the word “patriot” in their political rhetoric — usually in sharp contrast to their actions. When Chris and every one of his Senate Democratic colleagues voted to pass critical legislation to defend our democracy, not ONE Republican joined them to stand up and support voting rights. Not ONE! [Team, that’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to let us know whether you think it's patriotic for Republican state legislators to make it harder to access the ballot box and for Republicans in Congress to block efforts to protect voting rights in our democracy. As the author of the original DISCLOSE Act to get dark money out of politics, Chris has been a longtime champion of protecting our democracy from the influence of big money special interests and billionaire SuperPacs. He’s never been afraid to stand up for what's right.
Mitch McConnell on the other hand has been the #1 cheerleader for the notorious 5-4 Citizens United decision and has led the fight AGAINST restricting dark money in our politics. So it's no surprise that McConnell has been determined to get Maryland's Republican Governor to run against Chris and, according to Larry Hogan, saying it’s his "patriotic duty"!
That seems to be a pretty twisted way to invoke 'patriotism' — but we want to know what you think.

Last week, Victoria was interviewed by El Tiempo Latino [https://eltiempolatino.com/2022/01/21/local/victoria-virasingh-la-luchadora-democrata-de-origen-hispano-que-busca-una-silla-en-virginia/] , a national Spanish language media outlet, about the campaign and the need for Latino representation in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=ElTiempo]
The fact of the matter is, 30 percent of the population is District 8 is Hispanic, and there has never been a Latino voice representing our district.
We have a chance to make history by electing Victoria to be the first Latina to represent Virginia at the federal level. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=ElTiempo] This community has a chance to have real representation that reflects real experiences of the working class.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/el%20tiempo%20quotes.png]
If we have a voice like Victoria's in Congress, we know that she will be fighting for immigrants, teachers, small business owners, students and new college graduates, and working families everywhere.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/el%20tiempo%20quotes2.png]

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Three Democrats are enough; we don't need yet another Hillary Clinton supporter running against me for Governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Will you please consider donating $22 to my 2022 campaign today?
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
It's bad enough that there are three liberal Democrat candidates lining up to take us on in November. What we don't need is one more person to challenge conservative values in this race.
And yet, that's exactly what we got when Chris Doughty announced his candidacy for Governor today.
Here's all you need to know about where he stands: Chris Doughty says he voted for Hillary Clinton over Donald Trump in 2016.
Is that the person we want to represent our party?
---
---
Sadly, there are some in our party who are looking at this announcement with excitement. Take, for example, what the former Chair of the MassGOP tweeted regarding recent reports that there are strategists plotting with Doughty against our campaign:
---
---
I'm sorry to disappoint, but I'm not running for Governor for "fun."
Some people may consider the Governor's race a spectator sport. I don't. There's way too much at stake in this race.
I'm the only candidate in the race for Governor willing to take a stand for you, your freedom, and your ability to live in a state that's safe and affordable. And, I'm proud to be that candidate.
There are those who are poised to work against us for purposes of political gain. I'm not worried about them. I have just one question:
Can I count on you for your support?
If so, I'd appreciate it if you'd help me send the naysayers a message.
Will you please consider making a contribution of $22 in support of my 2022 campaign for Governor?
---
|
---
| | [Donate $22 to Geoff to Win in '22](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_5pIAH8n-YjodyfpVvDz0bNv6Y7JwqDjgojMHEjmSbTzzUoCJ_EleGJe3DMRrD5c-WoooDhEBnkV9eDl-DpQ6AAL_8w1dwXmxb1Pau9REEc2BzKTy0lNFnCO69eTPe5BfJkJj5aXPYqueFkvQzxY7MbJnFqB07hjtJ2RX4tR56hr1ORsHTWOew==&c=C6ofHCmQi1Ypw1MN6_-jPK7oar2N8_ZJbTpEFLOX34iD2yO6SQviyA==&ch=vGpl8mCFl9sX3aYZ_qHzCmId1oolWhFlL3qf8Tc6tTSxWik55mXYWQ==)
---
| Thanks, as always, for your support.
Sincerely,
