subject: Biden’s Political Revenge at the Expense of Floridians
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5w6PrVh_lCLAGxruro8iSnBBcNXTzcB3ZGyj1t2w1cTmdIacoK-xy47uFf1BGjwVvMAoYm4gkI4Mntro-s-11xZbvZHw-QkLKg6vld2q93tgfS1Q9Exw-tjDrg7epRphpb5Uj3G8PRrOXVIEoDjISKd4ikdPR-8zM37hguB-eu3_gE2ymqx01f7Wmd_g0_o43P0bBHMZkDFF5gjex3enQB5zYRt7yXIbriBBzuYHSE=&c=gT9krtYPWd6lM0enSFnlzI9N9MeNvxj67WIVXZgdZpuI4uzOftHuWQ==&ch=egtacMjjSOrZFi_iE4xGHB-AwfmFJv83HhajfQexCWVrS3AF5o2YfQ==)
---
| Peter,
Floridians are now at the whims of a floundering, failing President's edicts.
Yesterday, without notice or a shred of data to back up this decision, Joe Biden pulled the rug out from under Florida and revoked the authorization of monoclonal antibody treatments - something that has saved tens of thousands of Floridians suffering from COVID. Biden's entire term as president has been one disaster after another. A border crisis that is raging, inflation that's skyrocketing and impacting millions of Americans and the list goes on... But, instead of addressing any one of the numerous problems he's created, he would rather focus his energy on stripping elderly Floridians - most of whom have been vaccinated - of their potentially life-saving treatments. The worst part is, this all could have been avoided if we had even a shred of competence from the White House. [HELP ME CONTINUE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5w6PrVh_lCLAGxruro8iSnBBcNXTzcB3ZGyj1t2w1cTmdIacoK-xy47uFf1BGjwVvMAoYm4gkI4Mntro-s-11xZbvZHw-QkLKg6vld2q93tgfS1Q9Exw-tjDrg7epRphpb5Uj3G8PRrOXVIEoDjISKd4ikdPR-8zM37hguB-eu3_gE2ymqx01f7Wmd_g0_o43P0bBHMZkDFF5gjex3enQB5zYRt7yXIbriBBzuYHSE=&c=gT9krtYPWd6lM0enSFnlzI9N9MeNvxj67WIVXZgdZpuI4uzOftHuWQ==&ch=egtacMjjSOrZFi_iE4xGHB-AwfmFJv83HhajfQexCWVrS3AF5o2YfQ==)
Instead, the arrogant, Beltway liberals in the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration and their hapless minions chose to blame the summer wave in the Sunbelt on people in our part of the country being uneducated, backwards yokels. This is despite the fact we've consistently been above the national average in vaccination rate. Biden has gone above and beyond to deny Florida access to lifesaving treatment. We could be saving tens of millions of dollars and thousands of lives, but Joe Biden would rather extract political revenge on Florida for our fierce protection of freedom. Peter, [please help me continue the fight against Joe Biden's medical authoritarianism. Chip in whatever you can so we can continue to fight back against their political attacks on the Sunshine State.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5w6PrVh_lCLAGxruro8iSnBBcNXTzcB3ZGyj1t2w1cTmdIacoK-xy47uFf1BGjwVvMAoYm4gkI4Mntro-s-11xZbvZHw-QkLKg6vld2q93tgfS1Q9Exw-tjDrg7epRphpb5Uj3G8PRrOXVIEoDjISKd4ikdPR-8zM37hguB-eu3_gE2ymqx01f7Wmd_g0_o43P0bBHMZkDFF5gjex3enQB5zYRt7yXIbriBBzuYHSE=&c=gT9krtYPWd6lM0enSFnlzI9N9MeNvxj67WIVXZgdZpuI4uzOftHuWQ==&ch=egtacMjjSOrZFi_iE4xGHB-AwfmFJv83HhajfQexCWVrS3AF5o2YfQ==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5w6PrVh_lCLAGxruro8iSnBBcNXTzcB3ZGyj1t2w1cTmdIacoK-xy47uFf1BGjwVvMAoYm4gkI4Mntro-s-11xZbvZHw-QkLKg6vld2q93tgfS1Q9Exw-tjDrg7epRphpb5Uj3G8PRrOXVIEoDjISKd4ikdPR-8zM37hguB-eu3_gE2ymqx01f7Wmd_g0_o43P0bBHMZkDFF5gjex3enQB5zYRt7yXIbriBBzuYHSE=&c=gT9krtYPWd6lM0enSFnlzI9N9MeNvxj67WIVXZgdZpuI4uzOftHuWQ==&ch=egtacMjjSOrZFi_iE4xGHB-AwfmFJv83HhajfQexCWVrS3AF5o2YfQ==) Thank you for your support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Why do they release criminals?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Gretchen Whitmer and her allies demonize law enforcement officers while taking a soft on crime approach. | | | |
---
| | | “Kalamazoo County deputy dies following police pursuit and shooting.”
– Aug 14, 2021 “...the man charged at police with a knife.” – Oct 1, 2021 “Two police officers have been shot in Genesee County during a ‘violent confrontation’ with a gunman...” – Dec 21, 2021 “An NYPD officer was killed and another seriously injured...” – Jan 22, 2022 “DC police officer rushed to hospital after getting shot.” – Jan 24, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

Headlines like those above are disturbing.

Every day the men and women of law enforcement put their lives on the line. We all know it comes with the job, and we accept that as part of our sworn duty to “preserve and protect.”

But in the past couple of years, _the targeted attacks on our men and women in blue have escalated due in part to the inflammatory rhetoric of politicians like Gretchen Whitmer_ and her allies who _demonize law enforcement officers_ while taking a soft on crime approach.

Last week liberal politicians used a study on disparity in police stops to further demonize law enforcement.

**I was the only candidate for Governor to back our men and women in law enforcement. Not one other candidate made a statement defending our police.**

Think about that.

When we have amplified calls to “defund the police” and a coordinated effort to let criminals go free, not one other Republican candidate stood up to back the blue.

That’s disheartening.

What’s more, in this state, we actually have prosecutors following the lead of their California counterparts in refusing to charge offenders with felonies.

The Ingham County prosecutor announced last year **she would “stop issuing charges for drugs, guns or other illegal weapons” and "limit" the number of felony firearm charges she authorizes.**

This is ludicrous.

If a law enforcement officer stops someone with an illegal gun and the prosecutor refuses to issue charges, that _puts another criminal with a gun back on the streets_ in our communities.

How is that good for the community?

In Washtenaw County, the prosecutor is _no longer seeking bail as a condition of release before trial_. No bail? Just walk free until trial?

Nuts.

By eliminating cash bail _these prosecutors are jeopardizing public safety_. When criminals are released with zero bail and they don’t show up for their trial, then what?

**These liberal pro-criminal policies are hurting our communities, and we’re seeing the results.**

In Lansing alone, right in the heart of Ingham County, **homicides increased 100%** from 2019 to 2021.

In Detroit, **violent offenses including aggravated assault were up 5%** in 2021 compared with 2020 and **rape was up 18%**.

It’s a similar story around the state.

Yet Democrat politicians want to just give a slap on the wrist and let these criminals skate. What are they thinking?

Peter, _this is very personal for me_. I’ve spent 33 years in law enforcement. I’ve seen the worst of the worst. There is no reason we should be putting our neighbors in potential jeopardy by releasing criminals like this.

**We need new leadership at the top – a new Governor who understands the issues surrounding public safety and who won’t cave in to the liberal “defund the police” mob.**

That’s why I’ve received the support of St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite and Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli. They understand the importance of having someone who understands public safety in the Governor’s office.

Please know that I stand with all of our officers, troopers, corrections officers, and first responders. They do an exemplary job under trying circumstances. We send them to the most violent cities to keep the peace and protect citizens.

_**Gretchen Whitmer has been a disaster for Michigan.**_ She has provided zero leadership on public safety issues, and instead has _marched in a “defund the police” rally_ and allowed her allies to _demonize law enforcement_.

She even ignored the issue of body cams for our officers for three years. It wasn’t until I called on the legislature to fund body cams for the MSP that Whitmer finally came around.

In these trying times we need genuine leadership in the Governor’s office. I’ve spent my career building high-performing teams to tackle the most difficult law enforcement challenges. It’s this type of leadership that is desperately needed in Lansing.

Do you agree?

If so, please join our campaign today. Volunteer, donate, endorse. We need all hands on deck.

A donation of $25, $50, $100 or more will help immensely. [Donate here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a5a49de305&e=0636b97700)

Are you able to volunteer? [Volunteer here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0655954247&e=0636b97700)

Are you able to publicly endorse me? [Endorse here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=71817a9dab&e=0636b97700)

Whatever you can do, know that it is _valuable and very much appreciated_.

Thank you. I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor.

clean_body: Gretchen Whitmer and her allies demonize law enforcement officers while taking a soft on crime approach. | | | | | | | “Kalamazoo County deputy dies following police pursuit and shooting.” – Aug 14, 2021 “...the man charged at police with a knife.” – Oct 1, 2021 “Two police officers have been shot in Genesee County during a ‘violent confrontation’ with a gunman...” – Dec 21, 2021 “An NYPD officer was killed and another seriously injured...” – Jan 22, 2022 “DC police officer rushed to hospital after getting shot.” – Jan 24, 2022 | | | | Peter: Headlines like those above are disturbing. Every day the men and women of law enforcement put their lives on the line. We all know it comes with the job, and we accept that as part of our sworn duty to “preserve and protect.” But in the past couple of years, the targeted attacks on our men and women in blue have escalated due in part to the inflammatory rhetoric of politicians like Gretchen Whitmer and her allies who demonize law enforcement officers while taking a soft on crime approach. Last week liberal politicians used a study on disparity in police stops to further demonize law enforcement. I was the only candidate for Governor to back our men and women in law enforcement. Not one other candidate made a statement defending our police. Think about that. When we have amplified calls to “defund the police” and a coordinated effort to let criminals go free, not one other Republican candidate stood up to back the blue. That’s disheartening. What’s more, in this state, we actually have prosecutors following the lead of their California counterparts in refusing to charge offenders with felonies. The Ingham County prosecutor announced last year she would “stop issuing charges for drugs, guns or other illegal weapons” and "limit" the number of felony firearm charges she authorizes. This is ludicrous. If a law enforcement officer stops someone with an illegal gun and the prosecutor refuses to issue charges, that puts another criminal with a gun back on the streets in our communities. How is that good for the community? In Washtenaw County, the prosecutor is no longer seeking bail as a condition of release before trial. No bail? Just walk free until trial? Nuts. By eliminating cash bail these prosecutors are jeopardizing public safety. When criminals are released with zero bail and they don’t show up for their trial, then what? These liberal pro-criminal policies are hurting our communities, and we’re seeing the results. In Lansing alone, right in the heart of Ingham County, homicides increased 100% from 2019 to 2021. In Detroit, violent offenses including aggravated assault were up 5% in 2021 compared with 2020 and rape was up 18%. It’s a similar story around the state. Yet Democrat politicians want to just give a slap on the wrist and let these criminals skate. What are they thinking? Peter, this is very personal for me. I’ve spent 33 years in law enforcement. I’ve seen the worst of the worst. There is no reason we should be putting our neighbors in potential jeopardy by releasing criminals like this. We need new leadership at the top – a new Governor who understands the issues surrounding public safety and who won’t cave in to the liberal “defund the police” mob. That’s why I’ve received the support of St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite and Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli. They understand the importance of having someone who understands public safety in the Governor’s office. Please know that I stand with all of our officers, troopers, corrections officers, and first responders. They do an exemplary job under trying circumstances. We send them to the most violent cities to keep the peace and protect citizens. Gretchen Whitmer has been a disaster for Michigan. She has provided zero leadership on public safety issues, and instead has marched in a “defund the police” rally and allowed her allies to demonize law enforcement. She even ignored the issue of body cams for our officers for three years. It wasn’t until I called on the legislature to fund body cams for the MSP that Whitmer finally came around. In these trying times we need genuine leadership in the Governor’s office. I’ve spent my career building high-performing teams to tackle the most difficult law enforcement challenges. It’s this type of leadership that is desperately needed in Lansing. Do you agree? If so, please join our campaign today. Volunteer, donate, endorse. We need all hands on deck. A donation of $25, $50, $100 or more will help immensely. Are you able to volunteer? Are you able to publicly endorse me? Whatever you can do, know that it is valuable and very much appreciated. Thank you. I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail. Michael Brown Republican for Governor. | | "DONATE TODAY. $10, $25, $50 OR MORE. name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: Big News! I’m running for re-election in 2022!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Dear Peter,
Today is a special day for two reasons.
The first reason is that today is my birthday! And this birthday is extra special because I have a special announcement that I am excited to share with you...
I am running for Re-election in Assembly District 18!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/reelection.jpg]My first 100+ days in Sacramento have flown by as I’ve been advocating for the East Bay. My policy focuses in 2022 will be reducing gun violence, promoting reproductive justice, and improving outcomes for California’s children by reducing childhood poverty, improving literacy rates, and ensuring our California’s public schools have the resources to serve our students. All of these issues are personal to me, and I’m eager to deliver results for my East Bay constituents and all of California.
I’m looking forward to seeing all of you around the East Bay as we continue the fight for equity and justice. We have a lot of work to do, but I know we can do this together!
Can you chip in $50 today to help us start this campaign strong?
Donate [https://secure.ngpvan.com/z60hl9BMYEaQSE1V-EQ9PA2]Don’t forget to stay connected with us on Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mia.bonta/] , Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/miabonta] , and on the website [https://www.miabonta.com] to stay up to date with the campaign!
Yours in Service,
Mia Bonta
Assemblymember, 18th District
#teamMia #themovementcontinues #Mia2022

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdlc0fgemiektnckv9ro9imf70kgk8uqoavha418_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9h60o36c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z865sh6fonjv1f4ef8s9cko51k4254ofqurcl4i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9h60o36c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs94grmnd6o8vmmc9te7c7gnkjj25veppb2v91hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9h60o36c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zuft3h29je4hq8cbbkmokp5au7m0o7n2q02ikse0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1mhdm8umfppumcoj7adcpcetninsoccorg37n08_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9h60o36c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Biden’s Political Revenge at the Expense of Floridians
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NlMhPMnPJEllmAsWVQaNygdA5IgdFWxDlx3DfE5x-3VmFnKHnQgAxK1WoZeUnXlsAx4mBSZwI-90psGPamqZQdKU10k8uOHdprvrzfOU6wxX9lLq_9YY5MIWi4aYrX5HslkqHcpsd_JCQSX5o8Wh3iRQQ75gusad4pZLdM6_-8tmPWY-UJ7-RqWZ9oOuWj1GBjweSyxrg4MlknDl7rLAKNnz0GcW9o868NzSIesOTAw=&c=HHYLLlPG0Nn9GhMIwNpn9Dzg7iV6Sf27fVFeFtQdTQPxzPG9GCKr5g==&ch=q_6i6AbcJtz4sqXHEMaVz8Oo3H7w8BTPFbJqWBopU5TNqn8sGjg8Lg==)

| Peter,
Floridians are now at the whims of a floundering, failing President's edicts.
Yesterday, without notice or a shred of data to back up this decision, Joe Biden pulled the rug out from under Florida and revoked the authorization of monoclonal antibody treatments - something that has saved tens of thousands of Floridians suffering from COVID. Biden's entire term as president has been one disaster after another. A border crisis that is raging, inflation that's skyrocketing and impacting millions of Americans and the list goes on... But, instead of addressing any one of the numerous problems he's created, he would rather focus his energy on stripping elderly Floridians - most of whom have been vaccinated - of their potentially life-saving treatments. The worst part is, this all could have been avoided if we had even a shred of competence from the White House. [HELP ME CONTINUE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NlMhPMnPJEllmAsWVQaNygdA5IgdFWxDlx3DfE5x-3VmFnKHnQgAxK1WoZeUnXlsAx4mBSZwI-90psGPamqZQdKU10k8uOHdprvrzfOU6wxX9lLq_9YY5MIWi4aYrX5HslkqHcpsd_JCQSX5o8Wh3iRQQ75gusad4pZLdM6_-8tmPWY-UJ7-RqWZ9oOuWj1GBjweSyxrg4MlknDl7rLAKNnz0GcW9o868NzSIesOTAw=&c=HHYLLlPG0Nn9GhMIwNpn9Dzg7iV6Sf27fVFeFtQdTQPxzPG9GCKr5g==&ch=q_6i6AbcJtz4sqXHEMaVz8Oo3H7w8BTPFbJqWBopU5TNqn8sGjg8Lg==)
Instead, the arrogant, Beltway liberals in the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration and their hapless minions chose to blame the summer wave in the Sunbelt on people in our part of the country being uneducated, backwards yokels. This is despite the fact we've consistently been above the national average in vaccination rate. Biden has gone above and beyond to deny Florida access to lifesaving treatment. We could be saving tens of millions of dollars and thousands of lives, but Joe Biden would rather extract political revenge on Florida for our fierce protection of freedom. Peter, [please help me continue the fight against Joe Biden's medical authoritarianism. Chip in whatever you can so we can continue to fight back against their political attacks on the Sunshine State.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NlMhPMnPJEllmAsWVQaNygdA5IgdFWxDlx3DfE5x-3VmFnKHnQgAxK1WoZeUnXlsAx4mBSZwI-90psGPamqZQdKU10k8uOHdprvrzfOU6wxX9lLq_9YY5MIWi4aYrX5HslkqHcpsd_JCQSX5o8Wh3iRQQ75gusad4pZLdM6_-8tmPWY-UJ7-RqWZ9oOuWj1GBjweSyxrg4MlknDl7rLAKNnz0GcW9o868NzSIesOTAw=&c=HHYLLlPG0Nn9GhMIwNpn9Dzg7iV6Sf27fVFeFtQdTQPxzPG9GCKr5g==&ch=q_6i6AbcJtz4sqXHEMaVz8Oo3H7w8BTPFbJqWBopU5TNqn8sGjg8Lg==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NlMhPMnPJEllmAsWVQaNygdA5IgdFWxDlx3DfE5x-3VmFnKHnQgAxK1WoZeUnXlsAx4mBSZwI-90psGPamqZQdKU10k8uOHdprvrzfOU6wxX9lLq_9YY5MIWi4aYrX5HslkqHcpsd_JCQSX5o8Wh3iRQQ75gusad4pZLdM6_-8tmPWY-UJ7-RqWZ9oOuWj1GBjweSyxrg4MlknDl7rLAKNnz0GcW9o868NzSIesOTAw=&c=HHYLLlPG0Nn9GhMIwNpn9Dzg7iV6Sf27fVFeFtQdTQPxzPG9GCKr5g==&ch=q_6i6AbcJtz4sqXHEMaVz8Oo3H7w8BTPFbJqWBopU5TNqn8sGjg8Lg==) Thank you for your support.

The worst part is, this all could have been avoided if we had even a shred of competence from the White House. == Instead, the arrogant, Beltway liberals in the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration and their hapless minions chose to blame the summer wave in the Sunbelt on people in our part of the country being uneducated, backwards yokels. This is despite the fact we've consistently been above the national average in vaccination rate. Biden has gone above and beyond to deny Florida access to lifesaving treatment. We could be saving tens of millions of dollars and thousands of lives, but Joe Biden would rather extract political revenge on Florida for our fierce protection of freedom. Peter, == == Thank you for your support. | | Ron DeSantis | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

body:
BREAKING: OLD MAN YELLS AT CLOUDS [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8495%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=m4szKKoMT4TY6BbCNS779A&sysid=1)
**BREAKING:****OLD MAN YELLS AT CLOUDS** Joe Biden constantly toes the line between complete incompetence and a lying politician _every time he opens his mouth._ In between bouts of incoherent rambling, Sleepy Joe’s message is clear: ignore everything you're experiencing first hand - everything is going great! **I don't need to tell you. Everything is NOT going great. Peter,

If someone asked you to guess who the top fundraiser among Senate Democrats is right now, how would you answer?

Would you guess Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer?

Perhaps a senator who has run for president like Bernie Sanders or Elizabeth Warren?

**If you guessed any of the three senators above, you'd be wrong.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=28cc42caf55b46dba9c9e2bc212e568b&_e=3rW4OJMize0wGtWgvmqRiR02kHQUScrIZg5A_exVXSOo6vtTO0n9npoy4eCLGWHdweEXsR5ZFOKDSfwZch2NpcI9MTYMcvKjyJSwKOHj1IfjB-pFDBZaC6kMrBi53z4eGML4F7cNkUXXF0oAlxtVH8NCGpl9GSJT_eh8ofDkAfQXASqF6ZyaPfQXW4xv-uXpj-MHfyXprC1QWlLN2r2r5zg-qN3PiiGIs0SPh4IkwHdlTrER5QnI2j4r8gIfQ223EHooeY4D2t6NfptdRl0MW6SyyPS6xKUAodXTqCxV46iVxKIVrQCBmxVM7xGgnYy4G2syEpEiYXUBP6JjHahYZkQSIrHfPg-38Lb-4k-kl_zp7PbmO3-HsB26yGU4b5pLnfuyykObgYGVJY6zvzjGvhKom_CdzFoJ_yxCjtsCo3kmrmLdpXQ2fwCm1OT59fiNpXDlHlxcUoiPsMhuezB35A%3D%3D)

clean_body: For less than the price of a Diet Coke or coffee, you can help us save our Republic from Democrats in Washington. For less than the price of a Diet Coke or coffee, you can help us save our Republic from Democrats in Washington. | Peter, If someone asked you to guess who the top fundraiser among Senate Democrats is right now, how would you answer? Would you guess Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer? Perhaps a senator who has run for president like Bernie Sanders or Elizabeth Warren? If you guessed any of the three senators above, you'd be wrong. The top fundraiser in the Senate - not just among Democrats but ALL candidates for either party - is our opponent in Georgia, Senator Raphael Warnock. In his first campaign in 2020, our opponent raised more than $150 MILLION dollars. He has an army of out-of-state donors that he has enlisted to help him raise millions once again this year. If this Senate contest is anything like the last one - which we fully expect it to be - our opponent will see an EVEN LARGER "avalanche of cash" headed his way. While our opponent has not yet announced his fundraising totals for the 4th quarter, his campaign brought in a record-setting $9 million from July through September. He already has more than $17.5 million cash in his campaign war chest to keep the Senate seat blue. We hope this gives you an idea as to what we're up against. We've never turned away from a challenge and don't intend to start now. Winning this Senate race is not going to be easy, but we can do it if we have the resources to communicate our message and build our campaign. Campaigns these days aren't won by a few people cutting massive checks; campaigns are won by thousands of grassroots conservatives taking a vested interest in a race and giving a few dollars each - just like we're asking you to do today. Think about it this way: $2.50 is a small price to pay to defend our great country from being torn to pieces by Democrats in Washington. Depending on where you live, $2.50 is even cheaper than buying a Diet Coke or cup of coffee. The polling shows this race is a dead heat, but we need your help to fully fund our campaign. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Note from Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086127/327273280/1660491306?refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_220126_1_1&refcode2=339081c5-d77e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkwODFjNS1kNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRw_2oWaT_4ivMvp07RPL1ZSMLZe5X2KgRigIoUTuuI=&emci=18981d75-d67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=339081c5-d77e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19214294)
---
| | Dear friends,

As you read this, I’m on my way to Ukraine with a bipartisan Congressional delegation to show support for that country as Russian forces threaten to invade it.

We are supporting Ukraine not just because it is a democracy, or because a war there would cause terrible loss of life, though those are reasons enough to care.

Most fundamentally, we are supporting Ukraine because ever since the Second World War, it has been America’s policy in the world to prevent dictators from changing borders with tanks, and to stop big countries from gobbling up small ones simply because they can.

That policy succeeded spectacularly. Yes, from Korea to Vietnam to Afghanistan, Americans have fought wars and faced dangers. But we have not had to live with the wars of aggression that were so common in the world before 1945, wars that killed millions, not thousands.

The relative peace we’ve enjoyed did not come about because human nature changed. It has been preserved in great measure by American leadership, in concert with our allies. We avoided conflict with the Soviet Union during the Cold War, and deterred the Soviets from invading Western Europe, by saying through NATO that an attack on any member of our alliance would be treated as an attack on us all. When the Cold War ended, we extended that defensive commitment to countries like Poland and Lithuania that had won their freedom from Soviet rule; we even said we were even open to Russia joining our alliance of democracies.

Today, Vladimir Putin says he is threatened by countries in eastern Europe getting closer to NATO. I think what really scares him is that several years ago, ordinary Ukrainians overthrew a corrupt authoritarian government very much like his, setting an example for his own people. What really drives him is the desire to reconstitute the old Soviet Union, to bring Ukraine, the Baltic States, Belarus, and other former Soviet republics back under Moscow’s control.

For this, he may be willing to start the first ever land war fought by two large, capable militaries armed with modern technology. Depending on how we respond, other countries with designs on their neighbors’ territory, like China, could emulate Putin.

President Biden has said, rightly, that we should not send the U.S. military to fight the Russians in Ukraine. No one wants to start World War III. But he has also been right to help the Ukrainians defend themselves, and to deploy US troops to shore up our treaty allies in the region. He has done a good job mobilizing our allies to impose massive economic sanctions on Russia should the invasion happen. I’ve been pushing for that myself — last year, I led the House in urging sanctions against the Putin cronies whose corruption was exposed by the incredibly brave Russian dissident, Alexei Navalny.

And yet, an invasion may still happen. If it does, we may feel some of the consequences at home. Putin may respond to our sanctions with cyberattacks on our critical infrastructure. Energy prices may rise. We have to be ready for this. And we have to stay united.

Fortunately, most Republicans and Democrats in Congress are still united in standing by Ukraine. But there are voices on the extreme right who echo the isolationists of the 1930s, and are trying to shatter this bipartisan consensus. On Fox News every night, Tucker Carlson says we should sympathize with Putin and appease his demands, and that Ukraine is not worth sacrificing anything for. Other right wing influencers are spreading outright Russian propaganda about global “elites” pushing America to war, even as Russia’s leader prepares to start that war. And we all remember our former president’s efforts to cozy up to Putin, while pulling our troops out of Europe. Russia does all it can to amplify this kind of thinking in our country.

That’s why it’s so important for leaders of both parties in America to explain why it is important for America to show strength and leadership against Russia’s threatened aggression. That’s why I’m showing up in Kiev this week with Republican and Democratic colleagues to say we stand with the good guys in this crisis.

Whatever I may think of Trump or my Republican colleagues may think of Biden, we need to convey that if this invasion happens, it won’t be the fault of any American president, but the fault of a Russian leader determined to extinguish a democracy and reconstitute an empire.

We must do all we can together to try to prevent that invasion. And if it happens, we must do all we can together to ensure that Russia emerges weaker, and that America and our allies emerge stronger and more united.

Thank you, and as always I’d welcome your thoughts.

Tom

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.
[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086128/327273281/-2036603538?amount=25&refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_220126_1_1&refcode2=339081c5-d77e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkwODFjNS1kNzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRw_2oWaT_4ivMvp07RPL1ZSMLZe5X2KgRigIoUTuuI=)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086230/327273719/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=)
Can I explain something, folks? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086231/327273720/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=) In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086232/327273721/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=) And it’s true, I had never run for office before. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086233/327273722/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=)
_Source: The New York Times_ But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086234/327273723/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=)
_Source: The Denver Post_ So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086235/327273724/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=) I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086236/327273725/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=)And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086237/327273726/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2YyODc0NC1kODdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWF4uiXWx54YVj819m_Tj-lGMBlzwHNzpQ6bgYU5Lc=) But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. clean_body: | = Can I explain something, folks? = In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. = And it’s true, I had never run for office before. = Source: The New York Times But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. = Source: The Denver Post So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. = I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.= But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear he has his sights set on Colorado. = To make matters worse, we’re behind our fundraising goal for the month. We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10 or more to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat? you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’m refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC or lobbyist money, so I mean it when I say I’m counting on your grassroots donation (and videos with Hick and his banjo) to fuel our campaign. = Thanks, Michael = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Carey?=
subject: Campaign Highlights!
body:
See some of the most recent endorsements... | | | |
---
| | |
#### **Highlights from the Campaign! **
This has been a fantastic month for Jay as he is being noticed, supported and endorsed across our district and the country.
The time is _now_ for a proven leader that wants to speak up for Western North Carolina
and protect our democracy.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Paul Dermid, former Marine, owner of Sawyer Springs Vineyard and previous candidate for Henderson County Sheriff, supports and endorses Jay and the mission to help our district. (top image)

Jay was noticed by Abe Gurko. Abe has always been committed to finding truth and humor in a world obsessed with celebrity and politics. He is an outspoken social media influencer that supports civil rights and candidates that he believes helps the cause.
[You can watch the interview on YouTube](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=a65870b858&e=9cbf9f5985).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
Former Combat Soldier, current Civil Rights Activist and social media influencer, [@USARMYOVERLORD](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=d7b2e9df2a&e=9cbf9f5985) has also endorsed Jay. You can find him on Instagram or TikTok.
|
---
| | [@Jolly_Good_Ginger](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=b26df2a07c&e=9cbf9f5985) is hosting a fundraiser on TikTok for Jay on Sunday, January 30th at 6pm EST. You can follow the Jolly Ginger across all platforms; he is one of the most recognized civil rights activists in our country right now and Jay is proud to have earned his endorsement.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
Jay made the list!
You can follow Jay and
other hopefuls on Twitter!
|
---
|
### The momentum is picking up!
Are you ready to share your support for Jay?
* Want a sticker or button? Reply to this email and we'll send one to you!
* [Sign-up to volunteer ](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=464fbf8a18&e=9cbf9f5985)if you haven't already.
* [Make a small contribution. ](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=35fe1d400b&e=9cbf9f5985)$10 means a lot.
* Share your support for Jay on social media!
* [Buy a shirt](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=5c7184389c&e=9cbf9f5985)!

We wanted to follow up on Dan’s recent email. Did you have a chance to take our important issue survey? As a leader in the Democratic Party, Dan works hard to make sure the agenda for The U.S. House matches what the people care about most.

**[Click here to take our priorities survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086544/327276037/224057635?emci=46387a48-cc00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d20cc26-da7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDIwY2MyNi1kYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0w3t2rQIR3t-4qb2HCyGx3YbA7Z799yyR1wT9902w8k=)** Read below to learn more.

**_Begin Forwarded Message_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086551/327276047/224057635?emci=46387a48-cc00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d20cc26-da7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDIwY2MyNi1kYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0w3t2rQIR3t-4qb2HCyGx3YbA7Z799yyR1wT9902w8k=) Welcome to the team!

Representing Michigan in Congress, I have fought hard to give a voice to working people who have felt silenced, stepped on, and overlooked. In my hometown of Flint, Michigan, I have seen first-hand the damage caused by callous politicians who choose to put profits ahead of people, only to turn a blind eye to those who need the most help in their communities.

**Sometimes it feels like Washington doesn’t listen to their constituents, but I am. Select an answer below to tell me what issues you care about most:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086555/327276051/224057635?emci=46387a48-cc00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d20cc26-da7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDIwY2MyNi1kYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0w3t2rQIR3t-4qb2HCyGx3YbA7Z799yyR1wT9902w8k=) Friend, I’m here to fight for you and for all Americans. Working together, we can fight for our positive, progressive agenda, protecting our democracy and defending our values no matter what comes our way.

I can’t do this without you. Thank you for joining the team.

Dan Kildee

_Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent Michigan’s Fifth District. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and as Heartland Engagement Chair, Dan's job is to protect and elect Democratic candidates. name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Why I'm Always Ready
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why I launched the my organization: Champion American Values (CAVPAC).
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ddhd--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46i-4qqlpo8/)
---
When I served in the Army’s Second Squadron, Seventh Cavalry Regiment, our motto was **“Always Ready.”** It embodied the spirit of our mission. At every moment of every day, we had to be prepared to do our job.

At a time when our core American values are under attack, it is important that conservative patriots are Always Ready to stand up for what is right. I’m doing everything I can to champion our American values, including launching an organization - CAVPAC - to help us advance the conservative agenda and elect more principled leaders all across the country.
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46j-4qqlpo9/)
---
I had the honor to serve our great nation as **President Trump’s Secretary of State**. Working alongside President Trump, we crafted policies that put America first. We stood up to China, Iran, North Korea and other rogue countries that pose a threat to Americans and our values.

But now, the radical Left is quickly undoing all our hard work and moving America in the WRONG direction. **Our values—the very values that I championed as an Army Cavalry Officer and as your Secretary of State— _are under attack_**.

I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why **I launched the my organization:[Champion American Values (CAVPAC)](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46k-4qqlpo0/ "Champion American Values \(CAVPAC\)")**.

**We’re devoted to flipping control of the House and the Senate back to Republicans and advancing the America First agenda**.

See, a lot of people talk about the America First agenda or what they would do. I’ve actually talked the talk and walked the walk. I’ve traveled the world as President Trump’s chief negotiator to champion our American values and stand up against rogue regimes that threaten our freedoms and way of life. I know what it takes to actually advance and defend our American values.

We can’t let up now and allow the Democrats to take our country in entirely the wrong direction. I know that I can count on proud patriots like you to help us Champion American Values. That’s why I’m reaching out -- _**[can I count on you to become a Gold Member in our CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46l-4qqlpo1/ "can I count on you to become a Founding Member?")?**_
---
**[<< Become a Gold Member >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46m-4qqlpo2/ "<< Become a Founding Member >>")**
We are only going to be successful at winning back control from the Democrats and saving our country if dedicated patriots like you join our cause. We can’t do it without you.

Do your part to protect our American values and to advance the America First agenda!

Always Ready,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46n-4qqlpo3/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46o-4qqlpo4/)
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46p-4qqlpo5/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ddhd-1v46q-4qqlpo6/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---

name: Dana Fritz
subject: Hey, will you take our 2022 Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
**The Governor’s race in Pennsylvania could decide the future of our democracy.** Pennsylvania is the most critical swing state in the country — and the path to the presidency in 2024 runs right through it. Republicans know that if they win this Governor’s race, they could rewrite the state’s electoral rules in their favor. With the stakes that high, this race will be a battle. Now, Election Day is around the corner — and we want to make sure that your voice is heard as we work on crafting a strategy to elect Josh Shapiro to be our next Governor and to keep Pennsylvania blue. **So we’re asking you to share your thoughts in our official 2022 Priorities Survey! Can you take just a minute to answer a few questions?** | [Please, begin the survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086962/327277583/1560463181?refcode=email_22_pawelcome2priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU5YjM4ZC1kYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GZTfrnnNagBZhMEK0j3lTHpMFBeiOP9ydWgq3dMZfb4=&emci=8447422b-147b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4f59b38d-da7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=21962291)
---
Josh fights every day to protect the right to vote because he knows how important it is for your voice to be heard — no matter who you are or where you come from.
And it’s important to him that you make your voice heard at the ballot box this year and as part of Josh’s campaign.
We want to build this campaign with input from supporters like you, which is why we’d be grateful if you could take a minute to share your thoughts.
[**Can you share your thoughts now in our 2022 Priorities Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41086963/327277584/1560463181?refcode=email_22_pawelcome2priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU5YjM4ZC1kYTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GZTfrnnNagBZhMEK0j3lTHpMFBeiOP9ydWgq3dMZfb4=&emci=8447422b-147b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4f59b38d-da7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=21962291)
Thanks,
Dana Fritz
Campaign Manager
Shapiro for Pennsylvania

| PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
---
Thank you for supporting Josh Shapiro's campaign to become the next governor of Pennsylvania. If you prefer to donate by check, you can mail your donation to:

Shapiro for Pennsylvania
PO Box 22635
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. name: Heidi St. John
subject: Now is the time
body:
Dear Peter,

It's long past time to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!

As the next Congresswoman representing
Southwest Washington, I will join efforts with those in the House
who've begun the efforts to IMPEACH BIDEN and remove him from
office for the following reasons:

*** He's blatantly ignoring our immigration
laws, leaving our border wide open;

*** He orchestrated the disaster in
Afghanistan;

*** He's attempted to impose illegal,
unconstitutional mandates on Americans and businesses; and,

*** The Biden family foreign dealings in
China and Ukraine.

My opponent, Jamie Beutler, voted to Impeach
President Trump ... but she hasn't lifted a finger when it comes
to Joe Biden.

It's time for her to go.

Please join me in this
effort to IMPEACH JOE by signing my petition below!

Thank you for your prayers, encouragement and
financial support!

For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress
www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com

I won't lie to you, it's not going to be easy.

We're fighting against the entire liberal machine - the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Friend.

This isn't a fair fight - they've got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left's tyrannical agenda, and we've never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can't do it without your help. You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21143756158a499d97c7b36cc4cd2808&_e=WndKNGLg0O9ss2tkqZ0zF3yneLXstfK_UL0fGaBM3fiwhfAZl9Ih-YPvoRCxEYFhHP0Lot_trUy7QzsCHU3eFhkezbuDRwqBEKr4KE1OQc52LtSJGjgwtPLNi6RqDK-64Y8t91P_1s4WgXrYP_z67FN6BFOyZ-zTt0gXwXramLB2wvxzzgtyib1ov0HxEXWbto-IA17DaKxa3T1cHnS05DnUu0r008ZDwLqpVwFi9LWBQ5-eKQRSVimNhPdjy87qFuF4lRah-yfPE54dtfjUQgwRtv_UFsD1ZrbioWS2kejNK40nYNl5FoiRSK7aU60sikqw80eKj-6zrOrb1CYTEAc7_WGP1ofBQ9NO9Djwj520UlEWApm89F_yw8wcnrZNYT2-VllfFSQtFAMuNXMYc0VHMPl9aqX6IvmgJvmezm9nq141yto4569E-5YgOVJHI3DhUFFZFuMRSPqU8yuXtSSN0FRZ1LLoM_F5dFWT0k5rMYQUXH921Upy45xyJDmsmHkqYGVnbY8-g7-mXnRVyZjAsVw1BpOT8t-DIUfD-jw%3D)

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Here’s where I stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087751/327280710/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220126eom1_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzc3YTc4Ni1kYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcZxWctPVDoxrss8OKczb-enfDoOuaHQJJrYJrXEpww=)
---
Hi there, We’re five months out from the Democratic primary election in this race for PA-01, and **less than a week away from our next end-of-month fundraising deadline.** I know that you probably get a lot of fundraising emails, so I wanted to make sure that you know where I stand on the issues — and most importantly, where I differ from Republican Brian Fitzpatrick. **[Before I do, will you pitch in $10 or more to help us reach our January goal and build the resources necessary to prepare for the primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087752/327280711/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220126eom1_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzc3YTc4Ni1kYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcZxWctPVDoxrss8OKczb-enfDoOuaHQJJrYJrXEpww=)** I**n Congress, I aim to prioritize the following issues:**
* **Defending democracy at all costs:** As a combat veteran and as an American, I will fight tooth and nail to defend our voting rights and democracy from the increasingly extreme Republican Party. I fully support the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act, and unlike Fitzpatrick, I will ‘defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.’
* **Comprehensive Healthcare:** I support expanding the Affordable Care Act and giving Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices and cap prescription drug costs for seniors. As a fierce advocate for reproductive choice, I will vote for the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify Roe v. Wade into law. I will also pursue every avenue to address the deadly opioid crisis, and work with my Republican colleagues across the aisle to find compassionate solutions for this epidemic that has ravaged our communities.
* **The Environment:** Climate change is not just an environmental problem – it is a threat to our national security. In Congress, I will support efforts to combat climate change, including supporting the Paris Climate Accord and legislation that will reduce carbon emissions and keep our natural resources, our lands, and our national parks clean and safe. I’ll do this while working to build climate-resilient infrastructure, create good-paying jobs, and ensure our communities have clean air and water.
* **Our vulnerable populations:** seniors, veterans, working class families: I will defend Social Security, prevent dangerous cuts to Medicare, fight for more funding for veteran services, and support more affordable childcare and paid family leave. And I will hold corporations' feet to the fire to pay their fair share in taxes, just like the rest of us.

I believe we can achieve this together, if we flip this seat blue in November and send Fitzpatrick packing. **[But the only way we get there is by reaching our goals along the way and winning this May’s primary. Help me do it by making a grassroots donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087753/327280713/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220126eom1_ae_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzc3YTc4Ni1kYzdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcZxWctPVDoxrss8OKczb-enfDoOuaHQJJrYJrXEpww=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hi there, We’re five months out from the Democratic primary election in this race for PA-01, and less than a week away from our next end-of-month fundraising deadline. I know that you probably get a lot of fundraising emails, so I wanted to make sure that you know where I stand on the issues — and most importantly, where I differ from Republican Brian Fitzpatrick. = In Congress, I aim to prioritize the following issues: Defending democracy at all costs: As a combat veteran and as an American, I will fight tooth and nail to defend our voting rights and democracy from the increasingly extreme Republican Party. I fully support the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act, and unlike Fitzpatrick, I will ‘defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.’ Comprehensive Healthcare: I support expanding the Affordable Care Act and giving Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices and cap prescription drug costs for seniors. As a fierce advocate for reproductive choice, I will vote for the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify Roe v. Wade into law. I will also pursue every avenue to address the deadly opioid crisis, and work with my Republican colleagues across the aisle to find compassionate solutions for this epidemic that has ravaged our communities. The Environment: Climate change is not just an environmental problem – it is a threat to our national security. In Congress, I will support efforts to combat climate change, including supporting the Paris Climate Accord and legislation that will reduce carbon emissions and keep our natural resources, our lands, and our national parks clean and safe. I’ll do this while working to build climate-resilient infrastructure, create good-paying jobs, and ensure our communities have clean air and water. Our vulnerable populations: seniors, veterans, working class families: I will defend Social Security, prevent dangerous cuts to Medicare, fight for more funding for veteran services, and support more affordable childcare and paid family leave. And I will hold corporations' feet to the fire to pay their fair share in taxes, just like the rest of us. I believe we can achieve this together, if we flip this seat blue in November and send Fitzpatrick packing. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for everything you do, Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. subject: 5️⃣ Reasons Why You Should Attend Congress of Counties
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We're just 30 days away from... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/5-reasons-why-you-should-attend-congress-of-counties?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_5 Reasons Why You Should Attend the 2022 Congress of Counties_**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We're just **30 days** away from the 2022 Congress of Counties—our **ultimate** , two-day training event for **Republicans** being held at the _**historic**_ French Lick Resort in French Lick, Ind.

**__General admission is going fast, and the deadline to reserve your room in our special rate room block is quickly approaching on Friday, February 4!__**

If you're unsure about attending, here are five quick reasons you should register _**NOW** : _
1. You'll hear from some of the _**top insiders**_ on a variety of topics like campaign fundraising, data analytics, and social media.

2. You'll have the opportunity to network with **hundreds** of dedicated Republicans _just like you_ from across the state.

3. You'll be able to visit with **vendors** , multiple statewide **elected officials** , and **candidates** seeking the Republican nomination at this year's _state convention_.

4. You'll hear from **Todd Young** on _everything he's doing_ to advance **Republican priorities** and turn the Senate **RED**.

5. You'll be able to hear about **election integrity operations** and what's being done to keep Indiana's elections _fair, transparent, and secure_.

Hoosier Republican—you won't want to miss out on this**ultimate** event.
_**Click below to reserve your spot before time runs out!**_

---
| [RESERVE YOUR SPOT](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e891260461&e=1acd9bb3d6 "RESERVE YOUR SPOT")
---
| [VIEW THE TENTATIVE AGENDA](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fed422633e&e=1acd9bb3d6 "VIEW THE TENTATIVE AGENDA")
---
| **P.S. **To reserve your room at a special rate call the French Lick Resort directly at 1-888-936-9360. You must inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties when making your reservation in order to receive the special rate. Our group code is _**0222IRP**_.

**Friday, February 4, 2022, is quickly approaching****—reserve your room _NOW!_**

|

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw the news
#

We wanted to make sure you saw Nina’s big announcement earlier today.
**[Take a minute to read it below, and then please make a contribution to our people-powered campaign to send Nina Turner to Congress>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087846/327281140/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087847/327281141/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)
It is so important that we start strong – and the ONLY way we are going to have the resources to win is from lots and lots of people like you chipping in.
Thank you!
\- Team Nina Turner

* * *

Hello Somebody!
I have some HUGE news that I want to share directly with you: _**I'm running for Congress in 2022.**_
**[Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor to our campaign? We’re not taking money from special interests or corrupt Super PACs, but that means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and WIN.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087848/327281142/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087849/327281143/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)
Cleveland needs a change maker — not someone who’s only in Washington to go along and get along.
Cleveland deserves a representative that understands that health care is a human right that’s been denied to millions of Americans for far too long and will fight for Medicare for All.
A representative who knows poverty is a policy choice and the minimum wage must be raised to a living wage of AT LEAST $15 per hour.
A representative who has served on the front lines of the fight for criminal justice reform and voting rights — not for days, _but for decades_.
And a representative with a record of speaking truth to power and unapologetically fighting for working people.
Because here’s the truth: We can get an agenda through Congress that puts working families first. _And that is something worth fighting for._
**I’m committed to this fight, but I cannot do it alone. The ONLY way our campaign is going to be able to take on the powerful special interests and Super PACs that are going to organize against us is with a massive grassroots movement of folks like you.**
**[Can you make a contribution today and become a Founding Donor of our campaign? We’re counting on lots and lots of small contributions to fund this campaign, so anything you can afford to give makes a BIG difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087850/327281144/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)**
All of the great social justice advances that we ever had in this country have come not from people with big titles and not from people at the top, but from everyday people getting together and saying _'Enough is enough. I'm going to change this, and I'm going to get involved, and I am going to be engaged.'_
That is what we are trying to do here on this campaign. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being a part of it.
With these hands,
Nina Turner
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41087851/327281145/266347467?refcode2=8f51513d-dd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjUxNTEzZC1kZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fxJjwe_XPNJQs1oKY3BWSn1JuuUyKbVbwTFqG59zPJI=)

name: Michele Rayner
subject: The first #RaynerRundown of 2022!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELE FOR FLORIDA
body:
Hi Peter,

This is our first #RaynerRundown of 2022 – how exciting!

But you want to know what’s not so exciting? Republicans.

We might be in a new year but Republicans are pulling the same, old, tired stunts. From waging a war on women and abortion access to attacking foundations of our democracy through voting restrictions, really and truly, enough is enough.

And to top it all off, Florida’s own Ron DeSantis recently rolled out his own congressional map proposal – unrequested, of course.

First and foremost – it’s not the governor’s job to do so, and frankly, no governor has done this. To no surprise, these maps lack minority access districts, which would lead to a lack of Black and brown representation throughout the state.

This goes to show that DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians at all. All he cares about is advancing his own political status and has no regard for the people he’s supposed to be serving and fighting for.

Peter, this is one of the many reasons why I’m running. We cannot keep letting these politicians play their games when our rights are at stake. When our bodily autonomy is at stake. When our democracy is at stake. When our education is at stake.

Do I need to go on?

We’ve got a long fight ahead of us, but I’ve got no doubt in my mind that we’ll achieve it and see this people-powered campaign through.

In solidarity,

Michele

name: Rep. Pramila Jayapal
subject: [RSVP] Will you join me and Rev. Yearwood with Team Evergreen tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It's not too late to RSVP for tomorrow's event.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4269?t=2&akid=12938%2E53494%2EreJx3j) Friend, Tomorrow, I'll have the honor of (virtually) sitting down with Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr. and Jamal Raad of Evergreen Action to discuss the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act—and I want you to join us. [**_RSVP now for the latest edition of Policy + Pints, airing live tomorrow, Thursday 1/27 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4269?t=3&akid=12938%2E53494%2EreJx3j) | [RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4269?t=4&akid=12938%2E53494%2EreJx3j)
---
As Chairwoman of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, I have been working with my House colleagues on this bill for the better part of a year. I have heard the rallying cry of climate activists like you, and I have brought that energy with me to Congress every day, to make sure we don't miss this moment. While my chamber has done their part and passed the BBBA, which includes the largest climate investments in U.S. history, we need the Senate and President Biden to finish the job. Now.
And that's exactly what we'll be talking about tomorrow. Jamal, Rev. Yearwood, and I will discuss why this bill is so transformative, its future, and why passing these climate investments is our only option.
I really hope you'll join us because this conversation couldn't be more timely. There's more momentum behind passing climate investments than ever, and we have to be ready to strike while the iron is hot.
[**_RSVP now to join us for Policy + Pints tomorrow at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4269?t=5&akid=12938%2E53494%2EreJx3j)
See you tomorrow,
Representative Pramila Jayapal (WA-07)
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4269?t=6&akid=12938%2E53494%2EreJx3j)
---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We need driven leaders like Deb McGrath in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q81dvv7-AA8X0ONmz9l1f8sNFceYzwrkkcs1cXokD9c=/KAuPK2ZYej6c9y8WRCOfFKxgFbx1kuwU8twC_u3fvbw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220126-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

This week, I was proud to endorse my friend, Deb McGrath, in her campaign to win Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District. We need service-minded leaders like her in the House, [_**and I hope you 'll support both our campaigns by splitting a contribution today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q81dvv7-AA8X0ONmz9l1f8sNFceYzwrkkcs1cXokD9c=/bGkcC9xE_kYTvHPT7s82ajPc3axXKVdm8yfNjZhmCL4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220126-1-EM&amount=25)

---
Like me, Deb's a former CIA officer. She has truly devoted her life to service, from her years in the Army to her tours abroad with the CIA to her current campaign for Congress, Deb has always remained steadfast and mission-focused in her support of our country.

We need Deb's experience in Congress as we work to protect our democracy and deliver real results for the American people - from Virginia to Wisconsin and everywhere across our country. **To keep the majority in Congress, we must win Deb 's district and hold my seat. I know what it takes to win tough races, and Deb will do it!**

Abigail

As 2021 wrapped up, we ended the year with _incredible_ fundraising numbers thanks to all of you!

As the support for our campaign continues to grow, I am extremely grateful and motivated by all who invest in our vision of the American Dream - **THANK YOU**!

_**Let's take back AZ-06! **_

Juan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: I'm running for the people.
body:
Support the movement for change. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b83d7c07cf6f/im-running-for-the-people?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c147fe28ce&e=339f142c50)
---
|
# I'm running for the people

**This video shows you who I am. I love my runs down 79th street--I call it the 9.** I turn right down 79th and Wabash and pass by Taylor Funeral Home, that's where my day begins. I love the beams of the sun on my face. I remember hating the sun when I was young because I was teased because I was so dark, but now I love the sun and feel comfortable running towards it.

As I'm jogging, I pass the methodone clinic that I still can't believe is next to a school. As I'm jogging, I throw up the peace sign to all the police officers and bus drivers and make it a point to say hi to everybody. I say hi to the people in the window of the JR cocktail bar that opens at 7am--I guess it's for the people who just got off the third shift. For them it's really 10pm, I'm not mad at them. I pass Happy's Liquors on 79th and Cottage, and that's when I hit 1 mile. I start to smell everyone's barbecue because you know people are always cooking on 79th.

As I pass Whitney Young Library, I remember that I used to give speeches as a young activist to the library staff because no one showed up at first. The branch manager made his employees attend, I love him for that. Every time I pass Captain Hard Times I think of the time we fed homeless people, and once we welcomed 30 Africans from 30 different countries in Africa and fed them chicken & waffles. I pass where Chatham Foods used to be and think of the times I sold my books in the store and the owner didn't charge. I set up a table in the store. It was such a blessing. Then I pass the fire station and that's my final sprint.

**I love Chatham because Chatham isn't a community, Chatham is a state of mind.** Keep following my journey because you're going to see me running in every part of the First District. Join the movement. Make a [donation](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=179c89a356&e=339f142c50) or sign up to [volunteer](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c314b87472&e=339f142c50).

Yours in service,
Jahmal
