I remember hating the sun when I was young because I was teased because I was so dark, but now I love the sun and feel comfortable running towards it. As I'm jogging, I pass the methodone clinic that I still can't believe is next to a school. As I'm jogging, I throw up the peace sign to all the police officers and bus drivers and make it a point to say hi to everybody. I say hi to the people in the window of the JR cocktail bar that opens at 7am--I guess it's for the people who just got off the third shift. For them it's really 10pm, I'm not mad at them. I pass Happy's Liquors on 79th and Cottage, and that's when I hit 1 mile. I start to smell everyone's barbecue because you know people are always cooking on 79th. As I pass Whitney Young Library, I remember that I used to give speeches as a young activist to the library staff because no one showed up at first. The branch manager made his employees attend, I love him for that. Every time I pass Captain Hard Times I think of the time we fed homeless people, and once we welcomed 30 Africans from 30 different countries in Africa and fed them chicken & waffles. I pass where Chatham Foods used to be and think of the times I sold my books in the store and the owner didn't charge. I set up a table in the store. It was such a blessing. Then I pass the fire station and that's my final sprint. I love Chatham because Chatham isn't a community, Chatham is a state of mind. Keep following my journey because you're going to see me running in every part of the First District. Join the movement. Make a or sign up to . Yours in service, Jahmal | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

name: Reed Powell
subject: Timothy Barr for Congress Needs Your Help!
body:
Hello, my name is Reed Powell. I have just recently come aboard Timothy Barr’s congressional campaign as his campaign manager. One of the very first things I am doing in this new role is recruiting a team of conservatives who are committed to ensuring our Tenth District is represented by a man of faith, a fighter for liberty, and a principled conservative who will represent our values in Washington and stand in the gap against socialism and the left wing radicalism bent on destroying our country. That is why both Congressman Jody Hice and Congressman Andrew Clyde have endorsed Timothy Barr, and why we need all the help we can get.
Your contact information was submitted via our website and I am reaching out to ask if you are interested in helping our campaign. This race will require the work of countless individuals. I am humbly asking for your support and assistance with our campaign. If you know of anyone else who would be interested in getting involved (or any high school or college student looking for an internship), we would sincerely appreciate all the help we can get. We will be very flexible to accommodate schedules and will have the utmost gratitude for any help we can get.
If you are interested in getting involved, please reach out to me at [reed@votebarr.com](mailto:reed@votebarr.com) and we would love to have you on Team Barr. Our campaign office is located in Watkinsville, and we are very excited for what the next few months have in store. We would love for you to join us.
On behalf of Team Barr, we are wishing you a blessed day and we hope we can count on your support.

\--
**Reed Powell** | Campaign Manager
Timothy Barr for Congress
[reed@votebarr.com](mailto:reed@votebarr.com) | (405) 479-2903

name: Conservative Direct
subject: 'Crimes against humanity': Liberal journalist SOUNDS OFF on Fauci, CDC, Biden admin for 'serious failings' in COVID response
body:
[rebelmouse-proxy-image https://media.rbl.ms/image?u=%2FeyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYXNzZXRzLnJibC5tcy8yOTEzNTcyNC9vcmlnaW4ucG5nIiwiZXhwaXJlc19hdCI6MTcwMTg4NDE1N30.tZh9qK7tuHsZ7bJIiGy2TW7NcPQMdg06K63tBHxVs7k%2Fimg.png%3Fwidth%3D1245%26coordinates%3D4%2C0%2C0%2C0%26height%3D700&ho=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.rebelmouse.io&s=975&h=a06de4ca2c57b7300e17cf8a8d31d705d5f9bdedce19ae617e79804fa12df669&size=980x&c=1941214326 crop_info="%7B%22image%22%3A%20%22https%3A//media.rbl.ms/image%3Fu%3D%252FeyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYXNzZXRzLnJibC5tcy8yOTEzNTcyNC9vcmlnaW4ucG5nIiwiZXhwaXJlc19hdCI6MTcwMTg4NDE1N30.tZh9qK7tuHsZ7bJIiGy2TW7NcPQMdg06K63tBHxVs7k%252Fimg.png%253Fwidth%253D1245%2526coordinates%253D4%252C0%252C0%252C0%2526height%253D700%26ho%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fassets.rebelmouse.io%26s%3D975%26h%3Da06de4ca2c57b7300e17cf8a8d31d705d5f9bdedce19ae617e79804fa12df669%26size%3D980x%26c%3D1941214326%22%7D" expand=1] Journalist and radio host Kim Iversen — the self-described liberal who recently went out on a limb to say the so-called right-wing conspiracy theory known as "The Great Reset" is both very real and very concerning — sounded off about the government's COVID-19 response two years into the pandemic. "I'm angry. I'm not gonna lie. I'm really, really angry right now, so I'm just gonna do a little rant to get this off my chest," began Iverson on The Hill's "Rising." Noting that the Omicron COVID variant is indiscriminately spreading "like wildfire," infecting as many as 800,000 people per day regardless of vaccination status, Iverson called out the "serious, serious failings by our public health officials, the CDC, Fauci, our politicians, and the mainstream media," which she have risen to the "level of crimes against humanity." "The scientists and health experts, the people responsible for guiding us safely and scientifically through this pandemic, have been hyper-focused on vaccines," Iverson continued. "Throughout this entire time, which is now at two years in, they've never focused on, and often ... even shut down discussion surrounding the well-known scientific principle of natural immunity. They shut down and even demonized any discussion of potential early treatments. And they failed to give us good instructions on what to do when our loved ones or we ourselves catch COVID. "They flat out refused to focus on any of this. They instead swore if we all got the vaccine, the pandemic would end. Well, it didn't end. Everyone is catching COVID. People who got double vaxxed, and triple vaxxed, and wore double masks, and kept their kids out of school, and gave up Christmas with family, and even worse, gave up being with their loved ones by their side as they breathed their last breaths because they weren't allowed to be next to them, are catching COVID," she added. Iverson went on to blast those in power for failing to provide, and in many cases intentionally suppressing, information about natural immunity that would help people know whether or not those who have recovered from COVID can safely care for loved ones who are now ill. Instead, they have frightened people and demonized honest attempts to discuss or research many methods of early treatments that could give people with COVID a fighting chance. "Treatment[s] that seemed to work [have] been suppressed in the vaccine-or-bust movement. Yet here we are, people are fully vaccinated, even boosted, are sick in bed, scared, and the best weapon our public health officials have given them against COVID is what? Nyquil?" she said. "Millions of people are getting sick right now with no real idea of what to do except get your free tests from Biden and hope they come back negative. This lack of basic research and information on who is safest in our families to care for others, what treatment to give them when they're sick, and how to care for them to give them the best fighting chance, is in my book a crime. These are health officials, they're scientists, they're doctors, they shouldn't be telling us to just hunker down and hope we never catch it. We need more information. They haven't given it to us and, worse, they've demonized any discussion of it." Disclaimer: The content of this clip does not provide medical advice. Please seek the advice of local health officials for any COVID-19 and/or COVID vaccine related questions & concerns. -- [rebelmouse-proxy-image https://media.rbl.ms/image?u=%2FeyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYXNzZXRzLnJibC5tcy8yOTEzNTcyNC9vcmlnaW4ucG5nIiwiZXhwaXJlc19hdCI6MTcwMTg4NDE1N30.tZh9qK7tuHsZ7bJIiGy2TW7NcPQMdg06K63tBHxVs7k%2Fimg.png%3Fwidth%3D1245%26coordinates%3D4%2C0%2C0%2C0%26height%3D700&ho=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.rebelmouse.io&s=975&h=a06de4ca2c57b7300e17cf8a8d31d705d5f9bdedce19ae617e79804fa12df669&size=980x&c=1941214326 crop_info="%7B%22image%22%3A%20%22https%3A//media.rbl.ms/image%3Fu%3D%252FeyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYXNzZXRzLnJibC5tcy8yOTEzNTcyNC9vcmlnaW4ucG5nIiwiZXhwaXJlc19hdCI6MTcwMTg4NDE1N30.tZh9qK7tuHsZ7bJIiGy2TW7NcPQMdg06K63tBHxVs7k%252Fimg.png%253Fwidth%253D1245%2526coordinates%253D4%252C0%252C0%252C0%2526height%253D700%26ho%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fassets.rebelmouse.io%26s%3D975%26h%3Da06de4ca2c57b7300e17cf8a8d31d705d5f9bdedce19ae617e79804fa12df669%26size%3D980x%26c%3D1941214326%22%7D" expand=1] Journalist and radio host Kim Iversen — the self-described liberal who recently went out on a limb to say the so-called right-wing conspiracy theory known as "The Great Reset" is both very real and very concerning — sounded off about the government's COVID-19 response two years into the pandemic. clean_body: [rebelmouse-proxy-image cropinfo="%7B%22image%22%3A%20%22https%3A//media.rbl.ms/image%3Fu%3D%252FeyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpbWFnZSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYXNzZXRzLnJibC5tcy8yOTEzNTcyNC9vcmlnaW4ucG5nIiwiZXhwaXJlc19hdCI6MTcwMTg4NDE1N30.tZh9qK7tuHsZ7bJIiGy2TW7NcPQMdg06K63tBHxVs7k%252Fimg.png%253Fwidth%253D1245%2526coordinates%253D4%252C0%252C0%252C0%2526height%253D700%26ho%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fassets.rebelmouse.io%26s%3D975%26h%3Da06de4ca2c57b7300e17cf8a8d31d705d5f9bdedce19ae617e79804fa12df669%26size%3D980x%26c%3D1941214326%22%7D" expand=1] Journalist and radio host Kim Iversen — the self-described liberal who recently went out on a limb to say the so-called right-wing conspiracy theory known as "The Great Reset" is both very real and very concerning — sounded off about the government's COVID-19 response two years into the pandemic. "I'm angry. I'm not gonna lie. I'm really, really angry right now, so I'm just gonna do a little rant to get this off my chest," began Iverson on The Hill's "Rising." Noting that the Omicron COVID variant is indiscriminately spreading "like wildfire," infecting as many as 800,000 people per day regardless of vaccination status, Iverson called out the "serious, serious failings by our public health officials, the CDC, Fauci, our politicians, and the mainstream media," which she have risen to the "level of crimes against humanity." "The scientists and health experts, the people responsible for guiding us safely and scientifically through this pandemic, have been hyper-focused on vaccines," Iverson continued. "Throughout this entire time, which is now at two years in, they've never focused on, and often ... even shut down discussion surrounding the well-known scientific principle of natural immunity. They shut down and even demonized any discussion of potential early treatments. And they failed to give us good instructions on what to do when our loved ones or we ourselves catch COVID. "They flat out refused to focus on any of this. They instead swore if we all got the vaccine, the pandemic would end. Well, it didn't end. Everyone is catching COVID. People who got double vaxxed, and triple vaxxed, and wore double masks, and kept their kids out of school, and gave up Christmas with family, and even worse, gave up being with their loved ones by their side as they breathed their last breaths because they weren't allowed to be next to them, are catching COVID," she added. Iverson went on to blast those in power for failing to provide, and in many cases intentionally suppressing, information about natural immunity that would help people know whether or not those who have recovered from COVID can safely care for loved ones who are now ill. Instead, they have frightened people and demonized honest attempts to discuss or research many methods of early treatments that could give people with COVID a fighting chance. "Treatment[s] that seemed to work [have] been suppressed in the vaccine-or-bust movement. Yet here we are, people are fully vaccinated, even boosted, are sick in bed, scared, and the best weapon our public health officials have given them against COVID is what? Nyquil?" she said. "Millions of people are getting sick right now with no real idea of what to do except get your free tests from Biden and hope they come back negative. This lack of basic research and information on who is safest in our families to care for others, what treatment to give them when they're sick, and how to care for them to give them the best fighting chance, is in my book a crime. These are health officials, they're scientists, they're doctors, they shouldn't be telling us to just hunker down and hope we never catch it. We need more information. They haven't given it to us and, worse, they've demonized any discussion of it." Disclaimer: The content of this clip does not provide medical advice. The road to a Republican majority in the House runs straight through New Mexico’s second district, Fellow Conservative.

[**I am calling on every valuable member of the America First conservative movement to help me ease my fundraising burden and fight to defend this seat starting NOW.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=32cc60933da74be2951e8bdc093961a5&_e=zja_EQn7N3hsBgUO9IzNHfSJdQQZ9u8CQT_7hPzvrHJArlo-wEyj_OFZLaQ8mMUVmN9PKfBqtARhyVlgfZzTlCL3uWQS3Q09fDk-tEKa7m0i-_xfE27G4145vO0tSzOO7NPyyTWBiCtzKIWK19H5jTlyiTyCGtG5coVJLQQLDrNd9rKjR1Q8dXOjmOoq68kxLRLpRNcifj7GGG95Sm5aSPY5yKTtSgu-MfxWGCGIm6Ot_pQLX2OyHL8_mC3etNQyx0k2pr04zuw3orB3o6czPGc1X8TLkS_4UASS-ePTs1K2ddOnTol949AG-dyAZI5iJfNwmQY5ZBD5dd8LVpbbEdJJxbwxtS1M4SksE2hBNJJbSwZ_cXmPyOlE6IjibB0txvY_2BLOh0HceETMIDeBdaKJ1YhGNRwRgjyZX31nvH2JUoCqqnVrSOHqv4LARt6l)

name: Never Again PAC
subject: The night before the travel ban
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Long before he became president, Donald Trump had a history of racism and ignorance. We saw it again in 2017 when he signed an executive order banning Muslims from entering the United States. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41089367/327290269/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZTJmZDhkLWUzN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pk-NhDYek5lfxoWYut7BHbNVd-DqnRVfmeoY3RuX0mQ=&emci=1a69cff3-b47e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=20e2fd8d-e37e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16335001) The signs were there, team.

Long before he became president, Donald Trump had a history of racism and ignorance. **We saw it again in 2017 when he signed an executive order banning Muslims from entering the United States.**

On the night before the anniversary of the Muslim travel ban, it's time to fight back and make sure we defeat the officials who allow hate to become the law of the land. Immigrants make our country stronger, and we must not let our nation be ruled by fear.

**[Will you help us defeat the racist, anti-American Treason Caucus by chipping in $5 or more to help elect leaders who will fight for commonsense immigration reform? Chip in now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41089375/327290279/516199846?refcode=em22_220126_EOM1TB_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_EOM1TB_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZTJmZDhkLWUzN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pk-NhDYek5lfxoWYut7BHbNVd-DqnRVfmeoY3RuX0mQ=)**

Donald Trump and the members of the Treason Caucus have a long track record of racist and anti-Muslim comments that continue to this day:
* **December 7, 2015 - Donald Trump's campaign: **"Donald J. Trump is calling for a total and complete shutdown of Muslims entering the United States until our country's representatives can figure out what is going on."
* **March 9, 2016 - Donald Trump:** "I think Islam hates us. There's something there that — there's a tremendous hatred there. There's a tremendous hatred. We have to get to the bottom of it. There's an unbelievable hatred of us."
* **November 18, 2021 - Lauren Boebert,** in addressing Rep. Ilhan Omar: "The Jihad Squad member from Minnesota has paid her husband, and not her brother husband, the other one, over a million dollars in campaign funds."

Though Donald Trump lost the 2020 election, too many of his followers in the Treason Caucus remain in power and continue to support backward, racist policies that only serve to undermine our democracy.

**[Will you give your support today and donate $5, or even $10 to help us unseat the members of the Treason Caucus and stop them from enacting backward policies?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41089376/327290283/516199846?refcode=em22_220126_EOM1TB_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_EOM1TB_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZTJmZDhkLWUzN2UtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pk-NhDYek5lfxoWYut7BHbNVd-DqnRVfmeoY3RuX0mQ=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. name: Team Schmidt
subject: 🚨 Breaking News from Newt Gringrich 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We have big news to share with you: Newt Gingrich has endorsed Derek Schmidt in the race for Governor of Kansas! Friend, We have big news to share with you: **Newt Gingrich has endorsed Derek Schmidt in the race for Governor of Kansas! ** _"As Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has been Kansas' strongest voice for liberty, the right to life and the conservative principles that make America great. When Laura Kelly shut down churches on Easter, closed schools and called CRT a 'nothingburger,' Derek Schmidt stood up and fought back. As Governor, Derek will put parents in control of their children’s education and health decisions, create a climate of opportunity for small business and jobs, and always put Kansans and their constitutional rights first in every decision he makes. He will make Kansans proud as Governor, and has my endorsement and full support."_ **_– Newt Gingrich, Former U.S. Speaker of the House_** We’re excited to have Newt’s support in the race to elect Derek as our next governor so he can restore commonsense conservative leadership here in Kansas. **But we want to know that YOU’RE standing with Newt. If you’re with him and fired up to send a conservative back the governor’s office,**[**please add your name to show that you’re joining Newt on Team Schmidt. **** clean_body: We have big news to share with you: Newt Gingrich has endorsed Derek Schmidt in the race for Governor of Kansas! Friend, We have big news to share with you: Newt Gingrich has endorsed Derek Schmidt in the race for Governor of Kansas! "As Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has been Kansas' strongest voice for liberty, the right to life and the conservative principles that make America great. When Laura Kelly shut down churches on Easter, closed schools and called CRT a 'nothingburger,' Derek Schmidt stood up and fought back. As Governor, Derek will put parents in control of their children’s education and health decisions, create a climate of opportunity for small business and jobs, and always put Kansans and their constitutional rights first in every decision he makes. He will make Kansans proud as Governor, and has my endorsement and full support." – Newt Gingrich, Former U.S. Speaker of the House We’re excited to have Newt’s support in the race to elect Derek as our next governor so he can restore commonsense conservative leadership here in Kansas. But we want to know that YOU’RE standing with Newt. If you’re with him and fired up to send a conservative back the governor’s office, Newt has spent his career in Congress, as Speaker of the U.S. House, as a candidate for President of the United States, and beyond fighting for the values we as conservatives hold dear. Recently, Speaker Gingrich has been one of the leading voices in defense of honest, patriotic education in our schools and against the threat posed by critical race theory... He’s worked hard alongside an organization called 1776 Action to fight this radical ideology that slanders our history and undermines our nation’s fundamental value of equality under the law. Last year, Derek was one of the first candidates for governor in America to sign 1776 Action’s “Save Our Schools” Pledge to fight against anti-American indoctrination like CRT in our Kansas schools. Here’s what Derek said when he signed the pledge, which rings even more true today: “Throughout our history, America has focused on teaching our children about our founding documents and bedrock principles of freedom and equality for all, and if I am blessed to serve our great state as governor I will be a strong advocate for that remaining our focus. We can teach our children the whole truth about American history, good and bad, without resorting to controversial and divisive political theories that leave kids believing they are inherently oppressors or victims or that discount the fundamental goodness of American freedoms and values.” That is exactly the type of patriotic leadership we need in our Kansas Governor. - Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Kevin McCarthy lives just a few streets from me -- his kids actually went to high school with mine.

Some see McCarthy on TV and buy into the bigshot persona.

**But I'm not intimidated by him.** Truth be told, it's hard to respect someone who has seen what I see each day but does _nothing_ about it.

88% of my students receive free or reduced lunch.

_Of those, 13% are homeless._

McCarthy has been in office for 15 years. And after 15 years nothing seems to change for struggling families.

**Our Central Valley community is being left behind while Kevin McCarthy defends Trump and jockeys for a leadership position.**

We deserve better, and that starts with unseating Kevin McCarthy:

name: News Wire
subject: Three Years Ago Roger Stone Was Arrested for a Fake Made-Up Crime by Twenty-Some FBI Agents at Gun Point
body:
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=549e3aa66b05407d9571de8f4b5f5ac9)
---
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=921d584a5a6249f78a5698c456682788) **This was one of the most disgusting events in US law enforcement history - Roger Stone was arrested in the early morning of January 25, 2019, after being ambushed at 6 am at his house in Florida by twenty-some FBI agents and CNN. His crimes, related to Russian collusion which didn't exist (and the investigators and prosecutors knew it), were made up. ** **This occurred in America to an innocent civilian - Roger Stone. This is Obama/Biden's America!** Roger Stone provided the Gateway Pundit exclusive pictures from his arrest at his home in Florida which were published on June 11, 2020. Stone has been under attack ever since. The first picture shows the FBI agents approaching the house and then looking in the bushes to make sure Stone doesn't ambush them: The next picture shows FBI agents at Stone's door with at least three guns locked, loaded and pointed right at him: The final picture is Stone being carted off in handcuffs with a shirt on that says - Roger Stone Did Nothing Wrong: On that day, Tucker Carlson spoke out about the arrest - [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=1efa76be86b14c659c31718329429de9) After Stone's arrest, he was placed in front of Obama judge Amy Berman Jackson. If you are a conservative in her court you are damned. The story behind Jackson and the Stone court case is included in the article below. She was also the judge over Paul Manafort's case. [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=cf2fde1a8f9c4cb9ac2a93a8b0da44ef) After all of Stone's trials with Judge Jackson, we finally found out in a document leak on election night November 3rd, 2020, that the Mueller gang knew Stone was innocent and did nothing wrong, and Judge Jackson withheld this information from Stone and his legal team. [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=c06a4e1f0db34a279a9a9bdd4e0fccb5) **Now a group of far-left attorneys is suing Stone and President Trump and accusing them of starting the Capitol riot in DC on Jan 6. Ray Epps and Nancy Pelosi aren't being charged. This is Obama/Biden's America.** **Please donate to Roger Stone to help him pay his legal fees at - [Roger Stone Legal Defense Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=5&link=fecad5db0a2e4472a6fc965b34ce7801)** [www.StoneDefenseFund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2mor2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=6&link=fedbfb4d8b4d4c54ac096dd3e5b7c8b6)
---

Friend -- We have a make-or-break goal of raising $250,000 by Monday’s FEC deadline, and I need your help right now to hit it. **This _has_ to be a top priority for Democrats today:**

If we hit our goal, Democrats will have the resources to make CRUCIAL investments in Senate battleground states. We'll be in a _rock-solid_ position to expand our Senate majority!

But if we come up short, Democrats will NOT have the resources to make those crucial investments and Mitch McConnell's chances of taking back the Senate will skyrocket.

**[Please, I'm personally counting on you. Click here to give a contribution of $5 to defend our Senate majority!](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220126-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220126-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&akid=2735%2E9716520%2EVndSbO)**

I need to make this clear: President Biden's historic agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate.

But right now, our 50/50 majority hangs by a thread. Polling shows TIGHT races in key Senate battlegrounds, Mitch McConnell's allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to retake power, and they've _already_ launched attack ads against vulnerable Democratic senators.

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the Senate is a toss-up -- and for Democrats to keep the Senate, this grassroots team must step up. Every single donation matters now, whether it's $5 or $10.

| | Members of Congress and their senior staff are required to disclose stock purchases in a timely manner to counteract insider trading and ensure they are legislating in good faith.

Yet, Peter, a recent investigation found that _dozens_ of lawmakers and _nearly_ 200 congressional staff had violated the STOCK ACT, including a member of Ron Johnson’s senior staff.

Deb believes that our families deserve lawmakers that work for us, not their own financial interests. It’s clear that the current regulations do not go far enough. To remove even the possible perception of impropriety, Congress must ban the trading of individual stocks by members and their senior staff. Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger has introduced bipartisan legislation in a common-sense, proactive approach to solving this problem. Congresswoman Spanberger has endorsed Deb as someone who will work, as she does, for the American people, not self-interest.

67% of Americans agree that it’s time to prohibit the trading of individual stocks by our lawmakers, with strong support among Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. | Do you agree that Congress must take action right away to strengthen stock trading ethics rules for our elected officials? | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41089710/327292817/-1891058352?refcode=ea.b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDYxMDNiYi1lNjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6P7iGvwrsKB0gZkv-hzlkk8Cz1lokAGrmXX6w8oZK-I=&emci=9bc9f2c0-027e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)**** | | ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41089711/327292818/-1891058352?refcode=ea.b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDYxMDNiYi1lNjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6P7iGvwrsKB0gZkv-hzlkk8Cz1lokAGrmXX6w8oZK-I=&emci=9bc9f2c0-027e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b46103bb-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)****

In her work overseas, Deb has seen how democracies fail. That’s why she believes we must do all we can to root out corruption and ensure that our elected officials are putting the interests of the people first.

Let’s stand together for the common good,

Team McGrath

clean_body: It’s time to build an America First Senate majority. | Peter, I was the first person in the entire country who said that when I’m in the Senate, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnel as leader. No more RINOs, plain and simple. But my refusal to play along with the establishment has put a target on my back... As the1 SEAT needed to FLIP the 50-50 Senate, every swamp force from the DSCC to George Soros to RINOs alike are trying to take me down now that we have a 12-point lead in this all-important Senate race. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]January 31st is my campaign's FIRST BIG DEADLINE.
Vote-by-mail ballots for my special election will be sent out in March, which means next month will be my last chance to reach potential voters before they start casting their ballots!
We MUST hit our end-of-month goal if we want to let voters know about my race and what's at stake before March.
Will you chip in to my campaign before our deadline in five days so I can fight for hardworking families and marginalized communities in Sacramento? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgettegomezsp-digital_generalemail?refcode=X_012622_EOM_A]

name: Sarah
subject: One very quick question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59367463:JGeTwiENf:m:1:3298722022:B7804EDE713803C733ECDBDAAB976E78:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59367463:JGeTwiENf:m:1:3298722022:B7804EDE713803C733ECDBDAAB976E78:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59367463:JGeTwiENf:m:1:3298722022:B7804EDE713803C733ECDBDAAB976E78:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_

clean_body: | | | | A Socialist or RINO... | Peter, Do you find it odd that “Republican” Liz Cheney is so obsessed with the Jan. 6th commission? It’s so odd! She has spoken out publicly and blamed it on President Trump, then when the Republican Party asked her why she did it, she fought back! And now, the Voter Protection Project, a Democratic group from Seattle, Washington that states their mission as, “...leading the charge against Republicans at the state and federal level...” is coming out in support of Liz Cheney! Take a look at what they sent their supporters: Liz Cheney cast her lot with the Washington, D.C. and Northern Virginia elites and those who use their power to further their own agenda at our expense. She doesn’t represent Wyoming and she doesn’t represent conservatives. We deserve better. We demand better. Harriet Hageman is running to represent Wyoming and take the state back from big government. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

name: POST OFFICE POLL #5907903 [via DCCC]
subject: 📎 Poll attached for you, response requested by 11:59 PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you think Louis DeJoy should be fired from his position as postmaster general?
| | **REPORT: Embattled U.S. postmaster Louis DeJoy is STILL hanging on to his job**

| We're OUTRAGED:

Breaking reports are revealing that Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, Louis DeJoy, is STILL hanging on to his job at the head of the USPS.

We refuse to sit idly by while DeJoy enforces his plan to make mail deliveries SLOWER and more expensive.

[******So quickly, let us know: Do you think Louis DeJoy should be fired from his position as postmaster general?**](https://links.e.dccc.)
****
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Poll Response: [PENDING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T46_)
| [Take the Poll >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We're LIVID.

Donald Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, Louis DeJoy, has held his position for just over a year - but he's already inflicted OUTRAGEOUS damage to our vital Post Office:

_**FIRST,** he SABOTAGED mail-in voting for the GOP's political benefit._

_**THEN,** he unveiled a plan to ruthlessly cut costs and restrict service._

_**NOW,** reports have revealed his plan will cause PERMANENTLY slower and more expensive mail deliveries._

**But it 's INFURIATING:** Even after all the damage DeJoy has caused, he's STILL clinging to his job at the head of the USPS.

**We refuse to sit idly by while Trump 's crony at the USPS continues to degrade this essential public service.**

So we're calling on 5,800 grassroots Democrats to take action and let us know:
[**Do you think Louis DeJoy should be FIRED from his position as postmaster general?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvK4_)

---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4zVg~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46304118&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjg0NTAxMAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46304118&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjg0NTAxMAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

subject: Rik Mehta vs. Frank Pallone... We Will Beat Pallone.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RIK FOR NEW JERSEY INC
body:
"Rik Mehta is the best candidate to beat Pallone in 2022." \- Jersey Enquirer | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5098b4c3de02/rik-mehta-vs-frank-pallone-we-will-beat-pallone?e=146fae137d)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,
**It's US vs Pallone, WE CAN Win This Race**... (because of you) When the people of NJ’s 6th congressional district asked me why I believe I can win this race against **Failed Socialist 30-year taxpayer funded millionaire, Frank Pallone** , I say this...

I proved in my race against Cory "Do nothing" Booker, the "Laziest" Senator in the country that **I can bring the fight to the Democrats** and even being outspent 10 to 1 we still put fear into Booker and the Democrats who spent millions to stop us.

2020 was a year where Democrats used every trick in the book to hinder us such as an all vote by mail election, playing games at polling stations and spreading false defamatory stories about Republicans and the hard working men and women of New Jersey. **I received over 1.8 million votes that year with all of the cards stacked against us - The HIGHEST total votes for a REPUBLICAN IN NEW JERSEY HISTORY! **

**I know how to run a statewide race** , we know how and where to hit the Democrats and Frank Pallone on his failures and shady practices... and this race will be decided by two towns in the district, Edison and Woodbridge.

**These towns have massive Indian American communities** who have blindly supported Pallone and the Democrats but are fed up with the racist legislation the Democrats have passed targeting Indian American business owners especially in hospitality industries.

**I will cut Pallone's stronghold on these communities by huge margins and block his only path to victory.**

We will win in November.

[A contribution of $5, $25, $50, or even $100 can go a long way in supporting our movement to](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=4c91ffc07a&e=146fae137d)[ send Pallone into retirement >>](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=07a795e9b4&e=146fae137d)

I’m supported by voters who are sick and tired of corruption...

**Sick and tired of greed...
Sick and tired of a pandemic...
Sick and tired of a frail, struggling, economy...** And sick and tired of politicians who always have a convenient “other side” excuse as to why they somehow can NEVER deliver on what they promised the people of NJ. Those voices, the voices of voters who are sick and tired of feeling like THEIR voices will be silenced, snuffed-out, and censored both now and in the future are the reason I KNOW that WE can win this race. But the good news is thanks to **YOU** we’re almost there! So, once again If you’re concerned about where New Jersey is headed then I encourage you to visit [rikfornj.com](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=e57df5cbf0&e=146fae137d) to learn more about our plan for our NJ. And if you support the vision we have for this state and the direction we see for this country, then **support Rik Mehta for New Jersey’s 6th congressional district** today!!! [Your small donation of $5, $25, $50, or even $100 can go a long way in supporting our movement to help keep the strong in NJ-strong, STRONGER than it’s ever been! ](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=cbe8c6279a&e=146fae137d)
Thank you!,
Rik Mehta

_P.S. If you are interested in holding a fundraiser, have volunteers or interns who would like to help out please email us at info@rikfornj.com or visit our website [www.rikfornj.com ](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=dc0f089e34&e=146fae137d)to learn more on how to get involved. _
_**If you would like to chip in or know someone who would please forward them this email and use the links below to contribute today!...**_

(because of you) When the people of NJ’s 6th congressional district asked me why I believe I can win this race against Failed Socialist 30-year taxpayer funded millionaire, Frank Pallone , I say this... I proved in my race against Cory "Do nothing" Booker, the "Laziest" Senator in the country that I can bring the fight to the Democrats and even being outspent 10 to 1 we still put fear into Booker and the Democrats who spent millions to stop us. 2020 was a year where Democrats used every trick in the book to hinder us such as an all vote by mail election, playing games at polling stations and spreading false defamatory stories about Republicans and the hard working men and women of New Jersey. I received over 1.8 million votes that year with all of the cards stacked against us - The HIGHEST total votes for a REPUBLICAN IN NEW JERSEY HISTORY! I know how to run a statewide race , we know how and where to hit the Democrats and Frank Pallone on his failures and shady practices... and this race will be decided by two towns in the district, Edison and Woodbridge. These towns have massive Indian American communities who have blindly supported Pallone and the Democrats but are fed up with the racist legislation the Democrats have passed targeting Indian American business owners especially in hospitality industries. I will cut Pallone's stronghold on these communities by huge margins and block his only path to victory. We will win in November. I’m supported by voters who are sick and tired of corruption... Sick and tired of greed... Sick and tired of a pandemic... Sick and tired of a frail, struggling, economy... And sick and tired of politicians who always have a convenient “other side” excuse as to why they somehow can NEVER deliver on what they promised the people of NJ. Those voices, the voices of voters who are sick and tired of feeling like THEIR voices will be silenced, snuffed-out, and censored both now and in the future are the reason I KNOW that WE can win this race. But the good news is thanks to YOU we’re almost there! So, once again If you’re concerned about where New Jersey is headed then I encourage you to visit to learn more about our plan for our NJ. And if you support the vision we have for this state and the direction we see for this country, then support Rik Mehta for New Jersey’s 6th congressional district today!!! Thank you!, Rik Mehta P.S. If you are interested in holding a fundraiser, have volunteers or interns who would like to help out please email us at info@rikfornj.com or visit our website learn more on how to get involved. body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqwvcgVzJOScLTx8hVyGfYAroLJSBWVOQWiKglSLZGYFVcF6Ia9JVbfhv-M0XPf47Z6hXi5RtTMqDI6l9dwk2BZJQSZUbqhilVDJtk-hXOVdzRcsMHCcXpK2tSlpGzjc7mEgTJIMER3a4QWzCQSTTfYxqi6r26JDxpZV1PrS47Em_bF7D2st0RxPy1Cee-K8vtrEKGfiZPDHF-FEc3QkLbVfg%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqw3K03wIdpCjhtEQg6L8n1JzmzP5yC-rmmwhUW6hVLZ0TjgIVU7qIKpL3KBz5Zg_G1KtNupI2WUA6Yfip_w72MT3u4w_Z6RbmomR6BFVbdqQlDve7-xYj6YMg-7hI5UG32UF-C7Zdv8_y2T_Ca8NfoPA9HKdLvYChljvFD9ssX6lSDLh--1zG3Z4qLTAIJMMDub_K58pEbP8MoPocHd-eZmA%3D%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqwj1pWUv8LALrj69dV_JjjqIwZklv3WEX3EpM4-T7I3BYucmgGX9p8GkC6YP8OyrBR3Nbv4rM7yga6q9vKwGfb_B6B7IF2kDNdUXvQHd-cKDpiK5NGLnfYR2FFqcL6i3GlB33wg7E1gDKedihRq_980hO5s0IldnNaWNH1kRdbBswnfxswq_JaA85UVWSw7OWRvrc2UOpB7DzfpnMPfvyzyw%3D%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqw7rr64-THU6LNny8y_IGDdWwuLpDGN5tNjXGWjN8qZ-_IVXOjp0cCahQqQ08t1QPFjg5bWfn28i5iM8KFkRZg9snwv13zHgtGHyGuv9Fk5n01o3zk6hSo0Ja9AoDlxFApsbV7Nz5txsLU-9VhIwkUA4tj19RYaAQdwE-rQTMoYS7qcUPK4_y93QY1N2MqffY0AmRRcOXpOfw4T895cBNEVw%3D%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqwOANkjnCwPSEAaX5Anx_ZyfowW1Fy2VunQJF6HrGGSppomFQ-tTeL3YdxS-s8e1LoGaaGvRk04eRGIer9LzP9LsmJ4ljn6ww6my83NsHFpGo5WQ9qyjNEh2Y2bkvHdrHWK-i-9Nd6v0hxKUfUyV2r_X09SY-uAFWgfRe-wsKBvmXUGqreMWkum48LvVQtJVhglPgbCRZVNWEPrHoaOvhaig%3D%3D)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqwbQCLkBfA2HUeNoSIqBzyo8qx3lLLejKwnFLbu-_9p2tDuKuZKjIRGLkTG9UCWt-LuSzeg1-m15DYJwqlviqP8dwXAWoZsfWoWTbL1AGqUfJmoKvp-gP8laNgL7zs09mum_0aa-b_tvd-qnEKyg25iB3zm0rbutzBdWbBUh0s9bMTgflMfzezn6wAD717_7M5bBWWCeU49czrM30lG2-lIg%3D%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Hispanic Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=960f04183d66443db143e7c963a875a9&_e=gRyFTZVGw7Hrx1_cwMWua3eoOt-P-8eEAQoPrEOivgx70ZuJsRv8UPMXkNBnxBYsRq0uA9AFnFoobvLxEeZBUdSyY2PAJrH6O1fTQFc9OxY033e08FCbIsaLR_azhMOX1PwxYBhRKZEjsgN2OFGM8oo8XM4JjpVLbjMg3wNgGeB81neV6_MkR-a83BGOsiVmzwu9YGhKl7dqZoPN2aSBVt2sERKDlepUwN5XJXX8GAd7-6yvXYh9O4yYgkjf6mIPktGTRCPHKHnseZIshEgvZShqx04hwQrY_j-mNzUFpXa69qCgReAkVgZevil73jqwxm_YBxpUKHS2xG0WMfYP1l0TRCH6hbWcpIZnSDUtvsk1l3H5hSBKdSilYeJ_9tsCk5NUk3sIFcDgtkK-Yo4029R7Lk4d1c-r10oadVZsEOXWjbE4x_zG-kXvwlmF421YVdRED45HRUC2GUS3QkLyuAVfpYyUA088B0zW6iQFN7i9zOvYK0_yIiwDof-4JWRVl4SB8E-QnRMUmwSbNOrUQA%3D%3D)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden's Political Revenge at the Expense of Floridians
body:
Floridians are now at the whims of a floundering, failing President’s edicts. Yesterday, without notice or a shred of data
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za994pprgkh28sg74lqlrqkkokji9olqq9ps6i88_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stkmgrr8or7cdo6ctjmcqpr1ptjcmpn4slhcmob9o76cmpj1obledpb8cti6lg6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljc5g75c366pgb6p9nm2qmash5u)
[****](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfl23sfu2kn0o47ru4pru547agad374p5qvvkcv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth2bs)
Friend,
Floridians are now at the whims of a floundering, failing President's edicts.
Yesterday, without notice or a shred of data to back up this decision, Joe Biden pulled the rug out from under Florida and revoked the authorization of monoclonal antibody treatments - something that has saved tens of thousands of Floridians suffering from COVID.
Biden's entire term as president has been one disaster after another. A border crisis that is raging, inflation that's skyrocketing and impacting millions of Americans and the list goes on... But, instead of addressing any one of the numerous problems he's created, he would rather focus his energy on stripping elderly Floridians - most of whom have been vaccinated - of their potentially life-saving treatments.
The worst part is, this all could have been avoided if we had even a shred of competence from the White House.
[**HELP ME CONTINUE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - CHIP IN NOW >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeageevprv1ls8eoasaa9p354so3281hol94vgg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth2bs)
Instead, the arrogant, Beltway liberals in the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration and their hapless minions chose to blame the summer wave in the Sunbelt on people in our part of the country being uneducated, backward yokels. This is despite the fact we've consistently been above the national average in vaccination rate.
Biden has gone above and beyond to deny Florida access to lifesaving treatment. We could be saving tens of millions of dollars and thousands of lives, **but Joe Biden would rather extract political revenge on Florida for our fierce protection of freedom.**
**Friend,[please help me continue the fight against Joe Biden's medical authoritarianism. Chip in whatever you can so we can continue to fight back against their political attacks on the Sunshine State.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zruuartaolffano90udbh9ius4n3s0v6h7hm3i8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth2bs)**
Thank you for your support.
Ron DeSantis
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp6ng1oaqh7rl9tmhfi2ojolnrfji9ondhi6n88o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth2bs "FIGHT BACK") [FIGHT BACK](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z364c8kddi3qj1ip96kveu5376sjkmri3j6qinso_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j60o72cth2bs)

body:
Glenn Youngkin’s Natural Resources Dept. pick

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41090617/327296248/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-220126-wheeler&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmY0NjQ1OS1lYjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WbHpcuYJ3CBhrNN10YEu-r_JXKnGGF07nE6KvzCSLc=&emci=e14e5800-e67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=06f46459-eb7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek, in news that should shock absolutely none of you — **Glenn Youngkin is __NOT__ a moderate when it comes to environmental policy.** **Meet the man who is going to sink Hampton Roads: Glenn’s nominee for Secretary of Natural Resources, Andrew Wheeler** — Trump’s EPA chief that former AG Mark Herring sued at least six times for policies that caused damage to the Chesapeake Bay. Wheeler has made it clear that he is going to take the same approach to science that he did during the Trump administration and folks, we’re worried. **Climate change is one of the greatest threats to Virginia’s future.** The commonwealth deserves a Secretary of Natural Resources that acknowledges and accepts the validity of climate science, not right-wing conspiracy theories pushed by lobbyists. **We’re calling on the General Assembly to block Andrew Wheeler’s harmful nomination to the Commonwealth’s Department of Natural Resources. name: Update From James Carville
subject: moments like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
you know what we're up against, friend?
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41090936/327297404/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2239-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQ3Yzk5ZS1lYjdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_wx4-HCdmDTrjz8o_9U8q14Ez8F0_HZuFkn05VZuSY=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.

We are just FIVE DAYS away from the end of the month, and we are in serious danger of falling short of our January fundraising goal.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: re: breaking news from the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – it's Abby. We just learned that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer will retire at the end of this term. Right now, the stakes are high, and I need you with me. My opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), has stolen a Supreme Court seat before, all in an effort to cement a partisan far-right majority.
Democrats now have the opportunity to confirm a justice who will serve on the bench for years to come, **but as we know all too well, without a single vote to spare, nothing is guaranteed. And if we don’t move quickly,** Mitch McConnell has already said that he’s likely to block any future appointment President Biden makes if he becomes Majority Leader. We simply can’t let that happen.
A 50-50 majority is simply not a sustainable way of governing. **Until we expand our Democratic majority, we cannot successfully deliver for the American people or, in moments like this, ensure that our basic rights are protected in the courts.**
**But if we defeat Sen. Grassley here in Iowa, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to not only hold but EXPAND our Senate majority.[So if you're with me to flip this seat blue, expand our majority and protect the future of our Supreme Court, please rush a $5 donation – whatever you can spare during this critical moment – to my campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41091318/327299155/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBhYjNiNi1lZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KzsKTIUjPEWL5snIXszF13JyXRUId9wbALPukgysUk=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41091319/327299156/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBhYjNiNi1lZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KzsKTIUjPEWL5snIXszF13JyXRUId9wbALPukgysUk=)
---
When the GOP held the Senate majority, they stacked the court with far-right extremists who will continue to do harm to our country for years to come – and Sen. Grassley was the architect of their plans. As the then-chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, he conspired with McConnell to block consideration of President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, and worked in a hyper-partisan fashion to confirm justices Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch Barrett.
**Together, we can make sure Sen. Grassley never does that again.**
Right now Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. **Iowans are ready to show him the door – but the GOP and its allies have already raked in more than $100 MILLION to defeat Democratic challengers like me and take back the Senate.** That's why I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to compete with GOP resources.
[**Please, will you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, keep the Supreme Court out of the hands of Sens. Grassley and McConnell and expand our Democratic majority? After this news, GOP megadonors will be more determined than ever to take back the Senate, so I need grassroots supporters like you to fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41091320/327299157/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBhYjNiNi1lZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KzsKTIUjPEWL5snIXszF13JyXRUId9wbALPukgysUk=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41091321/327299158/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBhYjNiNi1lZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KzsKTIUjPEWL5snIXszF13JyXRUId9wbALPukgysUk=)
---
Thank you for fighting with me.

– Abby

body:
Peter, in just 5 days we’ll be hitting the end of January and our biggest fundraising deadline yet.
Whatever we raise by the end of this month will determine just how much we can do in February — when early voting will start and the final month before the primary.
We want to be doing as much as we can from traveling our huge district to meet the people of TX-23, to running digital outreach to make sure those Texans we don’t meet still see our vision for a better Texas.
It’s all going to come down to how many members of our communities join together to cast their vote for a TX-23 representative they can be proud of. It can put us on a path towards a future where the people are heard, seen and authentically represented in Washington.
We are trying to raise $9,837 before January 31st at midnight to make sure we can carry out all of our grassroots outreach plans next month ahead of the primary. Can you make a donation right now so we can begin to chip away at our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126]
We know that might seem like a big number, and that your donation could feel small in comparison. But when thousands of supporters make a grassroots donation they can afford, we’ll be able to hit our goal in no time.
And every dollar you contribute goes straight back into making sure the people of TX-23 are represented by a leader who is ready to fight for them.
This deadline is critical to the success of our effort in this final month before the primary. Can we count on you to make a contribution towards our $9,837 End of Month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126]
Let’s get to work,
Team Lira
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.
Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. But, if you'd you need to remove yourself from our email list, you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e40124c8-ee7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/ef0124c8-ee7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjAxMjRjOC1lZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Moq2b_LN6zjtnTM3RSmOrYdSdvOavLIt10gonEhx_c=&id=129132840

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: my anti-tax record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=1)
---
Friend -- You have lots of choices in the Republican Primary for Illinois Governor. But if you want a candidate with a legislative record of voting NO on
ALL tax hikes and NEVER introducing legislation to expand the Illinois Government's power to tax, I am your ONLY choice. In a state where talk is cheap and rhetoric seldom matches actions, I am the conservative with the legislative record to back up what I say. Thanks for reading and I look forward to continuing to earn and keep your trust. Semper Fidelis, Paul ps--We still need your help with circulating our petition to get on the ballot. Please download our petition by clicking [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=x7qo17qR1Kb0lLg85yQYfAbXTC6Z7wxyptuSZemzKnFypGyCaUAwfCQoiTX9r2CwP8dqvAXuciIUkiQkNBFDFJu-589EVczSle-Q50H6dK1OzdpPL-nzCN2sTrMxUoaoA60DS_StFcHh2yN_RHLs95eC6EKEaPb9DaeCOHLs6sXanDYvFinUJbUs9rSveoQ1&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=2). The instructions for circulating are [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=x7qo17qR1Kb0lLg85yQYfAbXTC6Z7wxyptuSZemzKnFypGyCaUAwfCQoiTX9r2CwP8dqvAXuciIUkiQkNBFDFJu-589EVczSle-Q50H6dK3FhIO2TRhID1cBleovOy4oyc19059EGOS-mEYfpHB36aobjHK4l8npHPsYatofghEaeETaWC9ITQVGLVNuIK_MbGnMGHwvOHjCS8tY26NnGWQtqe4eTDLIIk6n9gNpQjw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=3). 10 signatures (1 page worth) from you will help tremendously! Paul Schimpf
[http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=4)
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=5).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=legislative_record&n=7).

| Peter,
Did you get my email below?
It's about how we have a clear choice this year in Nevada between policies that prioritize criminals instead of our rights, or leadership that keeps us safe.
That's why this year is more than just an election - it's a major inflection point here in Nevada that's going to have ripple effects for years to come.
Lawlessness and Single Party Rule have set Nevada back... But 2022 can be the year we change all that.
I'm ready to get to work, but I need your support to get there - if you at all have the means to help improve public safety, improve our education system, and improve our economy, [I'd be grateful if you lent your support to help me fight for that vision here in Nevada.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6oLaWyEqDM5miFWjdBskkPI6YRRw-aAmKVyLr56ZT1dU6UlSa3dl3x_agl0jcaKd5WFQa2g39koAjNFpM1RCjmpJZ9u1_vzExNlsUmXMwPYZX7mSOjkIHEp1Q4XtiWdzv3RSufCcHcI99rgh2DtXAAdwfbMW5S9_HmJV8J182VcgOC3XOy9D_eOf7FMGAzpsha6iuPpNdO3g6UEc0yr8g==&c=D3tqoEeBVPnVlmD9b1qckfuwAf54Hy4c06xwM48jmx1B8sQUzuF_7A==&ch=SlyGWrcF97TFdzpXF0wvDGaoNpv5MJSNrX9wyxvEE011GzKs0t-FLA==)

| \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Team Joe Lombardo Date: Thurs, January 20, 2022 at 10:10 AM Subject: It's a BIG Election Year
---
| Peter,
We're 20 days into a historic election year here in the state of Nevada.
Before we know it, thousands of Nevadans are going to be casting their ballots and deciding whether to send in a proven, law enforcement leader to safeguard our rights, our communities, and our economy... or whether to simply keep accepting the tired status quo from Steve Sisolak.
That's what lies before us here in these coming months - and there's still so much our campaign can do to convince undecided Nevadans that Sheriff Lombardo is the right choice to lead our state.
But spreading that message with advertising, outreach, and other campaign operations takes resources. [That's why we can't afford to take our foot off the gas - especially now that we're right in the midst of this BIG Election Year!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6oLaWyEqDM5miFWjdBskkPI6YRRw-aAmKVyLr56ZT1dU6UlSa3dl3x_agl0jcaKd5WFQa2g39koAjNFpM1RCjmpJZ9u1_vzExNlsUmXMwPYZX7mSOjkIHEp1Q4XtiWdzv3RSufCcHcI99rgh2DtXAAdwfbMW5S9_HmJV8J182VcgOC3XOy9D_eOf7FMGAzpsha6iuPpNdO3g6UEc0yr8g==&c=D3tqoEeBVPnVlmD9b1qckfuwAf54Hy4c06xwM48jmx1B8sQUzuF_7A==&ch=SlyGWrcF97TFdzpXF0wvDGaoNpv5MJSNrX9wyxvEE011GzKs0t-FLA==)
The actions that we take RIGHT NOW could decide whether or not Joe comes out on top at the end of this year.
So thank you in advance for meeting the moment - if we put everything we've got into this mission now, it's going to pay off with safety, improved education, and more prosperity come November.
---

It's about how we have a clear choice this year in Nevada between policies that prioritize criminals instead of our rights, or leadership that keeps us safe. That's why this year is more than just an election - it's a major inflection point here in Nevada that's going to have ripple effects for years to come. Lawlessness and Single Party Rule have set Nevada back... But 2022 can be the year we change all that. I'm ready to get to work, but I need your support to get there - if you at all have the means to help improve public safety, improve our education system, and improve our economy, == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for the support, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Team Joe Lombardo Date: Thurs, January 20, 2022 at 10:10 AM Subject: It's a BIG Election Year | Peter, We're 20 days into a historic election year here in the state of Nevada. Before we know it, thousands of Nevadans are going to be casting their ballots and deciding whether to send in a proven, law enforcement leader to safeguard our rights, our communities, and our economy... or whether to simply keep accepting the tired status quo from Steve Sisolak. That's what lies before us here in these coming months - and there's still so much our campaign can do to convince undecided Nevadans that Sheriff Lombardo is the right choice to lead our state. But spreading that message with advertising, outreach, and other campaign operations takes resources. == The actions that we take RIGHT NOW could decide whether or not Joe comes out on top at the end of this year. name: Alex Wilcox (Research)
subject: Buckle up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ][IMG]

Buckle up, folks!

I’m Alex, Team Ryan’s Research Director. It’s my job to keep track of how
much our opponents are spending against us and it’s not looking good.

Ohio Republicans are currently leading the nation in campaign spending.
We’re already on track to be the most expensive Senate race in Ohio’s
history—and it’s only January!

I just dug into the numbers and take a look:

* Matt Dolan has contributed $10.5 million to his campaign
* Mike Gibbons is self-funding with $11.4 million of his own fortune
* Jane Timken put in $2 million of her own money into her campaign
* Both JD Vance and Josh Mandel (also millionaires) have multi-million
dollar super PACs backing their bids

The millions already being spent in Ohio are UNPRECEDENTED ($40 million,
are you kidding me?). But, we all know why: the Senate majority hinges on
what happens here.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6607?t=1007&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Can you chip in what you can so we counter the big money in this race
and stop another GOP millionaire from buying their way into the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1016&amount=100&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1017&amount=200&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1018&amount=250&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1019&amount=25&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Other Amount

Here’s the reality: the GOP’s spending won’t slow down—it will only ramp
up. We’ve got to prepare now to be ready for an all-out assault on our
campaign ASAP.

Tim doesn’t have a multi-million dollar fortune—heck, he’s still paying
off his mortgage—but he has something better: a team of dedicated
supporters who chip in what they can. We’re counting on you,
folks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6607?t=1008&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Every single donation, whether $5 or $25 gives us the strength we need
to fight back. Can you chip in right now so we have the resources we need
to go toe-to-toe with Tim’s opponents?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1020&amount=25&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1021&amount=50&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1012&amount=250&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6608?t=1013&amount=25&akid=2151%2E3611125%2EEg16Sv ]Other Amount

— Alex

Alex Wilcox
Research Director

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlgqlc35dbofoskcgb246alnllfasbusoddueekg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j64or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpelico7c3md78rt6804b8iu67dv1snno8ngfieo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j64or2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5r0snqe5pvtp60rbbanjhbg3tldao5jlr88qh70_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9j64or2c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
