name: Finance Team, Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
subject: We’ll be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We’re 100% grassroots-funded so this really matters
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220126-566-footer-ak&t=2&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)
From day one, we’ve been a 100% grassroots-funded campaign, and unlike our opponents from both parties, Morgan won’t take a dollar from corporate PACs.

That means that for us on the finance team, we spend a lot of time making sure we put that grassroots money to good use, knowing that it comes from folks who give what they can because they truly believe in Morgan’s progressive values.

**But this is what we’re seeing: a steep drop-off in donations when you compare the month of December to the month of January. Take a look at our dashboard****:**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22576?t=3&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)
Our opponents are spending millions of dollars to blanket the TV airwaves, crisscross the state of Ohio holding events, and get their ads online in front of every voter they can. **We’ll be honest: our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be to match them right now.**
We have to fight back to make sure folks hear what Morgan has to say.

[**_So that’s why we’re coming to you to ask_****, can you chip in ANY amount before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on January 31? It’ll go directly toward funding our campaign to send Morgan to the Senate.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22576?t=4&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22582?refcode=em20220126-566&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)**
There is a better option than a status-quo-defending Democrat on one side and far-right radicals on the other. **We have a chance to send someone who will really fight to turn the communities of Ohio around.** That’s why we’ve got to elect Morgan.

[**_If you’re with us, make a donation of any amount today to help our campaign close our $8,223 fundraising gap before January 31._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22576?t=24&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)
Thank you,
Finance Team
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220126-566-footer&t=25&refcode2=566_90090_bIyaZU&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=566%2E90090%2EbIyaZU)

That means that for us on the finance team, we spend a lot of time making sure we put that grassroots money to good use, knowing that it comes from folks who give what they can because they truly believe in Morgan’s progressive values. But this is what we’re seeing: a steep drop-off in donations when you compare the month of December to the month of January. Take a look at our dashboard: Our opponents are spending millions of dollars to blanket the TV airwaves, crisscross the state of Ohio holding events, and get their ads online in front of every voter they can. We’ll be honest: our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be to match them right now. We have to fight back to make sure folks hear what Morgan has to say. There is a better option than a status-quo-defending Democrat on one side and far-right radicals on the other. We have a chance to send someone who will really fight to turn the communities of Ohio around. That’s why we’ve got to elect Morgan. Thank you, Finance Team Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Rudy Giuliani subpoenaed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Nd2UhimaERQztfA3w8aFL%2FI3CHyN10tc&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend - the Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol is running a full-court press to get honest answers from Donald Trump's closest allies. How precisely did each contribute to efforts to overturn the 2020 election?
**The Committee just made a bold new move: They 've subpoenaed Rudy Giuliani and other members of Trump's legal team who spread conspiracy theories about election fraud and filed bogus lawsuits challenging the results.**
Giuliani was one of the most vocal promoters of Trump's baseless fraud allegations, spewing misinformation on cable news, at poorly-staged press conferences, in conversations with lawmakers - basically wherever and however he could.
**Even worse, in a letter to Giuliani explaining their reasoning, the Committee said it has credible evidence that Giuliani attempted to "disrupt or delay the certification of the election results" and even urged Donald Trump to seize voting machines. These details are chilling.**
Yet despite the undeniable evidence of wrongdoing that's revealed seemingly every day - and despite the blatant attacks Trump and his allies waged on our democratic institutions - nearly all extremist Republicans are still clinging to Trump.
**That 's why, with such slim Democratic majorities in Congress, I'm urging you once again to help me hold Donald Trump and his co-conspirators accountable. With every piece of damning information that comes out, we must continue to make our voices heard:**
[**Do you believe Donald Trump and his allies - like Rudy Giuliani - should be held accountable for attempting to undermine our democracy? Click to add your name if you agree - I'm counting on 324 more Democrats to speak out before 11:59 p.m. tonight.**](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-TFF?zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1135-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-accountability%3Fcode%3Djtk1135-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wneQ22lNUcodeW427qyYPfI3CHyN10tc&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41091955/327301904/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQ1ZWIzMy1mMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cs7szuYLQjl_IHOAPNnKXP0Hkgs9zehTK9cExYZ4CM=&emci=d053fd93-e37e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ce45eb33-f17e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9818364)

| | Big news: **Justice Steven Breyer is reportedly planning to retire from the Supreme Court.** Originally nominated to the federal bench by President Carter and then to the Supreme Court by President Clinton, the 83-year-old justice has had a long and distinguished legal career. **The fight to replace him will be President Biden's first chance to steer the course of the Supreme Court. I'm counting on him to nominate a justice who will defend voting rights, women's reproductive rights, civil liberties, racial justice, and equality for all.** We're going to move fast, but we know that Mitch McConnell will try every tactic in the book to delay voting on the nomination until after the November election - remember the Machiavellian tactics he used in preventing President Obama from appointing Merrick Garland? This means the 2022 election just became even more important. As _The New York Times_ pointed out, "If [Democrats] lose even a single seat in the midterm elections, the balance of power in the chamber would flip, making it much more difficult for Mr. Biden to win confirmation for his nominee." You know what the stakes are. **[I'll do my part in the Senate to move President Biden's nominee along quickly. Chip in now to show Mitch McConnell we won't tolerate his attempts to obstruct another Democratic Supreme Court clean_body: | | | Big news: Justice Steven Breyer is reportedly planning to retire from the Supreme Court. Originally nominated to the federal bench by President Carter and then to the Supreme Court by President Clinton, the 83-year-old justice has had a long and distinguished legal career. The fight to replace him will be President Biden's first chance to steer the course of the Supreme Court. I'm counting on him to nominate a justice who will defend voting rights, women's reproductive rights, civil liberties, racial justice, and equality for all. We're going to move fast, but we know that Mitch McConnell will try every tactic in the book to delay voting on the nomination until after the November election - remember the Machiavellian tactics he used in preventing President Obama from appointing Merrick Garland? This means the 2022 election just became even more important. As The New York Times pointed out, "If [Democrats] lose even a single seat in the midterm elections, the balance of power in the chamber would flip, making it much more difficult for Mr. Biden to win confirmation for his nominee." You know what the stakes are. = Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friend – if Mitch McConnell takes back the Senate, he will block any of President Biden’s nominees to the Supreme Court. **[Before I go any further, can you rush a $5 donation right now to protect the Supreme Court and our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41092042/327302240/-1281091919?refcode=e20220126_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3MmRiZS1mMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfiKdHOrqTEkLUl4y3FNzKXZshEciWv9o5CZbsTvvVQ=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41092043/327302241/-1281091919?refcode=e20220126_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3MmRiZS1mMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfiKdHOrqTEkLUl4y3FNzKXZshEciWv9o5CZbsTvvVQ=)
---
When Mitch McConnell and the GOP controlled the Senate, they blocked Merrick Garland’s nomination and forced a conservative majority onto the Supreme Court. **The stakes are too high, folks. We can’t risk losing another seat.**
New Hampshire could decide the Senate majority – and with it, the future of the Supreme Court for generations. **[Can you please chip in $5 or whatever you can to keep this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41092044/327302242/-1281091919?refcode=e20220126_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3MmRiZS1mMTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfiKdHOrqTEkLUl4y3FNzKXZshEciWv9o5CZbsTvvVQ=)**
Thank you for your support. Moments like this highlight the importance of the work we’re doing, and I’m truly grateful to have you with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Dash Yeatts-Lonske
subject: Emails can match what Steny Hoyer gets from one big donor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Let’s be real for a minute. Steny Hoyer is raising a _lot_ of money for his campaign. He can pick up the phone to one of his special interest friends and raise $2900 in a few minutes. We can’t do that. Our average contribution of $24 seems like nothing next to $2900. But for us, 120 people giving $24 is a lot more powerful than one person donating $2900. It shows that we’re running a campaign on the right side of history. We’re running a campaign focused on everyday people and their issues. **[_We’re proud of how we’re running our campaign. If you are too, please consider chipping in a few dollars now. Every donation we get is a symbol of the support we have, and helps get us a little further in our journey to win this election._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlNPoPV6Ev2b4ZJPMAtQ9kCHTfO-LAwkJ5EhbXCJBt3bV2J3BcrHpfNpPBYDPFf30b0-0LiTRMJfq9dS87qS5LrIrDZfLf7ADji9o-ajgw-geO_1GcRyZvFTqX-DYKosP6Yco_Z0IEGd31ywQYtZn4Copa1v5YJPbLcz8vYIbuYZgyszvgtXsiFryvXyUcM-Rl7iE9hSSj2OmyTwJcgFzSGtQfgeQFhASolyiIoZ55mPHZOU5LiKv25hzLaMunqw12vu_NZK0eD84RfAdmlDX7kYHg62FJvGPmDm9oCwPGdGgPsSnx6neQ6cIBGG8EKAD8JK7TrrH0A99twm6nFThp2Av-YyvkBgzff1DIt-Sqzw/3j1/ZynBlcM9RpWHN5H-K7Wy0A/h0/iBR1bMdKKWl8ftQiO72LixK0owvxHV_VlwTFcZnT1BU)** When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give every time. He can pick up the phone to one of his special interest friends and raise $2900 in a few minutes. We can’t do that. Our average contribution of $24 seems like nothing next to $2900. But for us, 120 people giving $24 is a lot more powerful than one person donating $2900. It shows that we’re running a campaign on the right side of history. We’re running a campaign focused on everyday people and their issues. When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give every time. But it’s important that some folks do give, some of the time. That’s how we build a people-powered movement. Each person doing what they can to make change happen. name: Tom Tiffany
subject: Wisconsin needs a fighter in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_tt_1&n=1)

Friend -- It’s official, Ron Johnson is running for re-election and returning in his fight for our freedom in Washington. Ron is a tested and proven conservative, who truly represents the people of Wisconsin. He believes in funding our police, protecting our border, and keeping our schools open. I have no doubt he will continue to be a strong voice in the U.S. Senate, and that’s why I’m proud to be supporting him. If his last two terms have taught us anything, it’s that he isn’t afraid to stand up for what is right and good. He knows that America is worth fighting for, and that’s a fight he has yet to back down from. **Wisconsin, you showed up for him not once, but twice now, and he needs us to show up once more.** 2022 is the year we’ve all been gearing up for and now it’s time to show your support and get in on the ground floor of this election. I’m asking you to join us in proving the Left wrong, once again. [**Friend , can I count on you to chip in to help Ron Johnson?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjwzZxIs70Zg3Y4OlOAjxIBsmhAO9LzIeonbfJUjg1JxRh&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_tt_1&n=2) We can’t do it alone. Together, we can turn Wisconsin red by electing Ron Johnson this November. -Tom Tiffany | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0WZudqg7mkJ81-yLpZBnJ1Bm1DneOeYHrtPPrE7opFy-&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_tt_1&n=3 "Cick Here to Volunteer to Help Senator

body:
I nearly made history, but fell 6,588 short. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9qYAAIUIyj3Qf-3W29Rbu6H82he9bFm_qPAkGyVra7zCeBRCf93rj4GF2zrw1YAdvd2qQNNliNU97VDfYfwbLi9ZxmEeluDIlwVzo564ZjbWS5BiJXai1yOzIPh_bu3gL6g4izJcWE2qi7EJe8L0kgaMCXN6KSvitievRssP614yWHd0gaEN2VwEmFdAvwrbz-pGvfSEj6P1OrZT9Qra6wB)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9o5V8KxzG3rOrseMbD6cLbOzcN-dGHxALlDO0_3UTEm0nvsdjpKHptAdfMY4OOSv7_QicQ7y88pup1EjKkUpHf0NDsBjXRRta5etbW4FjwArKniM6euq9AGKYt_ymCfMrxZXxuHXLfKX-CrZ6B920qZlKnjw7nDNZbzYR_e-sDCX30fik-oD8m7SHkhxP8Qy5DrNi7GyE-vtHeOqV4Tq5a5)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9q0YoK9qdNqvPJkIPIX5zLrHdytTsUiYXlKNnuXE9PVH6OHtqS1Zff_EHIOpJy38epEefCxPlqcwi-UAw8mYeEIcPDD_j4LuoM8se9qLu3B3tIMXlzeaEhyeKVoKujpbpsWOjDL0eavLwySW7j6N74s6zeXPRtjNWtPHK-t3qgyVrbsla76iYKcFx8HBMh8qf1KnLG6JBYd988cxoFm103u)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9rfeHq0hZVcv50cNw9D-JkpjOa5YN4pFtQRE_9-1UI3uilStpm11agyebHJ-BJFD_opKq2TtLo8Sw_b_Tmw6PDmuN1pZpg9b_87MUpas5xnVGquGDJxjxo-WdJf-_024enMihuNbdU4pGgFWfg7Fia1esQROIQYSqRVV7Ggp5qVGEpiX6-wEDmzjRKw_9bWW03Mcbf7Nd7Rj_x_zHHWCLCN)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9o0y-O6lW7bPv8UnG2EhfOhIE6bs9T_j0_akXrzuMnPdy9OZorpRmPoW5ztsskT3AJOfG3Cg7CCu63MAKN1byUpNmt5fBwWiQMH3ui2sBdsvjdZ11SH0fMItRayKBGj9AIgX5WdPfvpcwkO7ZjxBwORiSHHxcYroGD4sukHCILn--nvL1eCebcshl8sGnk9emkvdx6lTmO8eg5VQwLkKVyh)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9pnHZ1CaRQob2fgNZW2TgsscYP2y1TlQrI8eJOlwVFxaHqFj-Wa5BLkvLWUCu81UK0IHQL0GHkf79JUuafW1ORSqgja8kamJQW0lWDttJrpoqAPzH3ONLsC3dl2hdmk5B57-zZ2XKM2RWLxTAtP_lfrNPJvYsMfCvcZ4De2B5JGBvvFM8kANL0zelZegn2hnTivfhcq0XAFzoqK2_f9-cCP)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Hispanic Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6b541c07e7cd4025b1f6d2375c3997da&_e=IrajcpuEpUZCagBJjHMwiv24aICDymQRmShB_aa8sr1iZQdp0m8Sp4YnEFkh_6KTwLO4VSxkWvFxpefhc8xWOiH0uqALAQTkN15yZsxaW2OzvMf8lmIFlR-j5iujNtOjnexR-aiTmtpGFt0mb5BT04u3-7bOp4QBBiJWEC0PKUojFdVoXpcmaTs7WJreAME9sQmDC5crOAyQ_hGZzeDmx8U0SqaSUCChh3_DjH8rsSCrJ76NvcIOMfBbnwy468TWnY6yoSJSdBj-Rjn-hyW35EGfDdquFmWsREbnc2ioD9oiSyNkGTRtMF71kC9bCcp4_oojtQeG8MB3WMTk5Ed6fG9Ttpgc50LDAj5gEDwBjP1FvEOwcLFb_M8pCsr4s5JmMex3Asz3kVaUDbHpLRiqjqoMOavDBixhU-3WUx8QIL6mhWKvn60IwfJJrK8syOTM4sGBkSud-ttgcyFTObuqMd6dm074rhV6Y9Y2Lfgbvec501RmAjoSkbgD5dYCNG-Y)

In the coming months, we're hopeful to ramp up our efforts, but we need your help to scale our operations up. Thank you, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team – it seems that as we start to leave this pandemic behind us, we re-enter America’s epidemic of gun violence.
Just last year there were over 693 mass shootings in the United States. Enough is enough.
It’s time for Congress to take action, and pass legislation curbing the proliferation of guns across the country.
We want to hear from you though, friend. Do you agree that Congress should pass gun control legislation at once? Take our poll and let us know >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=email_012622_3]
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=email_012622_3] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=email_012622_3]
Widespread gun violence is a uniquely American phenomenon, friend, and it’s time we put an end to it.
Take our poll above, and let us know whether you support Congress passing gun control laws at once.

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump January 25th, 2022 I am told the very strong and impressive Morgan Ortagus is exploring a run for Congress in Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District. I couldn’t be happier because she’s an absolute warrior for America First and MAGA! Morgan was fantastic in her role working with Secretary Mike Pompeo at the U.S. State Department and understands the threats posed by China, Russia, Iran and others, and will be tough, not just roll over like the Democrats and RINOs. She serves in the U.S. Navy Reserves and will fight for our Military. She won’t bow to the Woke Mob or the Leftist LameStream Media. Morgan Ortagus will have my Complete and Total Endorsement if she decides to run! | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ_G3ED28uPkwCFtmktVpb20uSFjL2AKhoAJ4u1rUtJDJcuW59sd7axKuQqFYp5OgQJQBgnjLKH7QDGEnCU7wfYsQVGQiMrOjDjchNU3HCejLapAdl6VUo4g45zTaB9jkWNEd3lR0DxhLEa6j70mraztRxIeCJzcmec5UJ0RjartMLW9s2mdbHAet8fnsrQDjuPMKQlPk22zFpWeWhIesRW6IZCs4thNg0QnGtlkou0bXSwbku4rdGkcfGTza2EmMSwZJLbKpl4Ji4_qzlg09tfJr5b6Xexe-surw5lptHLgn1hp5RIdv95meT58ekOq-lk3jR4T7pZVrkOuubxtqpTwJwJw7wK4rwLg8lHU_FqGV__7QP3oTM3K4Nnddunxr3DzCLboQPjxBz3YjaY)

Donald J. Trump January 25th, 2022
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidates, members of the Texas Congressional Delegation, and other special guests on Saturday, January 29th, 2022, in Conroe, TX.

This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes.

_**Saturday, January 29, 2022, at 7:00 PM CST** _
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks.

_**Venue:** _
Montgomery County Fairgrounds
9333 Airport Road
Conroe, TX, 77303

_**Special Guest Speakers:** _
Governor Greg Abbott, _Governor of Texas_
Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick, _Lieutenant Governor of Texas_
Attorney General Ken Paxton, _Attorney General of Texas_
Commissioner Sid Miller, _Agriculture Commissioner of Texas_
State Senator Dawn Buckingham, _Candidate for Texas Land Commissioner_
Judge Mark Keough, _Montgomery County Judge_
Mayor Connie Kacir, _Mayor of Gonzales, Texas_
Chairman Matt Rinaldi, _Chairman of the Republican Party of Texas_

_**Timeline of Events:** _
6:00AM – Parking Opens
2:00PM – Doors Open
4:00PM – Program Begins

Trump January 25th, 2022 I am told the very strong and impressive Morgan Ortagus is exploring a run for Congress in Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District. I couldn’t be happier because she’s an absolute warrior for America First and MAGA! Morgan was fantastic in her role working with Secretary Mike Pompeo at the U.S. State Department and understands the threats posed by China, Russia, Iran and others, and will be tough, not just roll over like the Democrats and RINOs. She serves in the U.S. Navy Reserves and will fight for our Military. She won’t bow to the Woke Mob or the Leftist LameStream Media. Morgan Ortagus will have my Complete and Total Endorsement if she decides to run! | Donald J. Trump January 25th, 2022 President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidates, members of the Texas Congressional Delegation, and other special guests on Saturday, January 29th, 2022, in Conroe, TX. This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes. Donald J. Trump January 25th, 2022
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidates, members of the Texas Congressional Delegation, and other special guests on Saturday, January 29th, 2022, in Conroe, TX.

This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes.

_**Saturday, January 29, 2022, at 7:00 PM CST** _
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks.

_**Venue:** _
Montgomery County Fairgrounds
9333 Airport Road
Conroe, TX, 77303

Governor Greg Abbott, _Governor of Texas_
Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick, _Lieutenant Governor of Texas_
Attorney General Ken Paxton, _Attorney General of Texas_
Commissioner Sid Miller, _Agriculture Commissioner of Texas_

subject: Albany does nothing
body:
Time for Action! | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=0fb809be41&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

Crime is exploding all across the state. Innocent New Yorkers are being mindlessly killed and beaten. Our neighborhoods are no longer safe.

The causes of this mayhem are a direct result of Governor Kathy Hochul and her far-left radical allies in Albany.

Hochul's "no cash bail" law is a disaster and the number one cause of the crime spike according to police chiefs around the state. Her progressive prosecutors and judges have more sympathy for violent criminals than they do for their victims.

Her pick for Lieutenant Governor is a "defund the police" activist.

The Cuomo/Hochul Parole Board has released 20 cop-killers in just the past two years and her "Less is More" program has freed hundreds of inmates before they've finished their sentences.

When I'm governor, the coddling of criminals will end. We will roll back these radical laws and programs and we will put "justice" back into our criminal justice system. Victims' rights and the rights of law-abiding citizens will once again be the priority in New York. And, yes, we will fund and support our police, and not defame and defund them as the Democrats are dangerously doing.

The fight to take back our state has already begun and I need your help to win.

clean_body: Time for Action! | | | | | Friend, Crime is exploding all across the state. Innocent New Yorkers are being mindlessly killed and beaten. Our neighborhoods are no longer safe. The causes of this mayhem are a direct result of Governor Kathy Hochul and her far-left radical allies in Albany. Hochul's "no cash bail" law is a disaster and the number one cause of the crime spike according to police chiefs around the state. Her progressive prosecutors and judges have more sympathy for violent criminals than they do for their victims. Her pick for Lieutenant Governor is a "defund the police" activist. The Cuomo/Hochul Parole Board has released 20 cop-killers in just the past two years and her "Less is More" program has freed hundreds of inmates before they've finished their sentences. When I'm governor, the coddling of criminals will end. We will roll back these radical laws and programs and we will put "justice" back into our criminal justice system. Victims' rights and the rights of law-abiding citizens will once again be the priority in New York. And, yes, we will fund and support our police, and not defame and defund them as the Democrats are dangerously doing. The fight to take back our state has already begun and I need your help to win. | Together we can do this. Rob Astorino Candidate for New York Governor. | | Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children. name: SCOTUS Alert via Nelson HQ
subject: BREAKING NEWS:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS:** Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring from the Supreme Court — giving President Biden his first chance to nominate someone to the Court.
As the Supreme Court slides further into disrepute with its radical rulings against workers, the environment, healthcare access, COVID science, abortion rights and worker rights, Justice Breyer has given the American people a gift with his long service.

**Now, with rulings coming up soon on voting rights, abortion access, and more, President Biden’s nomination for the vacant seat will have massive implications.**

[The nomination must stand up to the radical imbalance that currently exists on the court thanks to three Trump-nominated extremists — and be committed to protecting our rights. clean_body: | | | | | Gov. Steve Sisolak is relying on this grassroots team to help him take on his 9 Republican opponents and keep Nevada blue in 2022. Steve’s January fundraising deadline endsMONDAY at 11:59 pm\-- | | | Folks, We're sure you’ve been getting a ton of emails and ads about end-of-month fundraising deadlines these past few days. It may be a lot, but grassroots donations from supporters like you on emails like these are a huge help inpowering this movement for progress in Nevada. While we're sure you’ve gotten plenty of end-of-month fundraising asks in your inbox, if you can only chip in to one campaign, we hope you’ll make it Steve's. Steve Sisolak is up against 9 Republican opponents, each one more radical than the last, and they all want to flip Nevada bright red. Everything this team has worked for — defending reproductive freedom, expanding voting rights, supporting Nevada’s hardworking families — can all be gone in a flash if we can’t consistently hit our fundraising goals. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. There are a lot of pick-up opportunities and critical races we could win. But what is that going to do if we lose the House?? Our policy would be dictated by the far-right fringes of the Republican Party like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Speaker McCarthy would go right along with it. Josh represents one of the five toss-up seats we need to win so we have the votes to keep the gavel with Democrats. [**Ahead of the first major end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year, will you please rush in a donation right now so we can protect this seat and save the House from dangerous GOP extremists?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/V0TBOm61mDO4RXsOnADk1rI_YE25gBt5VVJMgCMWVuo=/2ev0CAAgHTgcOHe2inY0e3d2i3SciRh98pnf0EUf2kU=?refcode=E13634-20220126-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/V0TBOm61mDO4RXsOnADk1rI_YE25gBt5VVJMgCMWVuo=/2ev0CAAgHTgcOHe2inY0e3d2i3SciRh98pnf0EUf2kU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13634-20220126-EOM2-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

Let's be honest about the fact that we're up against a lot in this election. History says that when a President's party is in power, they usually lose seats. And our majority is razor-thin right now, even losing a single seat could cost us the majority.
Josh has already withstood millions of dollars of negative attack ads and now the Republicans are waging a massive Latino misinformation campaign online.
So yes, we have real challenges ahead. But we can't let these obstacles stop us from making progress because we are so close to having the votes for paid family leave, voting rights, climate action, universal pre-k, and the list goes on. There is so much more we can accomplish if we do our part to keep the House but it's going to take another historic effort like we saw in Georgia last year.
[**Your support is going to help us achieve our goals, so I hope you will chip in right now before Josh 's first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/V0TBOm61mDO4RXsOnADk1rI_YE25gBt5VVJMgCMWVuo=/2ev0CAAgHTgcOHe2inY0e3d2i3SciRh98pnf0EUf2kU=?refcode=E13634-20220126-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19)
We couldn't do this without you!
-- Camille Torres
_Campaign Manager, Josh Harder_

Team, we wanted to reach out and make sure you saw Chelsea’s message. As she works to build a future here in Ohio that makes us all proud, we're extremely excited to share her message with each of you. The strength of our campaign comes from supporters like you, and we are beyond grateful to have you along on this ride. Together, we are setting the stage for monumental change, turning the tide in our state and securing a future that is both people-centered and community-driven. Chelsea’s commitment to people over politics and partisanship is her strongest asset, and she promises that upon her election, it will never waver. [**Meeting this month’s deadline is the first step toward reaching our ultimate goal, and we're depending on you to help Chelsea get there. Supporters, Voting is a fundamental function of our democracy. It guarantees that each of us, regardless of our values and beliefs, has an avenue to hold our elected officials accountable. Over the past several years, voting rights have been under attack. Sparking from Trump's lies, lawmakers across the country are using dozens of attempts to delegitimize the sanctity of our electoral process and dilute our democracy. In November, Ohio’s Republican-packed legislature approved gerrymandered maps, reneging on voters' call for fairer representation. As if that wasn't enough, Secretary of State Frank LaRose did nothing, neglecting his duty to defend his constituents in favor of party politics. Republicans are playing with fire, and in order to protect our state, we must act now. The future of Ohio's elections is on the ballot in November, and if we miss this opportunity, Republicans could do irreparable damage. [**We have to raise $5,000 before midnight, but we need your help! clean_body: We wanted to reach out and make sure you saw Chelsea’s message. Chelsea needs us now. | = Team, we wanted to reach out and make sure you saw Chelsea’s message. As she works to build a future here in Ohio that makes us all proud, we're extremely excited to share her message with each of you. The strength of our campaign comes from supporters like you, and we are beyond grateful to have you along on this ride. Together, we are setting the stage for monumental change, turning the tide in our state and securing a future that is both people-centered and community-driven. Chelsea’s commitment to people over politics and partisanship is her strongest asset, and she promises that upon her election, it will never waver. = = Thank you, Team Clark \----------Begin Forwarded message--------- From: Chelsea Clark <info@chelseaforohio.com> Date: Mon, Jan 25, 2022 Subject: We can’t wait any longer To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Supporters, Voting is a fundamental function of our democracy. It guarantees that each of us, regardless of our values and beliefs, has an avenue to hold our elected officials accountable. Over the past several years, voting rights have been under attack. Sparking from Trump's lies, lawmakers across the country are using dozens of attempts to delegitimize the sanctity of our electoral process and dilute our democracy. In November, Ohio’s Republican-packed legislature approved gerrymandered maps, reneging on voters' call for fairer representation. As if that wasn't enough, Secretary of State Frank LaRose did nothing, neglecting his duty to defend his constituents in favor of party politics. Republicans are playing with fire, and in order to protect our state, we must act now. The future of Ohio's elections is on the ballot in November, and if we miss this opportunity, Republicans could do irreparable damage. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Desperate to avenge Trump's loss by any means necessary, they are resorting to voter suppression, conspiracy theories, and lies despite overwhelming evidence. clean_body: For less than the price of a Diet Coke or coffee, you can help us save our Republic from Democrats in Washington. For less than the price of a Diet Coke or coffee, you can help us save our Republic from Democrats in Washington. | Peter, If someone asked you to guess who the top fundraiser among Senate Democrats is right now, how would you answer? Would you guess Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer? Perhaps a senator who has run for president like Bernie Sanders or Elizabeth Warren? If you guessed any of the three senators above, you'd be wrong. The top fundraiser in the Senate - not just among Democrats but ALL candidates for either party - is our opponent in Georgia, Senator Raphael Warnock. In his first campaign in 2020, our opponent raised more than $150 MILLION dollars. He has an army of out-of-state donors that he has enlisted to help him raise millions once again this year. If this Senate contest is anything like the last one - which we fully expect it to be - our opponent will see an EVEN LARGER "avalanche of cash" headed his way. While our opponent has not yet announced his fundraising totals for the 4th quarter, his campaign brought in a record-setting $9 million from July through September. He already has more than $17.5 million cash in his campaign war chest to keep the Senate seat blue. We hope this gives you an idea as to what we're up against. We've never turned away from a challenge and don't intend to start now. Winning this Senate race is not going to be easy, but we can do it if we have the resources to communicate our message and build our campaign. Campaigns these days aren't won by a few people cutting massive checks; campaigns are won by thousands of grassroots conservatives taking a vested interest in a race and giving a few dollars each - just like we're asking you to do today. Think about it this way: $2.50 is a small price to pay to defend our great country from being torn to pieces by Democrats in Washington. Depending on where you live, $2.50 is even cheaper than buying a Diet Coke or cup of coffee. The polling shows this race is a dead heat, but we need your help to fully fund our campaign. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

To get the endorsement of a leader in Wisconsin such as Greta and a phenomenal organization such as WomenLead means so much to the movement that we are building. I am proud of the work that we've done so far. But, I know these endorsements are not enough to win the election. I also need your support. = = Thank you for supporting this campaign, – Ann Roe = = = *

name: Tara Pohlmeyer
subject: We got Warren!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Did you see the big news, Peter?
This morning Greg was endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren!
We're so proud of this endorsement, Peter. Sen. Warren has built her career taking on special interests and fighting for the little guy – which is exactly what Greg will do when he's elected.
Join Sen. Elizabeth Warren in supporting our get out the vote efforts. There's less than three weeks until early voting starts! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]
Thank you,
-Tara
Tara Pohlmeyer
Communications Director
--------- Forwarded message --------
From: Elizabeth Warren
Date: Wednesday, Jan 26, 2022
Subject: Greg needs this team’s help
Peter,
Today, I’m proud to announce my support for Greg Casar in the race for Texas’s 35th District.
Greg has a strong record of fighting for working families and standing up to powerful interests, which is exactly what we need in Congress.
But first, he needs this team’s support to send him to Washington.
If you can, will you support this people-powered campaign by donating $35 today to help get out the vote? His primary is coming right up on March 1 -- so your donation right now would go a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]Greg has fought to raise the wages of Austin’s lowest-income employees, worked with tenants to block evictions and boost affordable housing, and partnered with organizations like Planned Parenthood to stop the attacks on reproductive rights in Texas.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]People across this country are still hurting – and they need action on issues like affordable housing, immigration reform, voting rights, and our climate crisis that have been left unaddressed. They need members of Congress who will fight back against the assault on our democracy and on fundamental rights like the right to an abortion.
I’m proud to support Greg because I know he will join me in those fights. He will spend every day fighting for good jobs, a livable wage, Medicare for All, and reproductive freedom – things he has spent his career fighting for at the local level.
At this critical time in our country, we need leaders like Greg who will fight and deliver for working families. With less than a month until early voting starts, Greg needs this team’s support NOW to get out the vote. Can you chip in $35 to support Greg’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=warren&amount=35]
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Combat Veterans endorse Erik for Congress
body:
Read Erik's Full Biography
---
| | | | | | Volume 26 | January 26, 2022
---
|
---
| Combat Veterans for Congress Endorsement
---
| The Combat Veterans For Congress Political Action Committee has endorsed Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland in Colorado's District 7. Erik, a decorated combat veteran, is one of only 28 veterans running for Congress endorsed by the group. He went through a rigorous review process to qualify for the endorsement.
Combat Veterans for Congress has endorsed elected officials such as Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas, Congressman Dan Crenshaw of Texas, Congressman Jim Banks of Indiana, and Congressman Darrell Issa of California, among others.
Read their complete endorsement here:
---
|
---
| ENDORSEMENT OF THE 28th COMBAT VETERAN FOR CONGRESS RUNNING IN COLORADO'S 7th CONG DISTRICT IN 2022
Combat Veterans For Congress PAC Mission Statement The Combat Veterans For Congress Committee is dedicated to supporting the election of fiscally conservative Combat Veterans to Congress. We seek Combat Veterans For Congress who believe in limited government, will rein in the out of control spending of Congress, are committed to preserving and defending the US Constitution, and will support the independence and freedom of the individual as outlined in the Bill of Rights. We support Combat Veterans For Congress who are dedicated to promoting The Free Enterprise System that created the greatest economic engine in the history of mankind, who will provide for a strong national defense, and who will endorse the teaching of US history and the Founding Fathers' core values in educational institutions.
Combat Veterans For Congress-----Embedded Integrity The Combat Veterans For Congress PAC is endorsing Captain Erik A Aadland, USMA '02, USA as the 143rd endorsed Combat Veteran For Congress in 13 years. He is running for the vacant Congressional seat of Cong Ed Perlmutter (D-CO-7) who recently announced his retirement. CPT Aadland resides in Pine, Colorado. Following graduation from the US Military Academy at West Point, he served his country proudly in the US Army for 8 years and 7 months. CPT Aadland is a fiscally conservative candidate who will work to rein in the out-of-control spending by irresponsible Socialist Democrat members of Congress and will work toward reducing the national debt. He supports strengthening the US Armed Forces, Freedom of Speech & Religion, the 2nd Amendment's Right to Bear Arms, closing the wide-open southern border, The Free Enterprise System, and Pro-Life policies. He opposes Critical Race Theory, Socialism, and increased taxes.
Erik Aadland was born on January 4, 1980, in Huntsville, AL. He grew up in an Army family and moved over twenty times from Alabama to Kansas, Texas, Virginia, Missouri, and Germany. His father, Major General Anders B. Aadland, USA (Ret), was a career military officer for 34 years serving his country from 1969 to 2004; he held Brigade Command, Command of Fort Leonard Wood, MO, The Maneuver Support Center, and stood up the Installation Management Command.
While matriculating in a DOD High School in Heidelberg, Germany Erik played football, baseball, tennis, and wrestled graduating in May 1998. Erik received a Presidential appointment and entered the US Military Academy at West Point, New York in June 1998. While at West Point, he rowed crew and participated in intramural football, rugby, and wrestling graduating on June 1, 2002, with a Bachelor of Science Degree in Philosophy.
Cadet Erik Aadland was sworn into the US Army as a Second Lieutenant on June 1, 2002, at the US Military Academy at West Point, New York. On July 7, 2002, 2nd LT Aadland reported to the US Army Armor Officer Basic Course at Fort Knox, KY, he completed training on November 22, 2002, and was transferred to Fort Hood, TX to the 3rd Armor Battalion, 66th Regiment, 1st Brigade, 4th Infantry Division as an Assistant Operations Officer (A/S3).
In March 2003, in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom 2nd LT Aadland departed from Ft Hood with the 1st Battalion, 4th Infantry Division for Bayji, Iraq as an Assistant Operations Officer. Two months in theatre, 2nd LT Aadland assumed command of a Tank Platoon. His Tank Platoon was responsible for patrolling the city of Bayji, Iraq; 2nd LT Aadland personally conducted over 200 combat missions which included several engagements with the enemy.
On December 1, 2003, 2nd LT Aadland was promoted to First Lieutenant. Combat actions occurred in and around Bayji, Iraq. In March 2004, 1st LT Aadland returned to Fort Hood with the 1st Battalion and was assigned command of the Battalion Scout Platoon. For combat operation he was awarded the Bronze Star Medal (with Combat "V"), Army Commendation Medal, Army Achievement Medal, Overseas Service Ribbon, Combat Action Badge, various Service and Campaign Medals. He was subsequently assigned as Cavalry Troop Executive Officer (XO), then as Aide-de-Camp to the Deputy Commanding General of III Corps and Fort Hood.
On February 1, 2005, 1st LT Aadland reported to Scout Platoon Leaders Course at Ft Knox, completing training on February 20, 2005, and returned to Fort Hood, TX. On September 1, 2005, 2nd LT Aadland was promoted to Captain. On October 15, 2006, CPT Aadland reported to Captain's Career Course at Ft Knox, completing training on March 30, 2007. On April 6, 2007, CPT Aadland reported to Calvary Leader's Course in Ft Knox, completing training on April 29, 2007.
On April 30, 2007, he reported to the 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division and served on the Brigade Staff as Assistant Operations Officer and Force Modernization Officer. On November 16, 2008, CPT Aadland assumed command of C Troop, 8th Squadron, 1st Cavalry Regiment, 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division.
In July 2009, in support of Operation Enduring Freedom, CPT Aadland departed from Fort Lewis with C Troop, 8th Squadron, 1st Cavalry Regiment, 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division as Stryker Reconnaissance Troop Commander (Company-sized element) to Spin Boldak, Afghanistan (Kandahar District). His Command was responsible for the border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan, considered the second most important strategic location in theater. Combat actions occurred in and around Spin Boldak, in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan. During his deployment, his Troop was visited twice by ISAF Commanders GEN Stanley McCrystal, and GEN David Petraeus. In July 2010, CPT Aadland returned to Ft Lewis, WA with C Troop, and the 5th Stryker Brigade. For combat operations he was awarded the Bronze Star Medal, Meritorious Service Medal, Army Commendation Medal, Overseas Ribbon, the NATO Medal, various Service, and Campaign Medals.
CPT Aadland was posted to Ft Lewis and was assigned as Brigade Assistant Operations Officer (S3), Brigade Force Modernization Officer, then Troop Commander. After relinquishing command as Troop Commander, he then served as Battalion Assistant Operations Officer (S3) while transitioning out of the Army; on January 1, 2011, he resigned from the US Army.
Captain Erik Aadland's military awards include the Bronze Star Medal (with Combat "V"), Bronze Star Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Meritorious Service Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Army Commendation Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Army Achievement Medal, Overseas Service Ribbon (Bronze Star for 2nd award), the NATO Medal, the Combat Action Badge, various Service and Campaign Medals.
In June 2011, Erik Aadland accepted a position as Global Logistic Manager with Noble Energy, Inc. headquartered in Houston, TX, an upstream Oil and Natural Gas Exploration and Production Company that explores for Oil and/or Natural Gas, then produces hydrocarbon to be sold to a midstream company for transportation to a refinery. In August of 2012, Erik transitioned to a drilling assignment in the Mediterranean offshore Israel, then in March of 2013 was transferred to the Colorado Denver Julesburg Basin as a Company Man assigned to drilling rigs in Northern Colorado. In October of 2014, he was reassigned to the Denver office as a Drilling Engineer. With the downturn of the oil markets in 2014-2015, Erik assumed a position as the Regional Procurement Manager. In April 2017 he moved on to assume a role as, Business Integration Manager, then finally culminated his career at Noble Energy as an International Project Manager (from September 2018 to May 2020).
Most significantly, Erik managed a $300 million project in Israel with geo-political implications, where he was in charge of the construction of a pipeline and condensate gathering facility; critical path for the $5 Billion Leviathan Project that has made Israel a net-exporter of natural gas. He left Noble in May of 2020 to finalize his Master's Degree in Depth Psychology at Pacifica Graduate Institute, in Carpinteria, CA; his MA was conferred in April 2021. Prior to entering politics, Erik's desire was to become a counselor working with veterans and other trauma-victims suffering from PTSD.
Erik Aadland is a member of the American Legion, the VFW, the NRA, the AMVETS, and the US Military Academy Alumni Association. Erik has been endorsed by Cong Jack W. Bergman, LTG-USMCR (Ret) (R-MI-1), Cong Robert "Rob" Simmons, Col-USA/CIA (R-CT-Ret), Cong Paul Collins Broun, Cdr-USNR (MC) (R-GA-Ret), Cong Kerry Bentivolio, SFC/MI-ANG (R-MI-Ret), Colorado State Representative Andres Pico, Major General Anders B. Aadland, USA (Ret), Col Tom Duhs, USMC (Ret), and the Combat Veterans For Congress PAC. Erik and his wife Megan of 15 years have two daughters, Radiance (age 7 years), Aria (age 4 years), and one son, Fen (age 10 months). The Combat Veteran's For Congress PAC is pleased to endorse Captain Erik A. Aadland, USMA '02, USA who will bring to Congress extraordinary public sector and private sector skills and wisdom to better solve problems and represent the state of Colorado and the Republic. If you review CPT Aadland's positions on his web site, you will be pleased with his stands; they agree with the Combat Veterans For Congress Mission Statement. We look forward to working with CPT Aadland and are pleased that a Combat Veteran of his caliber is running for the US House of Representatives.
If you have friends, associates, or relatives who know voters in Colorado, kindly pass this e-mail on to them and ask them to support CPT Aadland by working in his campaign, providing financial support for his campaign in any amount, and/or by networking with others who would be willing to support his campaign. The military is one of the few remaining institutions producing the caliber of men needed to restore this nation to the greatness our Founding Fathers envisioned. We have endorsed another Combat Veteran For Congress that General George Washington would have approved of. A Veteran is someone who, at one point in his life, wrote a blank check made payable "to The United States of America" for an amount "up to and including his life."
Respectfully,
Joseph R. John, USNA '62 Capt USN (Ret)/Former FBI Co-Founder and Chairman, Combat Veterans For Congress PAC

We can really feel the momentum building in this campaign. We hope to see you on the campaign trail as together we find solutions so some of our nation's--and Colorado's--biggest issues.

clean_body: Read Erik's Full Biography | | | | | | Volume 26 | January 26, 2022 | | Combat Veterans for Congress Endorsement | The Combat Veterans For Congress Political Action Committee has endorsed Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland in Colorado's District 7. Erik, a decorated combat veteran, is one of only 28 veterans running for Congress endorsed by the group. He went through a rigorous review process to qualify for the endorsement. Combat Veterans for Congress has endorsed elected officials such as Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas, Congressman Dan Crenshaw of Texas, Congressman Jim Banks of Indiana, and Congressman Darrell Issa of California, among others. Read their complete endorsement here: | | ENDORSEMENT OF THE 28th COMBAT VETERAN FOR CONGRESS RUNNING IN COLORADO'S 7th CONG DISTRICT IN 2022 Combat Veterans For Congress PAC Mission Statement The Combat Veterans For Congress Committee is dedicated to supporting the election of fiscally conservative Combat Veterans to Congress. We seek Combat Veterans For Congress who believe in limited government, will rein in the out of control spending of Congress, are committed to preserving and defending the US Constitution, and will support the independence and freedom of the individual as outlined in the Bill of Rights. We support Combat Veterans For Congress who are dedicated to promoting The Free Enterprise System that created the greatest economic engine in the history of mankind, who will provide for a strong national defense, and who will endorse the teaching of US history and the Founding Fathers' core values in educational institutions. Combat Veterans For Congress-----Embedded Integrity The Combat Veterans For Congress PAC is endorsing Captain Erik A Aadland, USMA '02, USA as the 143rd endorsed Combat Veteran For Congress in 13 years. He is running for the vacant Congressional seat of Cong Ed Perlmutter (D-CO-7) who recently announced his retirement. CPT Aadland resides in Pine, Colorado. Following graduation from the US Military Academy at West Point, he served his country proudly in the US Army for 8 years and 7 months. CPT Aadland is a fiscally conservative candidate who will work to rein in the out-of-control spending by irresponsible Socialist Democrat members of Congress and will work toward reducing the national debt. He supports strengthening the US Armed Forces, Freedom of Speech & Religion, the 2nd Amendment's Right to Bear Arms, closing the wide-open southern border, The Free Enterprise System, and Pro-Life policies. He opposes Critical Race Theory, Socialism, and increased taxes. Erik Aadland was born on January 4, 1980, in Huntsville, AL. He grew up in an Army family and moved over twenty times from Alabama to Kansas, Texas, Virginia, Missouri, and Germany. His father, Major General Anders B. Aadland, USA (Ret), was a career military officer for 34 years serving his country from 1969 to 2004; he held Brigade Command, Command of Fort Leonard Wood, MO, The Maneuver Support Center, and stood up the Installation Management Command. While matriculating in a DOD High School in Heidelberg, Germany Erik played football, baseball, tennis, and wrestled graduating in May 1998. Erik received a Presidential appointment and entered the US Military Academy at West Point, New York in June 1998. While at West Point, he rowed crew and participated in intramural football, rugby, and wrestling graduating on June 1, 2002, with a Bachelor of Science Degree in Philosophy. Cadet Erik Aadland was sworn into the US Army as a Second Lieutenant on June 1, 2002, at the US Military Academy at West Point, New York. On July 7, 2002, 2nd LT Aadland reported to the US Army Armor Officer Basic Course at Fort Knox, KY, he completed training on November 22, 2002, and was transferred to Fort Hood, TX to the 3rd Armor Battalion, 66th Regiment, 1st Brigade, 4th Infantry Division as an Assistant Operations Officer (A/S3). In March 2003, in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom 2nd LT Aadland departed from Ft Hood with the 1st Battalion, 4th Infantry Division for Bayji, Iraq as an Assistant Operations Officer. Two months in theatre, 2nd LT Aadland assumed command of a Tank Platoon. His Tank Platoon was responsible for patrolling the city of Bayji, Iraq; 2nd LT Aadland personally conducted over 200 combat missions which included several engagements with the enemy. On December 1, 2003, 2nd LT Aadland was promoted to First Lieutenant. Combat actions occurred in and around Bayji, Iraq. In March 2004, 1st LT Aadland returned to Fort Hood with the 1st Battalion and was assigned command of the Battalion Scout Platoon. For combat operation he was awarded the Bronze Star Medal (with Combat "V"), Army Commendation Medal, Army Achievement Medal, Overseas Service Ribbon, Combat Action Badge, various Service and Campaign Medals. He was subsequently assigned as Cavalry Troop Executive Officer (XO), then as Aide-de-Camp to the Deputy Commanding General of III Corps and Fort Hood. On February 1, 2005, 1st LT Aadland reported to Scout Platoon Leaders Course at Ft Knox, completing training on February 20, 2005, and returned to Fort Hood, TX. On September 1, 2005, 2nd LT Aadland was promoted to Captain. On October 15, 2006, CPT Aadland reported to Captain's Career Course at Ft Knox, completing training on March 30, 2007. On April 6, 2007, CPT Aadland reported to Calvary Leader's Course in Ft Knox, completing training on April 29, 2007. On April 30, 2007, he reported to the 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division and served on the Brigade Staff as Assistant Operations Officer and Force Modernization Officer. On November 16, 2008, CPT Aadland assumed command of C Troop, 8th Squadron, 1st Cavalry Regiment, 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division. In July 2009, in support of Operation Enduring Freedom, CPT Aadland departed from Fort Lewis with C Troop, 8th Squadron, 1st Cavalry Regiment, 5th Stryker Brigade, 2nd Infantry Division as Stryker Reconnaissance Troop Commander (Company-sized element) to Spin Boldak, Afghanistan (Kandahar District). His Command was responsible for the border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan, considered the second most important strategic location in theater. Combat actions occurred in and around Spin Boldak, in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan. During his deployment, his Troop was visited twice by ISAF Commanders GEN Stanley McCrystal, and GEN David Petraeus. In July 2010, CPT Aadland returned to Ft Lewis, WA with C Troop, and the 5th Stryker Brigade. For combat operations he was awarded the Bronze Star Medal, Meritorious Service Medal, Army Commendation Medal, Overseas Ribbon, the NATO Medal, various Service, and Campaign Medals. CPT Aadland was posted to Ft Lewis and was assigned as Brigade Assistant Operations Officer (S3), Brigade Force Modernization Officer, then Troop Commander. After relinquishing command as Troop Commander, he then served as Battalion Assistant Operations Officer (S3) while transitioning out of the Army; on January 1, 2011, he resigned from the US Army. Captain Erik Aadland's military awards include the Bronze Star Medal (with Combat "V"), Bronze Star Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Meritorious Service Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Army Commendation Medal (Oak Leaf Cluster for 2nd award), Army Achievement Medal, Overseas Service Ribbon (Bronze Star for 2nd award), the NATO Medal, the Combat Action Badge, various Service and Campaign Medals. In June 2011, Erik Aadland accepted a position as Global Logistic Manager with Noble Energy, Inc. headquartered in Houston, TX, an upstream Oil and Natural Gas Exploration and Production Company that explores for Oil and/or Natural Gas, then produces hydrocarbon to be sold to a midstream company for transportation to a refinery. In August of 2012, Erik transitioned to a drilling assignment in the Mediterranean offshore Israel, then in March of 2013 was transferred to the Colorado Denver Julesburg Basin as a Company Man assigned to drilling rigs in Northern Colorado. In October of 2014, he was reassigned to the Denver office as a Drilling Engineer. With the downturn of the oil markets in 2014-2015, Erik assumed a position as the Regional Procurement Manager. In April 2017 he moved on to assume a role as, Business Integration Manager, then finally culminated his career at Noble Energy as an International Project Manager (from September 2018 to May 2020). Most significantly, Erik managed a $300 million project in Israel with geo-political implications, where he was in charge of the construction of a pipeline and condensate gathering facility; critical path for the $5 Billion Leviathan Project that has made Israel a net-exporter of natural gas. He left Noble in May of 2020 to finalize his Master's Degree in Depth Psychology at Pacifica Graduate Institute, in Carpinteria, CA; his MA was conferred in April 2021. Prior to entering politics, Erik's desire was to become a counselor working with veterans and other trauma-victims suffering from PTSD. Erik Aadland is a member of the American Legion, the VFW, the NRA, the AMVETS, and the US Military Academy Alumni Association. Erik has been endorsed by Cong Jack W. Bergman, LTG-USMCR (Ret) (R-MI-1), Cong Robert "Rob" Simmons, Col-USA/CIA (R-CT-Ret), Cong Paul Collins Broun, Cdr-USNR (MC) (R-GA-Ret), Cong Kerry Bentivolio, SFC/MI-ANG (R-MI-Ret), Colorado State Representative Andres Pico, Major General Anders B. Aadland, USA (Ret), Col Tom Duhs, USMC (Ret), and the Combat Veterans For Congress PAC. Erik and his wife Megan of 15 years have two daughters, Radiance (age 7 years), Aria (age 4 years), and one son, Fen (age 10 months). The Combat Veteran's For Congress PAC is pleased to endorse Captain Erik A. Aadland, USMA '02, USA who will bring to Congress extraordinary public sector and private sector skills and wisdom to better solve problems and represent the state of Colorado and the Republic. If you review CPT Aadland's positions on his web site, you will be pleased with his stands; they agree with the Combat Veterans For Congress Mission Statement. We look forward to working with CPT Aadland and are pleased that a Combat Veteran of his caliber is running for the US House of Representatives. If you have friends, associates, or relatives who know voters in Colorado, kindly pass this e-mail on to them and ask them to support CPT Aadland by working in his campaign, providing financial support for his campaign in any amount, and/or by networking with others who would be willing to support his campaign. The military is one of the few remaining institutions producing the caliber of men needed to restore this nation to the greatness our Founding Fathers envisioned. We have endorsed another Combat Veteran For Congress that General George Washington would have approved of. A Veteran is someone who, at one point in his life, wrote a blank check made payable "to The United States of America" for an amount "up to and including his life." Respectfully, Joseph R. John, USNA '62 Capt USN (Ret)/Former FBI Co-Founder and Chairman, Combat Veterans For Congress PAC | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | This week we continued with petition signing and celebration of small business with our Brewery Tour of CD7. Folks, the Democratic majority has been hard at work for the past year — and we have major gains to show for it. Recently we’ve brought home nearly $5 million to support Tribal housing projects in New Mexico through the _American Rescue Plan_. And already, we're preparing for the billions more coming from the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ for our state's airports, roads, and bridges. On top of that, $60 million was just allocated to New Mexico’s water infrastructure projects from the infrastructure bill, which is critical as we recover from and prepare for climate crisis-driven disasters. **But we can’t stop there.** In the coming months, we have the opportunity to pass legislation that will take urgent action addressing the climate crisis, protect and expand voting rights, lower everyday costs for families, and begin crucial wildlife conservation efforts. Not to mention, our campaign is hitting the ground running to elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot, from supporting local and state races, to raising funds for candidates in battleground Senate states and districts like Val Demings in Florida and Gabe Vasquez in New Mexico’s 2nd District. Our efforts are critical to building local Democratic power and defending our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering results for New Mexicans. **This kind of work takes strong grassroots resources, which is why I’m asking you ahead of our team’s big end-of-month deadline: Can you chip in any amount to power the work ahead?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41093809/327309989/1676867678?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTJjODQ2OC1mOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_-R8xc_Tn4kfsoHgSCK4tadGn2jq9cDwrrw_JiWx3M=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41093810/327309990/1676867678?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTJjODQ2OC1mOTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_-R8xc_Tn4kfsoHgSCK4tadGn2jq9cDwrrw_JiWx3M=)

But we can’t stop there. In the coming months, we have the opportunity to pass legislation that will take urgent action addressing the climate crisis, protect and expand voting rights, lower everyday costs for families, and begin crucial wildlife conservation efforts. Not to mention, our campaign is hitting the ground running to elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot, from supporting local and state races, to raising funds for candidates in battleground Senate states and districts like Val Demings in Florida and Gabe Vasquez in New Mexico’s 2nd District. Our efforts are critical to building local Democratic power and defending our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering results for New Mexicans. This kind of work takes strong grassroots resources, which is why I’m asking you ahead of our team’s big end-of-month deadline: Can you chip in any amount to power the work ahead? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

He praises Joe Biden and sides with radical liberals on almost every issue. **_Andy Kim has even voted with Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her Squad over 90% of the time in DC. _** **_He’s even a member of the extreme Progressive Caucus! The same group of radicals who want to open our borders, defund our police, radicalize our students, jack up taxes, and usher in socialism. _** [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=a4b08940ded4478eb6e79e6208819c84&_e=0-9C2wg5pUxgxXLF1rJ3gWl7f_OwoiDsyBEUCROlXVbK8SBySEAlmakRPhdJVfM2CPWnwInxZ4m0z8EgF_Tp11IZo_rNWQXplLtZGqZJle9ktfdEbAp40MFvD_YOhPqMP6fet5KS9eb_OwYeB90YmdDUyGqlClWIas5i7ojPLXCv4ri4VJa2rBwT0tVsslQJxhvGdsst_niMtYj3fOiyjqGthEaTH0jlxdYONp0n3IbjxU4JsuOmChR1g89RwlTn02G0yA2bVvKcc03VAtWtV45DCP954dhySaua_ODF0atkyYAC4AB2JWibsZf6rO_0YnRxyLxl5RddEPtr96CM4rRVBwhiXC1Q77nFZeJT5IPlTbdq2yeLn5px1mjsxV1qyBaNj2IAiDfVM8wBGeHYJAxm5M-5THWVqiB7_RJh0bfEhnVJbJJVPaQiEjnJ5aFl7gp0T_Pj1lbvUCOc6F26rKHIJEl2ia93iyu-eCVZ7Ak4r8I5mr0EQ7T_nndKeFhsF10meHaGH6avgoIJr6ikSg%3D%3D) _**I’m sorry, that is not our district. And Andy Kim should not be our Congressman.**_ [**Help Me Take Back NJ-03**](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=a4b08940ded4478eb6e79e6208819c84&_e=0-9C2wg5pUxgxXLF1rJ3gWl7f_OwoiDsyBEUCROlXVbK8SBySEAlmakRPhdJVfM2CPWnwInxZ4m0z8EgF_Tp11IZo_rNWQXplLtZGqZJle9ktfdEbAp40MFvD_YOhPqMP6fet5KS9eb_OwYeB90YmdDUyGqlClWIas5i7ojPLXCv4ri4VJa2rBwT0tVsslQJxhvGdsst_niMtYj3fOiyjqGthEaTH0jlxdYONp0n3IbjxU4JsuOmChR1g89RwlTn02G0yA2bVvKcc03VAtWtV45DCP954dhySaua_ODF0atkyYAC4AB2JWibsZf6rO_0WWwWkiBXBnkpEOg4U5Jc51YiylIrnfX60FlMCWVuhrPq9jTVT2NL-BrRCEh6BhJRak_2aH5DO_WGWUqOzx0ddybRLrZVvgKLoFKqjpuWhLNQ41OtwmnxE_i-VvvYyjbbUUwOfUdQDJonbcnfQMPZtM4pPNWB2XPwjPAd1T_ZHzOAxrb_ULTKuXLDzYeblJqcGJyBn2rqE-zw7XH6vK39fw%3D%3D) That’s why I’m running, friend. As a family man and local job creator, I know how badly radical liberal policies are hurting us. And I want to help stop this radical shift. clean_body: We need to defeat Andy Kim in November if we want to take back the House Friend, My name is Bob Healey Jr. and I’m a local job creator and small business owner running to represent the 3rd district in DC and take back Congress in the midterms. As someone who manages a payroll and is responsible for over one thousand employees at my company, I know that far-left liberals like Congressman Andy Kim are taking us in the wrong direction. My opponent Andy Kim pitches himself a centrist on the campaign trail, but in Congress, he isn’t. He praises Joe Biden and sides with radical liberals on almost every issue. Andy Kim has even voted with Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her Squad over 90% of the time in DC. He’s even a member of the extreme Progressive Caucus! The same group of radicals who want to open our borders, defund our police, radicalize our students, jack up taxes, and usher in socialism. I’m sorry, that is not our district. And Andy Kim should not be our Congressman. That’s why I’m running, friend. As a family man and local job creator, I know how badly radical liberal policies are hurting us. And I want to help stop this radical shift. But to be honest, I’m up against steep odds in November, and I really need your support. My campaign set a $10,000 fundraising goal for the month of January, and we’re running low on time. I would really appreciate your support in this end-of-month fundraising push. Hitting this goal would make a HUGE difference in our fight to take back Congress in the midterms. Thanks, Bob Healey | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O.
