name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Can you help support my friend Annie Kuster?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In 2021, we saw a wave of unprecedented attacks on reproductive rights around the country. New Hampshire politicians passed a law that bans abortions at 24 weeks, forces anyone seeking an abortion to get an ultrasound, and even criminalizes doctors who perform abortions.

Now that the ban has gone into effect, it will make it more difficult for people to get the care they need. My colleague and friend Annie Kuster represents NH-02 in Congress. She has been a fearless advocate for reproductive freedom, and we need her voice in Congress.

[**We are facing the first end-of-month deadline of the election year. Will you consider splitting a donation between Annie Kuster 's re-election campaign and mine to help us keep fighting for reproductive freedom?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/45p41sib6EP22yGKXoAqVWxD5JRXCqE0UwHB1v6qqfI=/ZznGercwJ5Aepa7ciycB28FvzbiEqSBLeO_zW6PV2LY=?refcode=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

I've been proud to work alongside a true public servant like Annie in Congress. Annie and I are both committed to protecting the right to choose and voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to enshrine that right in federal law.

There's no mistaking it, Peter -- reproductive rights are on the ballot in 2022. We need to defend our House majority to protect them.

[**Split a contribution of whatever you can between Annie 's campaign and ours. Together we can defend our Democratic House majority and protect reproductive rights.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/45p41sib6EP22yGKXoAqVWxD5JRXCqE0UwHB1v6qqfI=/ZznGercwJ5Aepa7ciycB28FvzbiEqSBLeO_zW6PV2LY=?refcode=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/45p41sib6EP22yGKXoAqVWxD5JRXCqE0UwHB1v6qqfI=/ZznGercwJ5Aepa7ciycB28FvzbiEqSBLeO_zW6PV2LY=?refcode=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

clean_body: Peter, In 2021, we saw a wave of unprecedented attacks on reproductive rights around the country. New Hampshire politicians passed a law that bans abortions at 24 weeks, forces anyone seeking an abortion to get an ultrasound, and even criminalizes doctors who perform abortions. Now that the ban has gone into effect, it will make it more difficult for people to get the care they need. My colleague and friend Annie Kuster represents NH-02 in Congress. She has been a fearless advocate for reproductive freedom, and we need her voice in Congress. I've been proud to work alongside a true public servant like Annie in Congress. Annie and I are both committed to protecting the right to choose and voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to enshrine that right in federal law. There's no mistaking it, Peter -- reproductive rights are on the ballot in 2022. We need to defend our House majority to protect them. It's an honor to represent you, Derek Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Dr. William Figlesthaler
subject: A friend in need
body:
I know I don’t write often, but when I do, it is extremely important. As many of you know, the Naples...
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| Peter,
I hope the new year is treating you well.
I know I don't write often, but when I do, it is extremely important. As many of you know, the Naples City Council elections are taking place next week and things are coming down to the wire.
Candidates [Terry Hutchison](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vd-mMcAV4EUKYoFS3vqKiNxp5BvjsT7__GH1eSiAb-e0U5PJRZCrPDDWYPZKM-hQki5vltTVLYIF5eUd8SKFMwkBBnTC6WjciHFAAw61vP8D6D4I-fqbk9wmHiVTewSwgYakoAQiFhxOFmQ9QgM-or5JVhLgC-D_&c=cU9pILaTZQl5nZqFx7JmeDtifn5Eyo65M-KZTKrcZIl_swUoOsVnhg==&ch=bfBIGMlNZobMESeKplZAYuZ25yAxjEiEQQ-22psk3T3ahlP53GHScA==) and [Beth Petrunoff](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vd-mMcAV4EUKYoFS3vqKiNxp5BvjsT7__GH1eSiAb-e0U5PJRZCrPDDWYPZKM-hQbQb4LqG9KiTkJSVGUxztU0PSC8xv5WNlStWMglLzUPO4zVX5kklH4sdDv8p1Qdy87Ntg7mrJcVXcQryWI7SSrF1CvlHGC72l&c=cU9pILaTZQl5nZqFx7JmeDtifn5Eyo65M-KZTKrcZIl_swUoOsVnhg==&ch=bfBIGMlNZobMESeKplZAYuZ25yAxjEiEQQ-22psk3T3ahlP53GHScA==) are true America First Conservatives, and we must do everything in our power to ensure they are elected.
Failing to do so could threaten the future of our beautiful Naples community FOREVER.
Beth and Terry are under attack from special interest groups looking to destroy the culture and serenity we have come to know and love. I simply cannot stand by and watch this happen.
I am launching an emergency support fund to help get Terry and Beth across the finish line.
Will you join me in supporting their efforts?
---
| | | [TERRY'S EMERGENCY FUND](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vd-mMcAV4EUKYoFS3vqKiNxp5BvjsT7__GH1eSiAb-e0U5PJRZCrPDDWYPZKM-hQcupYEQnEu2DowOebFf9vDu5A32KTaStmx_D2kgN7fdjClzx83MeHakbW6j8adaPivtKaltcm_aNoNFYdg9j57AFEbZHV42zBjzDlZIQdlNk=&c=cU9pILaTZQl5nZqFx7JmeDtifn5Eyo65M-KZTKrcZIl_swUoOsVnhg==&ch=bfBIGMlNZobMESeKplZAYuZ25yAxjEiEQQ-22psk3T3ahlP53GHScA==)
---
| | | [BETH'S EMERGENCY FUND](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vd-mMcAV4EUKYoFS3vqKiNxp5BvjsT7__GH1eSiAb-e0U5PJRZCrPDDWYPZKM-hQpqAnjtopySePyQZcEDg-HiZly_J4xCqCNqXVbG8Yy7jbJ12n3wpZ5zDJ44mMiyQj6meDeIKWHGeybKz9SHUfnwDLIRtevIyb&c=cU9pILaTZQl5nZqFx7JmeDtifn5Eyo65M-KZTKrcZIl_swUoOsVnhg==&ch=bfBIGMlNZobMESeKplZAYuZ25yAxjEiEQQ-22psk3T3ahlP53GHScA==)
---
| |
---
| Will you help me ensure that the City of Naples stays under the control of our residents, and not the control of out-of-town special interest groups?
---

I know I don't write often, but when I do, it is extremely important. As many of you know, the Naples City Council elections are taking place next week and things are coming down to the wire. Candidates == and == are true America First Conservatives, and we must do everything in our power to ensure they are elected. Failing to do so could threaten the future of our beautiful Naples community FOREVER. Beth and Terry are under attack from special interest groups looking to destroy the culture and serenity we have come to know and love. I simply cannot stand by and watch this happen. I am launching an emergency support fund to help get Terry and Beth across the finish line. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41094897/327315018/-1402403301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=) Friend, With Texas’ first-in-the-nation primary just a few weeks away, Team Lizzie is hard at work! Some good news to report this week! The Texas AFL-CIO, with the recommendation of the Texas Gulf Coast Area Labor Federation, endorsed Lizzie for the 2022 election, a testament of her commitment to working people across our community and our state. In addition, the Houston Black American Democrats endorsed Lizzie this week as she continues to fight to eliminate barriers to participate fully in the democratic process and ensure Black Americans have their voices heard. Last Saturday, we marked 49 years since the Supreme Court handed down its decision in _Roe v. Wade_ , a case brought by bold Texas women challenging unjust and unconstitutional laws banning abortion. Lizzie and several of her congressional colleagues spoke out on abortion rights in _Ms. Magazine_ to mark the occasion. You can check out the piece and her quotation [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41094898/327315019/435614882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=&emci=75c75e55-f57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d40a54c6-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=30230943). As a long-time advocate for choice, Lizzie is proud to have earned the support of Planned Parenthood Action Fund in her re-election campaign for TX-07 this cycle. With women’s reproductive rights under attack in Texas, Lizzie will continue to fight for our privacy, dignity, freedom, and care. With five weeks to go until the March 1 Primary Election, we are focused on talking to new voters in TX-07 and making sure they have the information they need to cast their ballots in March and again in November. It's time for a **#TeamLizzie Day of Action!** Lace up your walking shoes and help us get the word out ahead of Primary Election Day to our #TX07 neighbors. **[Click here to join us](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41094899/327315021/1668001579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=&emci=75c75e55-f57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d40a54c6-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=30230943) **on **Saturday, Feb. 12** or **Saturday, Feb. 26**. Or both! Want to talk to more voters? **[Click here to sign up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41094900/327315023/1354238547?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=&emci=75c75e55-f57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d40a54c6-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=30230943) **for our weekly phonebanks! Thank you for being a part of #TeamLizzie. [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41094902/327315025/1526843992?refcode=120721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=) Lizzie Fletcher for Congress | 3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636 | Houston, TX 77098 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/75c75e55-f57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/d40a54c6-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBhNTRjNi1mZDdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnw9OeHZqEyhKVR84kvwg5IW0bVvtyeNXkaNYjkibYs=&id=136196035).

name: Tom Perez
subject: Team, workers need to get paid. PERIOD.
body:
America's workforce is changing, and Maryland is no exception.

Team,

America's workforce is changing significantly across the country, and Maryland is no exception.

Last week, a member of Maryland's own Governor’s Council confessed during a public hearing that his agency is critically understaffed, affecting their ability to do their jobs. This is not the first time we've heard something like this from Annapolis.**For the past _seven years_ , the vital services that protect Maryland's environment, economy, and the health and safety of our residents have been compromised because of inadequate staffing and underpayment.**

Maryland workers inside the government and out deserve to have competitive salaries and adequate support to do their jobs, and right now **executive leadership in Annapolis just isn't getting the job done.**

I've fought for workers my entire career – first, as Maryland Labor Secretary where we passed the nation's first living wage law, and again as U.S. Labor Secretary. **I know what it takes to make government work for the hardworking people of Maryland, and I have a plan to get us there.**

**_[Click here to read my plan to ensure Maryland’s workers not only have access to good-paying, secure jobs but the in-demand skills and resources they need to thrive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095252/327315979/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzY3ODljNC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k9X8IHo8gfYJEwWtgvrofj3ECQULpqYBuS4uO8tzOKU=&emci=b74eb98f-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9c6789c4-fe7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[READ MY JOBS PLAN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095253/327315980/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzY3ODljNC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k9X8IHo8gfYJEwWtgvrofj3ECQULpqYBuS4uO8tzOKU=&emci=b74eb98f-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9c6789c4-fe7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
Team, I've stood shoulder to shoulder with the labor movement, fighting for worker's rights my entire career in public service. I can tell you that creating jobs, ensuring our government prioritizes workers inside and out of public service, and strengthening Maryland's economy won't happen overnight.

I'm running for governor because I believe Maryland has a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build a future where workers know they have a voice and the government finally works for the people it serves.

**_[Take a look at my plan to learn more about how we’ll get there – together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095254/327315981/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzY3ODljNC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k9X8IHo8gfYJEwWtgvrofj3ECQULpqYBuS4uO8tzOKU=&emci=b74eb98f-fd7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9c6789c4-fe7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
Thank you,

Tom

P.S. We can shape our emerging workforce into one that listens to workers and creates good paying jobs that actually allow folks to provide for their families – but I can only do it with your help. **_[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to ensure we bring sustainable, good paying jobs to Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095255/327315982/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-plan&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzY3ODljNC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k9X8IHo8gfYJEwWtgvrofj3ECQULpqYBuS4uO8tzOKU=)_**
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095256/327315983/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-plan&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzY3ODljNC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k9X8IHo8gfYJEwWtgvrofj3ECQULpqYBuS4uO8tzOKU=)******

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Justice Breyer
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
News just broke that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring. The reality of today’s politics is the moment a spot opens on the high court, there is no time for reflection. Right-wing media and the GOP’s dark money donors go into hyperdrive, so we must also spring into action. And that moment of action is now. When President Biden nominates a qualified person for the Supreme Court — and he will — Democrats must see them confirmed. **_Period._** Everything is on the line. Voting rights, workers’ rights, health care, a woman’s right to choose, our democracy, and so so much more. When it comes to the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has no qualms about blocking nominees. Or ramming through his picks as we saw most recently with Amy Coney Barrett. (Let’s not forget she was sworn in just 8 days before the 2020 election, when over 65 million votes were already cast in an election Trump lost.) **So right now – we must be forceful and act swiftly to make sure that Biden’s nominee will be confirmed. Otherwise, the conservative imbalance on the Supreme Court will go on indefinitely. If you’re with me, chip in $10 or anything that is meaningful to you. Let’s fight for a well-qualified and thoughtful justice on the Supreme Court.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | **[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095434/327316597/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk5NWRmMC1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kicjsa2LSIHoK_yDGv9dGCdAft8AJQwyVLJzFK0mKdQ=)**

clean_body: | News just broke that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring. The reality of today’s politics is the moment a spot opens on the high court, there is no time for reflection. Right-wing media and the GOP’s dark money donors go into hyperdrive, so we must also spring into action. And that moment of action is now. When President Biden nominates a qualified person for the Supreme Court — and he will — Democrats must see them confirmed. Period. Everything is on the line. Voting rights, workers’ rights, health care, a woman’s right to choose, our democracy, and so so much more. When it comes to the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has no qualms about blocking nominees. Or ramming through his picks as we saw most recently with Amy Coney Barrett. (Let’s not forget she was sworn in just 8 days before the 2020 election, when over 65 million votes were already cast in an election Trump lost.) So right now – we must be forceful and act swiftly to make sure that Biden’s nominee will be confirmed. Otherwise, the conservative imbalance on the Supreme Court will go on indefinitely. If you’re with me, chip in $10 or anything that is meaningful to you. Let’s fight for a well-qualified and thoughtful justice on the Supreme Court. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Let’s seize this moment. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

**BREAKING NEWS: Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer just announced his retirement — opening a critical Supreme Court seat.** This is coming at a time when our reproductive rights are facing attacks like never before. And this Spring, the Supreme Court is expected to rule in a case that could restrict or even overturn _Roe v. Wade_ for good. We can’t take any chances. Republicans including Pat Toomey have already tried to stop our agenda in the Senate — we can’t begin to imagine the damage Dr. Oz or Dave McCormick would do. You can count on Val to support justices who will uphold _Roe_ when she’s in the Senate. Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch have already worked to undermine our rights on the Supreme Court.

clean_body: | BREAKING NEWS: Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer just announced his retirement — opening a critical Supreme Court seat. This is coming at a time when our reproductive rights are facing attacks like never before. And this Spring, the Supreme Court is expected to rule in a case that could restrict or even overturn Roe v. Wade for good. We can’t take any chances. Republicans including Pat Toomey have already tried to stop our agenda in the Senate — we can’t begin to imagine the damage Dr. Oz or Dave McCormick would do. You can count on Val to support justices who will uphold Roe when she’s in the Senate. It’s time we brought that courageous leadership to the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch have already worked to undermine our rights on the Supreme Court. At every turn, Justice Breyer has been outspoken in protecting abortion rights and defending our democracy. We need to honor his legacy and fill his seat with someone who is ready to protect our rights on the Supreme Court. = Thanks, Team Val = Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. name: Governor Roy Cooper
subject: a personal request for Cheri Beasley
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
There is no one more prepared to flip this seat and do the hard work of representing North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.

#
Hey team -
This month I enthusiastically endorsed Cheri Beasley. There is no one more prepared to flip this seat and do the hard work of representing North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.
As someone who knows what it takes to win, I can tell you Cheri’s got it. She’s honest and trustworthy and will always put in the hard work to fight for the people of North Carolina.
[**I’m personally asking you to join me in supporting Cheri by making a $3 contribution to her campaign today. Her general election is starting now, and it is going to take a lot of grassroots support to compete with Republicans’ dark money attacks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220126-1-ma&refcode2=303.357359.IIazXA&t=2&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA)
When I appointed Cheri Beasley to be the Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court, I said she was the right person at the right time. That is even more true today.
Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator.
As a judge, Cheri’s shown her independence and commitment to justice. As a mother, she understands the concerns of parents and families. And as a woman of faith, she believes in public service and working to ensure no North Carolinians are left behind.
Cheri understands that the status quo is not working for our families. She will fight to make desperately needed progress in the Senate — on health care, education, climate change, and so much more.
[**Will you please donate $3 or whatever you can to help us send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? This is one of the most competitive and important races anywhere in the country in 2022, but if we have Cheri’s back, we can win North Carolina — trust me on that.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220126-1-ma&refcode2=303.357359.IIazXA&t=3&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA)
This is a historic moment for our great state, and I’m grateful for anything you can spare to help us turn this Senate seat blue.
\- Roy Cooper
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220126-1-ma&refcode2=303.357359.IIazXA&t=4&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220126-1-ma&refcode2=303.357359.IIazXA&t=5&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=303_357359_IIazXA&akid=303%2E357359%2EIIazXA) today to help us make history.

name: Susan Wild
subject: I didn’t come to Congress to make a profit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I came to Congress to work for my constituents, not to make a profit.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095810/327317993/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220126-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2RlMjMyMi0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOELwmGuLxkgxwHPJitmToJgRcFvKn94rCc7XxUTU24=)

| Peter,

This week, I joined nearly 30 of my House colleagues to voice our opposition to members of Congress owning or trading stocks while in office. Two pieces of legislation have already been introduced to address this issue: the Ban Conflicted Trading Act and the TRUST in Congress Act. I am proud to be a co-sponsor of both and I stand with my colleagues in calling for leadership to bring these bills to the House floor for a vote.

**It’s simple, Peter: I came to Congress to work for my constituents, not to make a profit.** **I would hope the same is true of my colleagues.** This issue has overwhelming bipartisan support from voters and lawmakers alike, and it’s high time we do something about it.

[_**If you support my work to prevent lawmakers from profiting off nonpublic information, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095811/327317994/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220126-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2RlMjMyMi0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOELwmGuLxkgxwHPJitmToJgRcFvKn94rCc7XxUTU24=)

subject: I've made it official!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I have a message for my opponents: You’re going to have one hell of a time taking me down. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7cd58911d5c047a5b5dd033fc039cef6&_e=43N9V6NDrYTbWz4A7GT8nzijFvDooC008mlhTjCrRnm1YLR6yw8e_2PJ4U7BEegefofzgD9_YP3g96jypUBGHouuH49OiE7uWDq1bCj8o0c1BNyMo32GTIOIQl9vjOEpe-sFo9skdGuWN9z07v2XwHFQy5bEWSPoJxEEsXbAY88GcTaohhFABniciXcO94OHNVntwh67UWkjx0DeIhheMED0Sf2pkm6r8xGlpuY_yYKU4HBQ2_QKGTBW0jcNNFh-kfdr6lRW4HtTV0jS29vyGizckTchw4JW1b8_V4SAwf9l4w6EwqDKv7KLDsmAQpeKYyPR0jWsk09gKEXCK7rtOTW_vg5mGFdA9jlGcZL5OASMy1fAOArYEfF3Eu5ZMUfWjSiPR9o5YmR_VqRJQqv2l2S_wLN6DH0e2sZDWAMdYE0SlwTcZL3rcu8Oh-1bIAgX4Y2S9Y3FPbZBWgghkEnxiA%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Today I officially filed the paperwork to run in the Republican congressional primary in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District!**

To say that were excited about this opportunity is an understatement. I hope my opponents are reading this today because I have one message for them: You’re going to have one hell of a time taking me down.

While we’re no longer running against one of the most senior members of the House, **we know that we’re going to be up against someone who believes in the same policies he worked nearly 40 years to implement** ; we’re also keenly aware that our opponent will be well funded. While we don’t presently have the resources, we’re going to need to run the same caliber race we ran back in 2020, we know that when the time comes, **[so too will the money](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7cd58911d5c047a5b5dd033fc039cef6&_e=43N9V6NDrYTbWz4A7GT8nzijFvDooC008mlhTjCrRnm1YLR6yw8e_2PJ4U7BEegefofzgD9_YP3g96jypUBGHouuH49OiE7uWDq1bCj8o0c1BNyMo32GTIOIQl9vjOEpe-sFo9skdGuWN9z07v2XwHFQy5bEWSPoJxEEsXbAY88GcTaohhFABniciXcO94OHNVntwh67UWkjx0DeIhheMED0Sf2pkm6r8xGlpuY_yYKtcyOhBnEK4k4vYW_8S5J5a02osOLvFusC2cBDlaAi3P7dLlAnZ4pqfDhiHoV7nITicrltTW-1uFxrp4ru73yMGm-QIlrYQO0YfOZWchoD6vPHyjecoZWbZUci1WpzRPGpABTArJQu-mGBNZVwOSjc6Bom93gO6SXVvZs4J4W7_-njDicjlSbZmItE_BcO5kzXOzwPQPU2rsG3obBW3b9H7MuBvW0Etk-jSQqW31vD3g%3D%3D)**.

DONATE $1 TODAY-> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7cd58911d5c047a5b5dd033fc039cef6&_e=43N9V6NDrYTbWz4A7GT8nzijFvDooC008mlhTjCrRnm1YLR6yw8e_2PJ4U7BEegefofzgD9_YP3g96jypUBGHouuH49OiE7uWDq1bCj8o0c1BNyMo32GTIOIQl9vjOEpe-sFo9skdGuWN9z07v2XwHFQy5bEWSPoJxEEsXbAY88GcTaohhFABniciXcO94OHNVntwh67UWkjx0DeIhheMED0Sf2pkm6r8xGlpuY_yYIs6pcB3I8NdWfE-rRFPl1ND-cNWtaQSm1U3MfrbqQiDix69BDGq5uRs9CGr-nT3BlYWPDlOCpuky7v0V59aKXBJuMhyndrO-0j4I_Oe4oyi4fyW7oPulthBKkfxEzROO6rn7oduurQq_vFIaLy1KMtVmC56xmEu9x3ZliheT0Q751P0MnQzigAk0FEXgsNjWULfwJohHDZ434IWhtibBzfZV0si7QRTwXT_-WKa9Wzug%3D%3D)

On the occasion of my filing my official statement of candidacy this morning, I’m coming to you with a humble request: **[Please consider sending a contribution of $3 or more right now](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7cd58911d5c047a5b5dd033fc039cef6&_e=43N9V6NDrYTbWz4A7GT8nzijFvDooC008mlhTjCrRnm1YLR6yw8e_2PJ4U7BEegefofzgD9_YP3g96jypUBGHouuH49OiE7uWDq1bCj8o0c1BNyMo32GTIOIQl9vjOEpe-sFo9skdGuWN9z07v2XwHFQy5bEWSPoJxEEsXbAY88GcTaohhFABniciXcO94OHNVntwh67UWkjx0DeIhheMED0Sf2pkm6r8xGlpuY_yYI9Ne9BSNOW1_JWJ2CwLLVWYH1xpvQGNXL9p-VjCC-Fw2EVl-cMt020estiqxM1fHm8XPIp5wKMuvCmGpt_EfKju74fMH9eU47CIErn69S-cx-Pl_-pJhoaULwVDHH7Sfv3eBiKkZ00lhkAt7JTU7iJ85tnwZw-F6iuqjAnU4Ke0KuNVPTjre2JAXUhss_tDr82UlTeuGDf50Eio97Z5R3JQ2Bgmvq9Jfq12rFcktYwdg%3D%3D)**. We’re hoping that with your help, we can raise $5,000 by the end of the day today. Our campaign was so successful last cycle because of the generosity of small dollar donors.

The stakes in this year’s election are just as high as they were in 2020. So please, **don’t wait until later in the year to help our campaign meet its financial goals**. There is no better time to get involved than today.

Thank you for your consideration,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I have a message for my opponents: You’re going to have one hell of a time taking me down. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Today I officially filed the paperwork to run in the Republican congressional primary in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District! To say that were excited about this opportunity is an understatement. I hope my opponents are reading this today because I have one message for them: You’re going to have one hell of a time taking me down. While we’re no longer running against one of the most senior members of the House, we know that we’re going to be up against someone who believes in the same policies he worked nearly 40 years to implement ; we’re also keenly aware that our opponent will be well funded. While we don’t presently have the resources, we’re going to need to run the same caliber race we ran back in 2020, we know that when the time comes, . On the occasion of my filing my official statement of candidacy this morning, I’m coming to you with a humble request: . We’re hoping that with your help, we can raise $5,000 by the end of the day today. Our campaign was so successful last cycle because of the generosity of small dollar donors. The stakes in this year’s election are just as high as they were in 2020. So please, don’t wait until later in the year to help our campaign meet its financial goals. There is no better time to get involved than today. Thank you for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Hey Peter!
Thank you to everyone who took our 2022 kick-off survey! Here’s what you told us about the most important issues facing Tennesseans this year:
* **Voting rights** (79% of respondents identified this as an issue of top concern). Years of gerrymandering and systematic voter suppression by the state GOP have made Tennessee politics undemocratic, corrupt, and out of touch.

* **Healthcare** (70%). Gov. Lee has passed up billions of dollars to fund healthcare, Tennessee leads the nation in per capita medical bankruptcies, and also leads the nation in per capita hospital closures. Our state’s healthcare system is in dire need of reform, and Lee’s tenure has only made it worse.

* **COVID-19**(67%). Here’s what one person we surveyed said about the handling of the pandemic: “I just feel like Gov. Lee and our Tennessee government has neglected the needs of people who are high risk for Covid 19. _It seems he has done everything to hurt us, not to help us._ ”

We can do so, so much better. But instead of us telling you that, take it from some of your fellow Tennesseans, who said things like this when asked what they were most looking forward to in 2022:
_“I would like to see politicians in my state care as much about the people they’re elected to serve as they do about corporations and big businesses.”_ — Janet
_“A return to sanity and a rejection of hate and intolerance.”_ — John
_“A balanced, less extreme approach to government in Tennessee.”_ — Tanya
Together, we can build a Tennessee that works for ALL of us — one that’s rooted in compassion, empathy, and honesty. Two critical deadlines are right around the corner: | Friend — Matt here with an update on our race. This email’s longer than usual, but it lays out just how important this next week is to our campaign’s success, so I hope you’ll read to the end. **[_(If you’re already with us in the fight to flip Ohio blue, we need your support more than ever: Please, contribute any amount to our campaign immediately.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095972/327318684/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1ZDVmOC0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSPCglHHH8z-O5QPCIPuSMjbkjYRcmCtI8v56Fe64Kw=)** Two critical deadlines are right around the corner:
* **JAN 31st** is our deadline to report all the money we raised in 2021 and through this month
* **FEB 2nd** is the deadline to get John and Teresa officially on the ballot for the primary election

The thing is, we have a kind of good news/bad news situation going on. _THE DOWNSIDE:_ Last time finance reports were made public, DeWine came out on top — he reported raising over $3 million and had a war chest of $6.6 million _($4 million of which he**loaned to himself).**_ **[_We absolutely have to bring in more this time around, friend. Otherwise, DeWine will be able to build on his momentum from the summer and go into election season with the upper hand. You can help by chipping in any amount immediately >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095975/327318687/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1ZDVmOC0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSPCglHHH8z-O5QPCIPuSMjbkjYRcmCtI8v56Fe64Kw=)** _**[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095978/327318690/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1ZDVmOC0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSPCglHHH8z-O5QPCIPuSMjbkjYRcmCtI8v56Fe64Kw=)**_ Now, we do have a few things working for us already. _THE UPSIDE:_
* Ohioans are sick and tired of corrupt, one-party GOP rule.
* 3 Ohio unions, 12 current and former state legislators, 7 current mayors, and countless community, faith, and civil rights leaders are supporting the Cranley-Fedor ticket.
* John’s the candidate who stands up for voting rights, not making it harder for Ohioans to cast a ballot.
* Our campaign actually has a plan to grow the job market, revitalize our communities, and get Ohio back on track.

But the fact is, running a successful campaign takes resources. **We won’t have the chance to prove that John is the leader who can turn this state around if we don’t play the money game — a game that Mike DeWine is currently _winning._** With so much on the line this week, we’ll be reaching out more often for your support. **[_Please, rush a donation before our critical deadlines to keep us in this game >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095981/327318693/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.ed15d5f8-017f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1ZDVmOC0wMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSPCglHHH8z-O5QPCIPuSMjbkjYRcmCtI8v56Fe64Kw=)** John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

subject: Jeff Warner For Congress Prayer Reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Please Join Us In Prayer | | | |
---
|
# **Prayer Call**
---
| | |
## 26 January 22
**You're Invited To Join Us In Prayer**
The effective prayer of a righteous man can accomplish much. James 5:16b

Jeff Warner believes in the power of prayer. We need God's blessing and guidance.
You're invited to join us every Thursday morning via zoom to pray.
The link is the same each week.
7:30-7:45a
[https://us02web.zoom.us/j/88420024706](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=8167d259d4&e=12a37459a2)

Please do not post this link on social media or mass distribute it.
We need to safeguard Jeff Warner's ability to freely pray.

Once in the zoom prayer room, a host will guide us through the prayer time.
Please keep your audio & video muted to avoid background noises and distractions.
Only mute/unmute your audio to pray.
Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=63774b211c&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")

I’m doing everything I can to support our veterans

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41096098/327319362/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIwZGEzYy0wMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zcKInp_NQfc2xMrTzTu2S48dqg5hXxnxCYaRG6Kyvc=)
---
Peter, this is a longer email about our veterans. Sadly, I know some people will just delete this email without reading it or look the other way, but I hope you're not one of them. This is very important.

U.S. military veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests around the world. That’s why I believe our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

**And as the chairman for the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am hard at work to make sure our government lives up to that duty.

But sadly, our committee has found a serious, unique threat to veterans: Veterans are being targeted by violent, right-wing extremist groups for recruitment.**

We’ve also found that on Jan. 6, more than 10% of the insurrectionists had ties to the military. Veteran Ashli Babbitt was even shot dead by police while attempting to break into the House chamber.

Right-wing recruitment of veterans is a serious problem that would not only affect veterans but could further political violence in our country. So, I’m working day after day to protect veterans from this threat while also addressing other concerns that affect our veterans like ensuring access to critical benefits and health care.

**But troublingly, Republican lawmakers on the Veterans’ Committee have attempted to obstruct our work and attacked me personally for addressing these subjects.**

[**Peter, in a tough midterm year, Republicans will be targeting me for pushing strong progressive policies and protecting vulnerable Americans like our veterans. In order to fight back, my campaign has set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the month. Can I count on you to chip in $3 to support my campaign and my work in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41096099/327319363/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220126_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIwZGEzYy0wMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zcKInp_NQfc2xMrTzTu2S48dqg5hXxnxCYaRG6Kyvc=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41096106/327319370/301334478?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220126_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIwZGEzYy0wMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zcKInp_NQfc2xMrTzTu2S48dqg5hXxnxCYaRG6Kyvc=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Ukraine is another Afghanistan - What a Shame
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden is not qualified to be Commander in Chief |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b95f946aed&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I was a soldier for more than 20 years in combat zones. Here's what I know:

WHEN YOU HAVE TO EVACUATE TWO U.S. EMBASSIES IN SIX MONTHS, YOU ARE A BAD COMMANDER IN CHIEF!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d2b2b0e895&e=afa21b7626), a swing district south of Orlando. The country apparently needs my military expertise in Congress, because Biden is dangerously incompetent in addition to being illegitimate!**

I can't believe the utter stupidity of this regime in military affairs. It's like they are committed to lose wars and make us look awful while doing so.

First, less than 6 months ago, we had the utter collapse of Afghanistan. We rolled up shop, retreated with our tails between our legs, and let the Taliban have $85 billion of US military equipment in the process.

13 brave soldiers died trying to defend a rushed and poorly planned evacuation.

It was the first embassy evacuation since Saigon. A national disgrace.

**What's so crazy is that he is repeating the mistakes in Ukraine! **
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fb4fec4ce5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports:

_Last week, U.S. officials told Fox News that the State Department is ordering families of U.S. Embassy staff in Kyiv, Ukraine, to begin evacuating, and that they will encourage Americans to leave the country on commercial flights while they remain available.

Moscow has massed tens of thousands of troops along the Ukraine border, prompting fears of invasion.

The United States has heightened the readiness of some 8,500 U.S. troops amid tensions between Russia and NATO over a potential invasion of Ukraine, but no decisions have been made yet to deploy them.

"Secretary Austin has placed a range of units in the United States on a heightened preparedness to deploy, which increases our readiness to provide forces if NATO should activate" the NATO National Response Force, said Pentagon press secretary John Kirby on Monday._

So, after surrendering to a Taliban force 1/5 the size of ours, Biden wants to guarantee loss again.

Putin has overwhelming force on Ukraine's borders and some inside Ukraine. Tens of thousands of soldiers and heavy armor and fighter jets.

To counter this, Biden wants to send just 8500 brave American soldiers, like my two sons, as.... bait? Human shields?

Gen. Powell showed us, you win wars with overwhelming force and defined mission. _Neither one exists here._

What does it mean? It means Joe Biden has no idea what he's doing, and is gambling with the lives of 8500 of our soldiers for no good reason, to defend a border that isn't ours, against an aggressive madman with overwhelming force against us.

**_If my sons were there, I'd be furious_**!

President Biden and Congressman Darren Soto have failed to protect the American people, and have no idea how to use military force.

They will get Americans killed with reckless weakness and lack of direction. They will retreat and make us look as inept as he is.

_No wars, and no weakness either. We must be strong and peaceful!_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=086cde98ca&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **_Fun time is over- this is serious now. This lunatic is putting 8500 of our troops in harm's way, with no mission and in grave peril against better armed and much more numerous forces. _**

His weakness got us into this. He invited Putin to invade Ukraine.

_Now he wants to send YOUR SON to die for his weakness._

And Soto is ready to follow Biden off the cliff.

**The swamp doesn't like me, because I call 'em as I see 'em. But right now, someone has to- before Biden gets us all killed.**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up and fought for our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a3b0467176&e=afa21b7626) Help me bring my military experience to Congress.

Help me stand up to Biden and his incompetence! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0c8d62d855&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1fb1323f00&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1d0b66d671&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b2e6d11e82&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7027863dbd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: No More China First, America Last RINOs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
My opponent just sold you out | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066109?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=bf1a792d12&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Last week, my RINO opponent Steve Womack _lobbied the Biden Regime on behalf of China_ , _begging Beijing Biden to __cut tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump on Chinese-made imports_.

He signed a letter sent to U.S. Trade Representative Katherine Tai urging her to allow hundreds of “Made in China” imports—worth billions of dollars—to avoid American tariffs originally levied by the Trump Administration.

President Trump imposed these Section 301 tariffs after decades of greedy, rootless D.C. insiders selling the American worker down the river to China, during the course of which millions of American jobs were outsourced and offshored to China and the American manufacturing sector wholly eviscerated, resulting in the death of hundreds of communities and fueling the opioid crisis.

**Steve Womack is Walmart’s bag man, and thus China’s bag man****. **

He’s whored himself out for corporate contributions since his first campaign 12 years ago, and the American family has paid the price. Womack’s pockets are lined with tattered American Dreams, his hands red with the blood of Arkansas’s working men.

President Trump’s economic nationalism was a threat to Walmart Womack’s America Last grift, so he’s doing everything he can to go back to the way things were—when America was just a piggy bank for the rest of the world, stripped down and sold for scrap.

__But Arkansans don’t want to go back to the way things were.__

As usual, the solution to Chinese domination is the exact opposite of what Walmart Womack wants to do.

The **only** way to rebuild the American manufacturing sector is the two-pronged approach which my platform calls for: increasing tariffs on all Chinese imports and heavily penalizing American businesses that offshore and outsource American labor to China, forcing these rogue Globalist entities to take their production back to the United States.

**[_Punish China First, America Last traitors like Walmart Womack by __electing_ _ me.

Send this Chinese puppet packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER turn his back on you_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5836695c00&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me send China Steve a message from the American Worker_ _ that his time is UP -- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=298374f9f6&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** worker, not the Chinese peasant._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8ffbf7003a&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5b0248e117&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

---

There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
But I don't want to sugarcoat things here – starting off the year on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share in my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Grassley. This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating. This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind. This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – nobody – will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority. I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority. But I don't want to sugarcoat things here – starting off the year on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share in my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. It means the world to me. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

| Peter —

We have just five days until our first fundraising deadline of 2022, so we wanted to give you five reasons why we’re on Team Shelton:
1. Alisha was raised right here in the district, so she knows what our community needs.
2. Alisha is a mental health counselor who will bring the same compassion and advocacy to Nebraskans as she does to her sessions.
3. Alisha has rejected dark money and refuses to take even one penny of corporate PAC money.
4. Alisha would be Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman, as well as the first woman to ever represent her district in Congress.
5. Alisha is committed to fighting every day for the issues that matter most, like accessible healthcare, abortion access, and voting rights.

| The infamous Marjorie Taylor Greene has made her endorsement in the Republican Senate Primary's race to the bottom:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41096797/327326204/1636697581?refcode=em22_220126_MTG_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_MTG_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRlOGFkMi0wNTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ISBHU0cbr073gngQJRweLPXZmGCFumUr54pvV9StOw=)

This clown car Republican primary is just one batshit crazy headline after another. And you know with Marjorie Taylor Greene getting involved it's only going to get weirder.

But here's the hard truth. We have to take this seriously, because this endorsement gives J.D. Vance a national boost with the Trump diehards who hang on Greene's every word.

[**We're preparing now to take on whoever wins the primary and return this seat to a Democrat who will work for Ohioans. School Choice Week [_**LIVE petition to support school choice in Alabama >>>**_](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=1b4c937be6554c07bb3951da25f94c1a&_e=wdVkdTC8t1FQXKC5phSQbzhQPSQnUTIUSQoJBvXrvLGy6CtQcugzqYa-UHHRNkzZduFyz9PUcpdAS4VNZNReTdgS0FoXVnAzi4J2wZ-caqi2HYMZnrxKaFLL1qNR1nM4iqLHDVaq0FX7mCbhmtrhRK8ZGjVfBK3LTZPmjg_xRQvZkuMtvJuqxqI8Ho9hXoqz7gWM3a-pzzVc28FdA9-hsWJ8XKo747DjS8VxcBwDJ86Fws_IhwrJx7LfquDb4EYHCLx8fACSax9-HHHgXMrp6XZrv3VKAPt8rrL3pZ0H_9SH0FeuYqLV_Kv0E4nv7gKQLRibaQVr9WypkYvWp3d-sUR8a_8ii4F7BED_l3Q2oqhRs1kBA2G6DIjprkb3nivNQKMmrH-um7znG6lOnMYNit6sZZy4FvB3OJxSgeLcyCMNzQM0KHr3FlL-ew0KJbeKvmP95XM9W_E5m_WlwXnVeA%3D%3D) Peter, Children in Alabama deserve **_every_** opportunity, no matter their zip code. “We have incredible people in **every corner** of this state, and they are people that are **worth fighting for**.” _– Katie Britt to_ The Trussville Tribune This **School Choice Week** , I’m fighting to secure the **_right to a GREAT education_** for every child across our state. Education is the key to opportunity, which is at the heart of the American Dream, and providing children access to high-quality educational options from an early age is critical to their ability to be successful later in life. NO child’s education should be predetermined by their **zip code** , Peter. I need YOUR help to guarantee a GOOD education for **ALL children** in every community in Alabama. clean_body: School Choice Week Peter, Children in Alabama deserve every opportunity, no matter their zip code. “We have incredible people in every corner of this state, and they are people that are worth fighting for.” – Katie Britt to The Trussville Tribune This School Choice Week , I’m fighting to secure the right to a GREAT education for every child across our state. Education is the key to opportunity, which is at the heart of the American Dream, and providing children access to high-quality educational options from an early age is critical to their ability to be successful later in life. NO child’s education should be predetermined by their zip code , Peter. I need YOUR help to guarantee a GOOD education for ALL children in every community in Alabama. My team needs 5,000 signatures to champion school choice in Alabama. Will you sign to support the children of our state? SIGNATURE PENDING: Thank you, Katie Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: February 12, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I know $3 doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can win an election, but when everyone is chipping in together it all adds up. That’s how we win.
#

**February 12, 2019**
Do you remember it?
That was the day I launched my first campaign for Senate. And the truth is, I had no idea what to expect.
Gabby and I had some friends we hoped would be willing to help, but I knew one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we needed to win.
But because of supporters like you, we ran one of the largest people-powered Senate campaigns ever. And that’s helped us fend off attacks from corporate special interests in both of my elections.
**January 31, 2022**
That’s the day of our first fundraising deadline of the election year, and it’s coming up fast.
Right now we’re short of where we need to land before it ends, and we’re hoping to hit our goal with as many individual donations as we possibly can.
So, I have a big ask of you today. Can you make it the day you make your first online contribution to my re-election campaign?
You’ll be doing more than most to help us win. Not only that, you’ll be taking an active role in shaping the future for America you want to see, and that’s something to be extraordinarily proud of.
What do you say?
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before our first fundraising deadline of the election year comes to an end in just a few days?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220126-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1992_6688874_2rtr1I&akid=1992%2E6688874%2E2rtr1I)

Right now we’re short of where we need to land before it ends, and we’re hoping to hit our goal with as many individual donations as we possibly can. So, I have a big ask of you today. Can you make it the day you make your first online contribution to my re-election campaign? You’ll be doing more than most to help us win. Not only that, you’ll be taking an active role in shaping the future for America you want to see, and that’s something to be extraordinarily proud of. What do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** I know $3 doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can win an election, but when everyone is chipping in together it all adds up. That’s how we win. All my best, Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court vacancy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to act now and nominate a new Justice who will protect civil rights, our democracy, our environment, and so much more.
#
Peter,
We just learned that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring at the end of the Court’s term this year. That means President Biden and the Senate will have a chance to confirm a new Supreme Court Justice, something Democrats haven’t done since 2010.
We have to ensure that Democrats are able to nominate and confirm a new Supreme Court Justice that will uphold Roe v. Wade, affirm the rights of LGBTQIA+ folks, protect labor rights, preserve democracy, and so much more.
**The fight starts now, Peter.** [**Chip in $3 as we organize and secure the nomination of a new Justice who will protect civil rights, our democracy, our environment, and so much more. We know this will be tough work, especially after the last few Supreme Court nominations, and we need to be together in this.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9882?refcode=em20220126-987&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=987%2E420207%2E9KPsrH)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9882?refcode=em20220126-987&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=987%2E420207%2E9KPsrH)**
My team and I will be sure to keep an eye on this process and update you as we mount this critical effort.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220126-987-footer&t=21&refcode2=987_420207_9KPsrH&akid=987%2E420207%2E9KPsrH)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: [BREAKING] Justice Stephen Breyer to retire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We don’t have ANY Black women on the Supreme Court or in the Senate
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220126-568-footer-ak&t=2&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)
We just got word that **Stephen Breyer is retiring from the Supreme Court this year.**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22906?t=3&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)
It is more critical than ever that Democrats unite to replace Justice Breyer with a progressive nominee **who will protect reproductive freedom and working families.**
But it's also not enough. President Biden and Democrats in Congress need to follow through on reforming the Courts — including ethics rules for justices, and _expanding the court_.
Even after we replace Breyer, Republicans will still hold at least 6 of the 9 seats on the Supreme Court, despite Dems winning the popular vote in 7 of the last 8 presidential elections.
Expanding the court is the only way to ensure that we can unpack the court -- and restore balance after Republicans have stolen so many seats.
President Biden has promised to nominate a Black woman to replace Breyer. It's long overdue. **As a reminder, we also do not have any Black women currently serving in the Senate.**
[**_Help me fix that. Can you chip in to help send me to the Senate to shore up our majority and confirm SCOTUS nominees who will protect our rights?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22906?t=4&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22912?refcode=em20220126-568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)**
Onwards,
Morgan Harper
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220126-568-footer&t=24&refcode2=568_90090_ItlUZN&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=568%2E90090%2EItlUZN)

name: Nina Turner
subject: Three Bones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Before we close the books on day one of this campaign, I want to tell you a little bit about my grandma
#

Hello Somebody!
Before we close the books on day one of this campaign, I want to tell you a little bit about my grandma. This is important to me, so I hope you’ll take the time to read on.
As a little girl, I would always ask my grandma what it would take to be successful in life.
She told me that all you need are the three bones: the wishbone, the jawbone and the backbone. The _wishbone_ to keep you hoping, the _jawbone_ to give you the courage to speak truth to power, and the _backbone_ to give you the courage to stand through all your trials and tribulations.
I took my grandma’s wisdom to heart. You know me, you know I am a passionate fighter for the people and that’s why I am running for Congress.
There is hope in this campaign and I hope you feel it. Join me on this journey.
When we win this race, Ohio is going to have someone not only willing to speak truth to power, but work diligently to ensure that policies provide much needed relief for our community.
Getting there won’t be easy. We’re going to need that backbone to stand up to those who will do and spend anything necessary to stop us. But if we’re in this together, I know we are going to win. So I am asking:
**[Can you make a contribution to our campaign today? Help us generate as many contributions as possible before midnight tonight and show everyone watching that our movement is fired up and ready to win!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097209/327333056/1798563261?refcode2=a9d1cbac-087f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-3-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWQxY2JhYy0wODdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDUN-EGoidyUHwBjtDhkGBhdnTLKbhuzn_xXvYxyYig=)**
The best way to build a campaign is with grassroots power — _people power_. This is a campaign that is being built by ordinary people volunteering, making their voices heard, and investing what they can when they can to help power us to victory.
Thank you for being a part of it.
With these hands,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097210/327333057/1798563261?refcode2=a9d1cbac-087f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220126-3-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWQxY2JhYy0wODdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDUN-EGoidyUHwBjtDhkGBhdnTLKbhuzn_xXvYxyYig=)**

clean_body: Before we close the books on day one of this campaign, I want to tell you a little bit about my grandma Hello Somebody! Before we close the books on day one of this campaign, I want to tell you a little bit about my grandma. This is important to me, so I hope you’ll take the time to read on. As a little girl, I would always ask my grandma what it would take to be successful in life. She told me that all you need are the three bones: the wishbone, the jawbone and the backbone. The wishbone to keep you hoping, the jawbone to give you the courage to speak truth to power, and the backbone to give you the courage to stand through all your trials and tribulations. I took my grandma’s wisdom to heart. You know me, you know I am a passionate fighter for the people and that’s why I am running for Congress. There is hope in this campaign and I hope you feel it. Join me on this journey. When we win this race, Ohio is going to have someone not only willing to speak truth to power, but work diligently to ensure that policies provide much needed relief for our community. Getting there won’t be easy. We’re going to need that backbone to stand up to those who will do and spend anything necessary to stop us. But if we’re in this together, I know we are going to win. So I am asking: = The best way to build a campaign is with grassroots power — people power. This is a campaign that is being built by ordinary people volunteering, making their voices heard, and investing what they can when they can to help power us to victory. Thank you for being a part of it. With these hands, Nina Turner = * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hello,
If Democrats hadn’t won both Senate seats in Georgia last year, Mitch McConnell would be in charge right now.
And McConnell would be saying exactly what he did after Justice Antonin Scalia died: _“This vacancy should not be filled until we have a new president.”_
Every Senate seat matters. We don’t know what Manchin or Sinema will do yet, but in order to ensure we fill this Supreme Court seat (and every other vacancy that happens in the next 3 years), **we MUST expand our Democratic Senate majority.**

clean_body: Hello, If Democrats hadn’t won both Senate seats in Georgia last year, Mitch McConnell would be in charge right now. And McConnell would be saying exactly what he did after Justice Antonin Scalia died: “This vacancy should not be filled until we have a new president.” Every Senate seat matters. We don’t know what Manchin or Sinema will do yet, but in order to ensure we fill this Supreme Court seat (and every other vacancy that happens in the next 3 years), we MUST expand our Democratic Senate majority. name: Amanda Makki
subject: Should Americans be able to defend themselves?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
Her home was broken into, and she could not defend herself. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=41adbf1788654f109d6d9e54dd86df64&_e=wh4FABfIuu7o9ZNYYUj7HJFn5DYDuT8VUsPHxRGgdUgGlDIn5MsrdTmCSu9J7cIjWG97Z1rx5Ho8MBPC8AWf8ow0Sc0uZ0x5CPTZRBeONUeJc6E6_ygOKlBWNwtHvLtOsuYrNKkVTXfkPwugrMzfaawH4_QmLCoE_3B-pLIWhvqAiP_WG7tfDR1SZY18BMn3SyUvXJDeRGeD8rYC0COPWeITbvzuuvYwB3EN9Wr_2EPV7FBKDjIJ-rcJiKg7hCVxHNj6F9OzJSksgctgZPpLPw2BDhx7iUY-Ip_4ayR6vIe_cAlIHtyi60XpP9e8Y4AeXAnJEnNMq9-EhWy6OGIoV498z21taK9qhqHpg6Bxd1lvqKyMAK9v3tZXV_8UQbOT6toy1PUPa-BjKymyswBa-4XO1-Tyam6K7IQsKQw-a5JiXGPHfnRICEzCCYxRVrzszIQ4o1qZeQwW9yZ090KSiw%3D%3D)
---
Peter -

I want to tell you about a moment that profoundly changed my life.

**My mother was murdered in a home invasion robbery. Her home was broken into, and she was unable to defend herself.**

The Second Amendment guarantees your God-given right to protect yourself and your family. If my mother had been armed, I believe she’d still be with us today.

With violent crime increasing across the country, our safety is under attack daily. The Left wants to take away your right to protect yourself and force you to be dependent on them for protection. **While they are defunding police departments, they are also trying to disarm you - talk about a recipe for disaster!**

[** ****DEFEND THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=41adbf1788654f109d6d9e54dd86df64&_e=wh4FABfIuu7o9ZNYYUj7HJFn5DYDuT8VUsPHxRGgdUgGlDIn5MsrdTmCSu9J7cIjWG97Z1rx5Ho8MBPC8AWf8ow0Sc0uZ0x5CPTZRBeONUeJc6E6_ygOKlBWNwtHvLtOsuYrNKkVTXfkPwugrMzfaawH4_QmLCoE_3B-pLIWhvqAiP_WG7tfDR1SZY18BMn3SyUvXJDeRGeD8rYC0COPWeITbvzuuvYwB3EN9Wr_2EPV7FBKDjIJ-rcJiKg7hCVxZCk32nzi0B3jQtkONwxn7QVzW8Kmhbas0tYTAPK2dIYhwzIJx0Xutz_Hj_L9YbzzRLGuQWN793SrqRTAYpHXFHMGAKfAUcwz_pzgvd-r0SqBFNLWrIIgxIYrgVaWPj2Zs8dWUXFaIL1KOmvmw4L9N3G70KD2nZ3WSlEy06Wa6shy67xKcs5Ayk5AwKI98pfOjiT8J_SzNGbgg1QJlzpPvA%3D%3D)
The government should never stand between you and your constitutional right to protect yourself and your family.

**As a concealed firearm license holder,**[**I will always protect your Second Amendment rights when I am elected to Congress.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=41adbf1788654f109d6d9e54dd86df64&_e=wh4FABfIuu7o9ZNYYUj7HJFn5DYDuT8VUsPHxRGgdUgGlDIn5MsrdTmCSu9J7cIjWG97Z1rx5Ho8MBPC8AWf8ow0Sc0uZ0x5CPTZRBeONUeJc6E6_ygOKlBWNwtHvLtOsuYrNKkVTXfkPwugrMzfaawH4_QmLCoE_3B-pLIWhvqAiP_WG7tfDR1SZY18BMn3SyUvXJDeRGeD8rYC0COPWeITbvzuuvYwB3EN9Wr_2EPV7FBKDjIJ-rcJiKg7hCVxdr1jVUwOqk1PAzp1Dgounj_PRgG30g-5U4z4U6zdIdDKIvLqFIXOLBlXaSV-RBfjTsrrT5Zf5Mg-sXzvwkiSyUTYPVos4iZtdf8Y0O_Wheo6LoJS62EsvfhJ7uA-YBLyn37w6V0n0SotHz2eHFEUEDFpphVEZ12ybUnNGhhrYqEje3hqesxG2aPUjM4-QC6nZ5n1ESZT6dhTRcVt8rIOYA%3D%3D)

The future of our nation depends on strong Conservatives like me who are willing to stand up to the Left, not RINOS who will give in under their pressure.

[**I'm running for Congress to fight for your freedoms. Her home was broken into, and she could not defend herself.
clean_body: Her home was broken into, and she could not defend herself. | Peter - I want to tell you about a moment that profoundly changed my life. My mother was murdered in a home invasion robbery. Her home was broken into, and she was unable to defend herself. The Second Amendment guarantees your God-given right to protect yourself and your family. If my mother had been armed, I believe she’d still be with us today. With violent crime increasing across the country, our safety is under attack daily. The Left wants to take away your right to protect yourself and force you to be dependent on them for protection. While they are defunding police departments, they are also trying to disarm you - talk about a recipe for disaster! The government should never stand between you and your constitutional right to protect yourself and your family. As a concealed firearm license holder, The future of our nation depends on strong Conservatives like me who are willing to stand up to the Left, not RINOS who will give in under their pressure. If we lose our rights, we will never get them back. Sincerely, Amanda Makki Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District | | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! ---|--- | Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? She gets the job done. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097362/327335273/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRmMDY2Ny0wOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giyRiFjXCuyIt7fYxqYR4Dw6UjnCeDSErmrexGadkxU=) Hi Friend, this is former Lieutenant Governor Mike Cooney.

**I'm proud to share that I have endorsed Cora Neumann to be our representative in Montana’s new 1st Congressional District.**

**[Today, I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting Cora by chipping in a contribution of $3 to her campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097364/327335275/655314317?refcode=em-1.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRmMDY2Ny0wOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giyRiFjXCuyIt7fYxqYR4Dw6UjnCeDSErmrexGadkxU=)**

Montana needs a leader that will ensure Montanans have access to good jobs, wages, and housing they can afford. We need a representative who will fight for our small businesses, so families who have lived here for years or generations can afford to stay.

We need someone who understands what we’re experiencing and can meet this moment – whose Montana roots and experience delivering for rural communities gives them the backbone to stand up in Washington and protect the Montana we all know and love.

We need someone who will roll up her sleeves and get to work for us every day. **I know Cora – she’s a workhorse, not a show horse. She gets the job done.**

When COVID-19 hit our state in 2020, Cora got to work to train nearly 600 Montana leaders in COVID safety and response, and her relief fund distributed over $250k to those hit hardest.

She worked with small business owners to help them keep the lights on, raised money to support rural county commissioners and health workers, and centered her work on delivering tangible results to counties that didn’t have the resources to keep their local economies open – all with local leaders from both parties.

**[Will you donate $10, $35 or $50 to help send Cora to Congress? As a fourth-generation Montanan, I believe she’ll be a voice for all of us, and someone who will make sure Montana continues to be a place where our children can grow and thrive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097368/327335279/655314317?refcode=em-1.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRmMDY2Ny0wOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giyRiFjXCuyIt7fYxqYR4Dw6UjnCeDSErmrexGadkxU=)**
