She worked with small business owners to help them keep the lights on, raised money to support rural county commissioners and health workers, and centered her work on delivering tangible results to counties that didn’t have the resources to keep their local economies open – all with local leaders from both parties. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I appreciate it, friend. = Mike Cooney Former Lieutenant Governor of Montana Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

clean_body: | | | | | BREAKING NEWS: Justice Breyer to retire before 2022 election – giving President Biden first chance at nominating a Supreme Court justice! Friend: We just received word that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer will retire before the 2022 elections, meaning President Biden has the opportunity NOW to nominate a new justice and ensure our highest court can take action to protect voting rights, reproductive rights, and more. Here's how I see it: Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump and my opponent, Marco Rubio did whatever they could to push their extremist allies onto the court: ramming through Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett at all costs. With Senate control on the line this year, we must use our Democratic majority NOW to ensure a justice is confirmed to the high court. Today, I'm putting forth my most urgent petition yet: | | Thank you, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. body:
Time and time again, we have seen that Joe Biden refuses to take the inflation crisis seriously. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7ac940c08869481b999161f986498e56&_e=a526c3Hkxb7qMIOUuwZ2SugUkgf8dzMCQYC_b_dwIqncvge4OabhXY5BKJurRu5l85PC7Vo15mBBwZ2AhhlWZFBr76uo-a2SFnBrunmy3AAjQ1lZO_TqtnUTT3gT3pAnzUrDAC659oOOrM67YHs69_8wuH3IaOn6xia_TXVh7m3uKHutRqa-MAZI8Sj1BIFDqUuWiYZ8SCWdEMtg6rh6RCds5-dM-5ZD2h4D_a6wGYYa-NHgsTAA7LdCVELoVXXX)

Dear Friend,

Time and time again, we have seen that Joe Biden refuses to take the inflation crisis seriously.

First it was during his disastrous press conference last week when he shrugged off inflation and even said he has “outperformed” as President.

**Now he is lashing out at a Fox News reporter for asking about inflation.**

No, I am not making this up.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7ac940c08869481b999161f986498e56&_e=a526c3Hkxb7qMIOUuwZ2SugUkgf8dzMCQYC_b_dwIql6e723P-j9t0mjkubrdFct68wXqwEpS3iwRdmtySMen8co8mSzo4lHA0Xy9cJh1rLYvNos8JRVLIsfmoZnsLJO6GR6RmI44gLto-tKYRQjtyo2SpKG3kON68qR-yxma-rwSyghiY-H0CF1oEvjvWp1WUu8hGq-urJetFBeF3b3qFftDHfbXkp01fKil53dhd6KCMH9JlBizPrT4Jz5TvkD)
We need to get Joe Biden’s attention now so he can start taking the inflation crisis seriously, which is punishing hard-working Americans across the country with higher prices on everything from gas to groceries.

[**Add Your Name to Our Letter >>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7ac940c08869481b999161f986498e56&_e=a526c3Hkxb7qMIOUuwZ2SugUkgf8dzMCQYC_b_dwIqn7i_W6vAflYLaZP1iwzSD5LXDTtaT2AJ7IxCOXt_6GVsX4qOjQaP8Xi1Y4gFOI2sX7OwtbbL_a6aruAAZste63Knsg6bJPFmGW6krcUHjoTBqpp8FEXGKjD896cffGznH7hYlWMPI6gkuvR13uh6zfTGeiv57DdJ9F82IKJi3EKOGTrW6DlBJ4jBIOZFa57UlDW5jGi20szU2kA8A7CvxQ)
Can you help us today?

**[Add your name to our letter to Joe Biden so he knows that the American people are sick and tired of him downplaying inflation!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7ac940c08869481b999161f986498e56&_e=a526c3Hkxb7qMIOUuwZ2SugUkgf8dzMCQYC_b_dwIqnxI7W-erBUwaXgZW8yaUdX40Nnh6tdPSdL0dSvWhj480LvBPT7raHlG0tHDRduQo5ywI8dH1A2_9QmnwCMU9OfiwehFKHOin2Dk8Gt-A2kr19kLzjKuQgaXxgJiUstq3ky9Gqg5DP1VF3LSlz9B_cbzKQ2_o5JRMxCbptj_aRXqmuvsTG-8b2TIXgUqfm_ThhZlgRjiyMAN3pZjym_m3CK)**

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: This is huge, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

This is huge,
Peter.

Earlier today, news broke that Justice Stephen Breyer will retire from the
Supreme Court. It is absolutely critical we fill this spot on Mitch
McConnell’s packed Supreme Court with someone who will vote to protect our
democracy and the protections that matter most to everyday Americans.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126-1500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1500_346206_p1oM-i&akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i ][IMG]It is past time that a progressive Black woman be nominated to the
court.

But let’s be clear: this vacancy will not fix the conservative imbalance
on the court. Mitch McConnell has spent the past five years systematically
undermining the integrity of the court by packing it with conservative
justices like Amy Coney Barrett and Brett Kavanaugh. We need to elect
Senators like Charles Booker that will expand the court and restore trust
in the institution.

Transforming our Supreme Court is possible but it’s going to take all of
us working together to elect Charles and expand our Democratic majority.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126-1500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1500_346206_p1oM-i&akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can today to power
our grassroots campaign and help send Charles to the Senate so we can
appoint a progressive voice to the Supreme Court?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126-1500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1500_346206_p1oM-i&akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i ]Contribute $5

Today is yet another urgent reminder of the stakes in our upcoming
election.

For too long, Trump and Mitch McConnell have held their grip on the
Supreme Court in an attempt to push their ultra-conservative agenda.

Peter, your
support allows us to finally fix this imbalance. Together, we will build
our grassroots organizing strategy, reach out to voters across Kentucky,
and get Rand Paul out of office so we can expand our Democratic majority.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220126?refcode=em20220126-1500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1500_346206_p1oM-i&akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i ]If you’re ready to rise up with us in this fight, please make
a $5 donation today to support our movement to replace Rand
Paul. There’s only months left until Election Day so there’s not a moment
we can waste to prepare for this competitive election.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220126-1500-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1500_346206_p1oM-i&akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1500%2E346206%2Ep1oM-i

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: I Endorse Lori Chavez-DeRemer
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/aa0bf3b0b7d4/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6721346?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126

Peter

I fully endorse Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress.

Lori is a dedicated public servant who will be a fierce advocate for Central Oregonians and bring common-sense solutions to Congress.

While serving as the Oregon House Republican Leader, I worked extensively with Lori. She was one of the hardest-working candidates, mayors, and business owners I’ve ever met. Lori will bring that same work ethic to Congress.

I am excited to see the positive future she will build for Oregon. I know she will always fight for working-class families and stand against the Radical Left.

Lori will be the conservative change that is needed during this time of Radical mismanagement of our government.

I’m proud to endorse her campaign to represent the 5th Congressional District. Lori has a critical End-of-the-Month fundraising goal coming up. Can I count on your contribution to help reach her goal?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126)

Will you join me and chip in any amount today to ensure Lori has the resources to WIN in November?

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126?amount=50

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126?amount=10

With your contributions and support, Lori will be able to make that conservative change for Oregon happen; donating to Lori is donating towards a better future.

Together we can help Lori start off 2022 in the strongest way possible by making this her best End of the Month Fundraiser, chip in today!>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126

Thank you,

Mike McLane
Former Oregon House Minority Leader

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-26-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast126

name: John Fetterman
subject: BREAKING: SCOTUS news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is a wake-up call.
#
**BREAKING NEWS, Derek:** Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring, leaving a vacant seat on the Court.
This is a chance for President Biden and Democrats to shape the Supreme Court — currently ruled by a 6-3 conservative majority — for _generations_ to come.
**But with Justice Breyer’s SCOTUS seat up for grabs,****it has NEVER been more urgent to have a strong Democratic Senate majority , made up of Democrats who vote like Democrats — including on Supreme Court nominees.**
**[Derek, if you help send me to the U.S. Senate, you can trust that I’d vote to confirm President Biden’s SCOTUS nominee + protect our Democratic Senate majority. Will you make a donation right now to flip PA’s Senate seat?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42081?refcode=ema20220126-4344&t=1&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42081?refcode=em20220126-4344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)**
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: I’m proud to say I have five litmus tests for any Supreme Court nominee. And really, these litmus tests are just about the core bedrock principles all Democrats should embrace:
1. Do you support the repeal of End Citizens United? _Money in politics is a cancer. Citizens United needs to go._
2. Do you support a woman’s right to choose? _The right to choose is constitutionally protected, but is under siege in many states._
3. Do you believe in the scientifically-supported consensus of climate change? _We can’t have somebody on the Supreme Court who just trusts their gut ~because it snowed last week~ that we don’t have an issue on climate._
4. Do you support equal rights for the LGBTQ+ community? _We have to enumerate those rights and make sure they’re protected._
5. Do you support a union’s right to organize? _Because duh._

Derek, the future of _Roe_ and so many enormous issues will come down to the Supreme Court, and Breyer’s retirement is a wake-up call. I need your help in this race because whoever becomes Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator will be able to cast a deciding vote to confirm or deny future Supreme Court nominees.
**[Today’s Supreme Court news is an urgent call to action. Will you please chip in $5 or any amount today to help me become the 51st Democrat in the Senate deciding Supreme Court nominees, defending our values, and more?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42081?refcode=ema20220126-4344&t=21&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)**
Thank you for taking action today,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220126-4344-footer&t=22&refcode2=4344_434096_CTKqum&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4344%2E434096%2ECTKqum)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Every Senate seat matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097571/327342720/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDdiMzk0MS0wYzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CdXI-EjC1zoUsSVm-aD49yzsuxZ7MuQfhCQ0BB6ZEc=)
Hey friend, Today, Justice Breyer announced that he’ll be retiring from his position on the Supreme Court after serving for nearly three decades. He’s served with integrity and distinction, protecting Americans' civil rights, upholding the rule of law, and defending the vital independence of the judiciary. I’m profoundly grateful for his service. This news is another reminder of why holding onto our Senate majority is so important. With a Senate majority, we can nominate Supreme Court justices that reflect our shared values like protecting voting rights and the environment. But that’s also why National Republicans have made seats like mine a top target and why they raised more than $100 million in 2021 to take back the Senate. It’s more important than ever that we maintain our Senate majority and today, I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few dollars to help us do just that. Last year, we delivered a tax cut for working families in the form of the expanded Child Tax Credit, secured funding we need to repair our roads and bridges, and now we are on track to create scores of good-paying jobs all across the country. We need to hold onto the Senate if we want to keep delivering for working families. **So if you can, please pitch in any amount to keep Colorado blue, protect our slim Senate majority, and secure more victories for working families.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097572/327342721/-20397165?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220126_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDdiMzk0MS0wYzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CdXI-EjC1zoUsSVm-aD49yzsuxZ7MuQfhCQ0BB6ZEc=)**

clean_body: | = Hey friend, Today, Justice Breyer announced that he’ll be retiring from his position on the Supreme Court after serving for nearly three decades. He’s served with integrity and distinction, protecting Americans' civil rights, upholding the rule of law, and defending the vital independence of the judiciary. I’m profoundly grateful for his service. This news is another reminder of why holding onto our Senate majority is so important. With a Senate majority, we can nominate Supreme Court justices that reflect our shared values like protecting voting rights and the environment. But that’s also why National Republicans have made seats like mine a top target and why they raised more than $100 million in 2021 to take back the Senate. It’s more important than ever that we maintain our Senate majority and today, I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few dollars to help us do just that. Last year, we delivered a tax cut for working families in the form of the expanded Child Tax Credit, secured funding we need to repair our roads and bridges, and now we are on track to create scores of good-paying jobs all across the country. We need to hold onto the Senate if we want to keep delivering for working families. So if you can, please pitch in any amount to keep Colorado blue, protect our slim Senate majority, and secure more victories for working families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your continued support, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Let me lay out the facts for you: Democrats set a new fundraising record in 2022. Odds are now turning against Republicans to take back the House in November. The Left is exerting more control than EVER over our free speech and silencing us at every turn. Your support is CRITICAL to help Republicans regain our advantage so we can TAKE BACK THE HOUSE in November and STOP Joe Biden and the Democrats from destroying our economy - and our country. I wouldn’t be asking for your help if it wasn’t absolutely necessary. It seems small, but and five minutes of your time could make the difference we need to take back the house. Republicans only need five seats to take back our majority. We are so close to getting an iron-clad defense against Joe Biden’s dangerous far-Left policies, but we need every patriot to step up NOW before it’s too late. So please,. In Service, Col. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We just learned that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer will retire from
the Supreme Court, leaving the Biden administration to fill this
unexpected vacancy.

Three questions frame our big and unexpected fight ahead:

1. Who will Joe Biden nominate?
2. Will corporate Democrats, like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, vote to
confirm them?
3. How much will right-wing extremists try to smear and obstruct the
nominee?

The Biden administration has a responsibility to nominate a progressive
Justice who will counter the influence of the six conservative Justices on
the bench and make good on his promise to appoint the first Black woman
ever to serve on the Supreme Court. Corporate Democrats have already
undermined Biden’s agenda, and we know there is no limit to their
obstruction.

We’re no strangers to tough fights, and we’re ready to use the power of
our movement to ensure that a progressive Justice is nominated to our
highest court. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91400?refcode=em20220126-21682&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21682%2E1203867%2EOBkZYS ]Will you join this fight by chipping in
$3 right now? Abortion rights, criminal justice reform,
labor rights, the environment, and so much more are on the line.

subject: BREAKING >> My opponent just raised $3 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
I knew challenging Bill Lee wasn’t going to be easy. But elections are about hard choices. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097809/327346950/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM2YmIyMC0wZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pt8Enni0jUR4xyi0WACvto1y4o3pdEDEdwT8pK33A4=&emci=acce6c58-027f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=82c6bb20-0e7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12740612) | Hi, team. **I’ve got some bad news. We just found out that my opponent Bill Lee raised more than $3 million in the last two quarters of 2021. That means coming into 2022, he has over $5 million cash on hand. ** [**I’m asking you to rush a contribution to my campaign right now so we can show Bill Lee that he’s got real competition. It’s crucial that we can stay competitive in this race. Will you donate today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097810/327346951/209002884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM2YmIyMC0wZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pt8Enni0jUR4xyi0WACvto1y4o3pdEDEdwT8pK33A4=) ****
* * *
**I knew challenging Bill Lee wasn’t going to be easy. But elections are about hard choices. Tennesseans have two different visions of the future in front of them. We’ve already seen what Bill Lee’s Tennessee looks like: hateful and divisive. Together, we’re fighting for a Tennessee where everyone has a seat at the table. A Tennessee where everyone feels heard and valued. A Tennessee where everyone is truly represented. ** **That’s the choice we’re going to give them in 2022. And so far, people are responding to our vision. That’s why it’s so important that we can keep up with Lee and his donors. We have the supporters and the momentum, but we still need the kind of resources it takes to successfully challenge an incumbent.** ****[**And I’ll be honest, $3 million is a lot of money. It’s to be expected that any race for Governor is going to attract big money, and Bill Lee receives donations from all kinds of mega-corporations and their PACs. Those kinds of funds can make all the difference when it comes down to the wire in a race. I need your help to raise [input goal amount] TODAY so we can stay on track for our ambitious fundraising goal. Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW to support me? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097811/327346952/209002884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM2YmIyMC0wZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pt8Enni0jUR4xyi0WACvto1y4o3pdEDEdwT8pK33A4=)
* * *
[**Lee will continue to raise, and we have to show him that he’s not the only one. I believe that Tennessee can elect a Democratic governor. I believe that we can replace Bill Lee. I believe that this is a winning campaign. But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on you. Will you join our efforts by donating today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41097812/327347007/209002884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM2YmIyMC0wZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pt8Enni0jUR4xyi0WACvto1y4o3pdEDEdwT8pK33A4=) **Peace and Blessing,** **JB**

clean_body: I knew challenging Bill Lee wasn’t going to be easy. But elections are about hard choices. | | Hi, team. I’ve got some bad news. We just found out that my opponent Bill Lee raised more than $3 million in the last two quarters of 2021. That means coming into 2022, he has over $5 million cash on hand. = ** I knew challenging Bill Lee wasn’t going to be easy. But elections are about hard choices. Tennesseans have two different visions of the future in front of them. We’ve already seen what Bill Lee’s Tennessee looks like: hateful and divisive. Together, we’re fighting for a Tennessee where everyone has a seat at the table. A Tennessee where everyone feels heard and valued. A Tennessee where everyone is truly represented. That’s the choice we’re going to give them in 2022. And so far, people are responding to our vision. That’s why it’s so important that we can keep up with Lee and his donors. We have the supporters and the momentum, but we still need the kind of resources it takes to successfully challenge an incumbent. **[And I’ll be honest, $3 million is a lot of money. It’s to be expected that any race for Governor is going to attract big money, and Bill Lee receives donations from all kinds of mega-corporations and their PACs. Those kinds of funds can make all the difference when it comes down to the wire in a race. I need your help to raise [input goal amount] TODAY so we can stay on track for our ambitious fundraising goal. Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW to support me? ](=) = Peace and Blessing, JB Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all us of working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr., but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails or update your contact information . You can also at any time. = JB believes that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs, and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. = | Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley. Julian Bolton, Treasurer Committee to Elect JB Smiley 901 Mississippi Blvd Memphis, TN 38126 United States **

clean_body: Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer retiring! | Fellow Conservative, News just broke that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is stepping down in early Summer. This is alarming, Joe Biden is going to hand-pick a Supreme Court Justice. You can be sure he’s going to appoint a raging Neo-Socialist, Activist Liberal who will take away our guns, destroy free speech, and allow abortion on demand. Never forget - RINOS like Pat McCrory were more concerned with mean tweets than with saving American constitutional freedom. And now, we will be stuck with a lifetime appointment of a partisan, far-left judge. | Biden will pick someone that will push the needle as far left as possible AND will be one step closer to packing the courts and overriding President Trump’s conservative majority. Our borders will be at risk, our democracy will be rigged, our Second Amendment rights and the rights of ALL CONSERVATIVES will be on the chopping block. We cannot trust failed Governor Pat McCrory to stand up to the Radical Left and stop activist liberal judges. America needs strong Conservative leaders in the US Senate and that is why I am running for North Carolina’s vulnerable open seat! Thanks for acting during this crucial time! Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. clean_body: What are your thoughts on these crimes sweeping across our communities? Peter, Smash-and-grab crimes have been surging in California. Anyone with a television can see that. Yet leftists like AOC have the audacity to deny that these crimes are even happening. It brings to mind that old phrase: Who you gonna believe, me or your lying eyes? We’re taking a poll and want to know what you think. Have the far left’s soft-on-crime policies and the Defund the Police movement led to the rise in smash-and-grab crimes? Have the far left’s soft-on-crime policies and the Defund the Police movement led to the rise in smash-and-grab crimes? Thanks, California Polling | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. In straw polls for PA Republican caucuses, we’re: **3 - 0** We’re proving that we don’t need some daytime talk show host or out-of-state billionaires to swoop into our state and save us. The only thing we need is grassroots Pennsylvanians from all 67 counties to stand up and get the job done. **Friend, no one deserves to be a U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania, but I hope I can fight hard enough for grassroots Pennsylvanians like you to earn it. **

name: Phil Arballo
subject: I’m running for Congress in California’s new 13th District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

I’m writing to you, personally, with some news.

**I have officially filed to run for Congress in California’s brand-new 13th district.**

This is a wide-open race, and I’m going to need all the support I can get to beat back Republicans who are targeting this seat as their ticket to taking back our House majority.

[**It’s time to bring a strong Latino voice from the Central Valley to Congress. Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and Tony Cárdenas to help us protect and expand our Democratic majority? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41098190/327351313/-729121667?amount=13&refcode=TCFC_20220126_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTc4ODYyNC0xNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdKxdUqng88ch-zDK8DzzH9QlMNufkU8ojoUWjQx44U=) | [$13,000 GOAL FOR CA-13: SPLIT $13 TO PROTECT & EXPAND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41098191/327351314/-729121667?amount=13&amounts=3,7,10,13&refcode=TCFC_20220126_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTc4ODYyNC0xNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdKxdUqng88ch-zDK8DzzH9QlMNufkU8ojoUWjQx44U=)

Peter, let me reintroduce myself.

I’m Phil Arballo. **I’m a small business owner, community organizer, first-generation college graduate, and a committed husband and father.**

I was born and raised in the Central Valley — _and I uniquely understand the struggles of our working families, because I’ve lived them._

I was raised by a single mother who worked long hours to support our family. I know so many of my neighbors in this district have faced the same battles to make ends meet.

I’ve dedicated my career to service — I’m proud to always go the extra mile to make a difference in my Central Valley community.

Which brought me to running against MAGA Devin Nunes in 2020. **While we lost by a few percentage points, I knew my work to fight for the Central Valley was far from over.**

I’m not a typical politician. I don’t have access to millions in dark money donations, like my former opponent Devin Nunes — _Instead, I depend on the support of people like you, Peter._

So as I launch this campaign to win in California’s 13th district, encompassing everywhere from Merced to Modesto to Turlock and beyond, I’m asking for your help.

| | Team, It is no secret that Massachusetts wasn't delivering for working families and communities prior to the pandemic. Those disparities and struggles have only been magnified by COVID-19 — and it's time for leaders on Beacon Hill to step up and find urgent solutions. **That’s what I wanted to hear from Governor Baker last night during his State of the Commonwealth Address.** On the campaign trail, I hear over and over from Bay Staters about the challenges they face with rising child care and housing costs, deep education and health inequities, and the consequences of climate change staring us in the face. Instead of delivering urgent solutions last night, Governor Baker gave us business as usual. That is why I am running for Governor. Our Commonwealth deserves a leader who understands the systemic hardships and inequities facing communities across Massachusetts and urgently takes action to address them, even when it’s not politically expedient. [_**Team – we can’t do this without you, will you make a $15 donation to our campaign to support our people-powered movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41098210/327351361/-360977244?refcode=01_26_22_SOTC_fs&ms=01_26_22_SOTC_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjg3MGUzZC0xNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnDoePXdT6WE24tJrcDQ5QkqDxXJSS0GZGpwRxVi83w=) If we are going to win this fight, we need everybody on board. We know that these things are possible if we build a grassroots movement to get them done. Thank you for your support. Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: We need a leader who will act boldly to address systemic hardships and inequities, even when it’s not politically expedient. | | | | | Team, It is no secret that Massachusetts wasn't delivering for working families and communities prior to the pandemic. Those disparities and struggles have only been magnified by COVID-19 — and it's time for leaders on Beacon Hill to step up and find urgent solutions. That’s what I wanted to hear from Governor Baker last night during his State of the Commonwealth Address. On the campaign trail, I hear over and over from Bay Staters about the challenges they face with rising child care and housing costs, deep education and health inequities, and the consequences of climate change staring us in the face. Instead of delivering urgent solutions last night, Governor Baker gave us business as usual. That is why I am running for Governor. Our Commonwealth deserves a leader who understands the systemic hardships and inequities facing communities across Massachusetts and urgently takes action to address them, even when it’s not politically expedient. = If we are going to win this fight, we need everybody on board. We know that these things are possible if we build a grassroots movement to get them done. Thank you for your support. Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

We need to defeat Andy Kim in November if we want to take back the House Please see a note from one of our sponsors. He praises Joe Biden and sides with radical liberals on almost every issue. **_Andy Kim has even voted with Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her Squad over 90% of the time in DC. _** **_He’s even a member of the extreme Progressive Caucus! The same group of radicals who want to open our borders, defund our police, radicalize our students, jack up taxes, and usher in socialism. _** [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=68d5d827dedf49e992e85b84a81b3065&_e=WL8Hr7UnzifWRHnJm3Wn1UzFM_k7rv7x31d3Bbz2SkTag9WvdjZteHxTQeu_sl1a8LYebBOaioSmwnNC4RucsgM_KrHb64gteN4vEqFL9ipLzvPiONk3W8V5H1OwS6IKQkgC_usc0TpiK6DgaNeJe29ffCnttaLzxNtWm4kWSFRJS9HXZCoWXnc-dOC29qyN5UopYRcMs7KCAY6id76WihWNTfd05yBpVQGHOeoR6pfRZxUjJ8ysfXjBR9qgnZytKPU1Qyw-6hNiV9TBwmOLeGkZsApmbQqbWH5qI4Gy3lj4HgnEF-A79Rea2HzYxd_XXa5PB8xpUch8p0eSQVN3RNR4jmuoNTmYBbbx9ifOz2rRQcd4weyw4_JI43OJyBsOGYSakkxGrLm37SbQ-K1SNAK3thRjUKeApjOqMl1tV-D3O_HBO5zNcZWFDL8Va8Xq9XA_KcXlsy8Hp1uaAWbUbUOHjBcMhKAN2qNB7gYGd3guBZqCa9HxqH7U6oorsMjh-yrEPnOn-uk5-pZzFeWtlA%3D%3D) _**I’m sorry, that is not our district. And Andy Kim should not be our Congressman.**_ [**Help Me Take Back NJ-03**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=68d5d827dedf49e992e85b84a81b3065&_e=WL8Hr7UnzifWRHnJm3Wn1UzFM_k7rv7x31d3Bbz2SkTag9WvdjZteHxTQeu_sl1a8LYebBOaioSmwnNC4RucsgM_KrHb64gteN4vEqFL9ipLzvPiONk3W8V5H1OwS6IKQkgC_usc0TpiK6DgaNeJe29ffCnttaLzxNtWm4kWSFRJS9HXZCoWXnc-dOC29qyN5UopYRcMs7KCAY6id76WihWNTfd05yBpVQGHOeoR6pfRZxUjJ8ysfXjBR9qgnZytKPU1Qyw-6hNiV9TBwmOLeGkZsApmbQqbWH5qI4Gy3lhL23pxdLU9zVZ-xIkWICZnSLqBIfqPHbCGjppUXA0ccy_rjnBPKh9UbwRpsVYmdKsrJR6NRt4DGpxRhE-35KdcdjqbOgLg91YV3oo4uXfw3CyyRLOiOPkZez18dOd_EMB8_66t_T_mTIdzCrUOvmUYTuE_CWn9OLKa1NnAJ4Td3vVgKDpF60Ixb4KzBYKCuBvbdm0Nw3qurAt-INYZ7GNOweNbcaV1KglYWDDC5tZtBQ%3D%3D) That’s why I’m running, Peter. As a family man and local job creator, I know how badly radical liberal policies are hurting us. And I want to help stop this radical shift. But to be honest, I’m up against steep odds in November, and I really need your support.

clean_body: We need to defeat Andy Kim in November if we want to take back the House Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, My name is Bob Healey Jr. and I’m a local job creator and small business owner running to represent the 3rd district in DC and take back Congress in the midterms. As someone who manages a payroll and is responsible for over one thousand employees at my company, I know that far-left liberals like Congressman Andy Kim are taking us in the wrong direction. My opponent Andy Kim pitches himself a centrist on the campaign trail, but in Congress, he isn’t. He praises Joe Biden and sides with radical liberals on almost every issue. Andy Kim has even voted with Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her Squad over 90% of the time in DC. He’s even a member of the extreme Progressive Caucus! The same group of radicals who want to open our borders, defund our police, radicalize our students, jack up taxes, and usher in socialism. I’m sorry, that is not our district. And Andy Kim should not be our Congressman. That’s why I’m running, Peter. As a family man and local job creator, I know how badly radical liberal policies are hurting us. And I want to help stop this radical shift. But to be honest, I’m up against steep odds in November, and I really need your support. My campaign set a $10,000 fundraising goal for the month of January, and we’re running low on time. I would really appreciate your support in this end-of-month fundraising push. Hitting this goal would make a HUGE difference in our fight to take back Congress in the midterms. Thanks, Bob Healey | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Power to the people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey, at Erica Smith
headquarters in North Carolina, we’re rapidly approaching our January
fundraising deadline at midnight on Monday, January 31 — our first
end-of-month goal of the election year.

And that’s why we’re looping you in on our campaign finance plan for the
rest of the week:

FIRST: We smashed our mid-month fundraising goal and were right on track
to keep up our momentum and meet our end-of-month fundraising goal.

THEN: Our finance team logged into ActBlue this morning and realized we’re
still $6,860 away from hitting our online end-of-month goal of $35,000.

NOW: We’re rapidly reaching out to our network of supporters in
your area to
see if we can make up for our lost ground and get back on track as quickly
as we can.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37156?t=1001&akid=818%2E3698%2EbrbKlU ]Can we count on your donation of $5 today? Anything you can give right now will
help empower our campaign. It’s even more important that we have steady
grassroots fundraising because we actively reject taking ANY money from
lobbyists, corporate PACS, fossil fuel companies, or Wall Street
executives.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37162?refcode=em20220126-818&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=818%2E3698%2EbrbKlU ]Donate $5

Erica is unbought and unbossed — she’s THE boss. She’s got the skill,
expertise, and experience to protect this House seat from Republican
scheming and she’s got a plan to bring the power back to the people.

Electing representatives like Erica, who will fight for the everyday
working families in North Carolina’s 2nd District and beyond, is the only
way we’ll prevent Republicans from winning control of the U.S. House and
deliver real change for our communities.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37156?t=1021&akid=818%2E3698%2EbrbKlU ]Will you help us close our fundraising gap by chipping in anything you
can? If everyone who reads this email pitches in even a little bit we’ll
reach our fundraising goal in no time!

Together,

Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220126-818-footer&t=1022&refcode2=818_3698_brbKlU&akid=818%2E3698%2EbrbKlU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=818%2E3698%2EbrbKlU

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: It’s Official - I’m Running
body:
It’s time to take back the house and fight back against the Radical Left | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=30d9c567b0&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | Friend,

I have massive news! I’m running for Congress.

I’m a husband & father, and I’ve spent the last 20 years as an educator and small business owner, NOT a politician. I know what it means to sign the front and back of a paycheck, and the realities facing everyday American families.

I’m running for Congress because we need principled servant-leadership, and I’m tired of watching career politicians like Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi lead America down the wrong track.

That’s why I’m getting off the sidelines, and it’s why I’m asking YOU to join our fight.

**[Please contribute $10 or more today to help our campaign get off the ground.>>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=b9ecdcc163&e=b78e7c4d40)**

---

---

---

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=4fd1a25570&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=60d84ba171&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| We need more political outsiders and fewer career politicians in Washington.

Our mission is to take back the house, FIRE Nancy Pelosi as speaker, and get America back on the right track.

Are you with us, Friend?

**[Contribute ANY amount today to help us make sure we have the resources we need to win big on Election Day.>>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=ee9cd0f1f0&e=b78e7c4d40)**

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate of Congress, (IL-11)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=2C=20Campaign=20Manager?=
subject: Hochul: Masks are just like sneakers
body:
\- She’s lost it. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=301c4cef08&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Dear Friend,

Kathy Hochul just compared her daughter having a meltdown in Kindergarten over putting on her sneakers to kids today not happy having to wear a mask for eight hours a day.

Watch for yourself:

[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d7b8591363&e=3ca66fc65a)

On Friday, a NY Supreme Court Judge ruled Hochul’s mask mandate “unlawful.” It was a temporary victory for families and children across the state. But then Hochul appealed.

We have cops being ambushed and killed and our governor is spending her energy (and taxpayer money) fighting a legal battle to keep our children in masks even as she rarely wears one.
[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=c58c217e8b&e=3ca66fc65a)
Dr. Fauci has called masks “ineffective.”

Dr. Leana Wen, CNN Medical Analyst said masks were “little more than facial decorations.”

The masks don’t prevent anything except normalcy for children.

Rob Astorino is leading the fight to unmask our kids and he’s been fighting for over a year. [](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=2de83f1a3a&e=3ca66fc65a)

|
Will you help Rob?

---

[ DONATE ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=1950a78260&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Sincerely,

Phil
Campaign Manager
---

[ SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=1d8a9fecaf&e=3ca66fc65a)

| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=0309a0c1b2&e=3ca66fc65a)._

clean_body: \- She’s lost it. | | | | | Dear Friend, Kathy Hochul just compared her daughter having a meltdown in Kindergarten over putting on her sneakers to kids today not happy having to wear a mask for eight hours a day. Watch for yourself: On Friday, a NY Supreme Court Judge ruled Hochul’s mask mandate “unlawful.” It was a temporary victory for families and children across the state. But then Hochul appealed. We have cops being ambushed and killed and our governor is spending her energy (and taxpayer money) fighting a legal battle to keep our children in masks even as she rarely wears one. Dr. Fauci has called masks “ineffective.” Dr. Leana Wen, CNN Medical Analyst said masks were “little more than facial decorations.” The masks don’t prevent anything except normalcy for children. Rob Astorino is leading the fight to unmask our kids and he’s been fighting for over a year. | | Will you help Rob? | Sincerely, Phil Campaign Manager | | Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children. You can learn more by visiting . | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Rob Astorino, All rights reserved.

body:
| | | **BREAKING:
Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer to RETIRE**

[**We don 't have a second to spare. Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer just announced he's RETIRING - clearing the way for President Biden's FIRST nominee to the Court! But we know McConnell and his Republicans are SALIVATING at the prospect of taking back power and ramming even MORE far-right justices into power - so it's never been more important that we defend our Democratic Trifecta. We're urgently calling on 630 grassroots Democrats to rise up and rush in $3 to REBUKE McConnell and PROTECT our House Majority. Can we count on you? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)

We need to move NOW.

Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer just announced he plans to RETIRE.

After Trump rushed THREE far-right justices through confirmation during his presidency, President Biden knows we can't afford to let this HISTORIC opportunity pass us by.

**That 's why he's IMPLORING grassroots Democrats like you to rise up and DEFEND our Democratic Trifecta at this pivotal moment:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

President Biden is absolutely right.

McConnell would love nothing more than to BLOCK another nominee and pack the Supreme Court with even more fringe, right-wing radicals.

**_It 's on us to make sure he never gets the chance._**

**[That's why we're urgently calling on you to rise up and answer President Biden's DIRE call to action. Will you join Democrats everywhere and rush $3 to defend our House Majority and solidify our Trifecta? Or will you sit on the sidelines and watch as McConnell schemes to rush another GOP judge through confirmation? The choice is yours >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

## **[I'm running to Beat Ronny Jackson.](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=fb84c1052e&e=4712f71bea)**

| Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are a cancer in America.

Every day they're not condemned, shamed, or - most importantly - beaten at the ballot box is one day that our American cancer grows.

It must stop.

---

To take down one of Trump's closest MAGA allies - "Doctor" Ronny Jackson - in the Texas-13 Congressional district.

If we win, we'll be one seat closer to sanity in our state and in our country.

But to do my part, I need you to do yours: Donate to my campaign.
[**We need resources to win.**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=285f4ebe27&e=4712f71bea)

Kathleen.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: I’m going to be gone tonight
body:
Hi there, [_Update on yesterday’s email: we’re now only $4,512 away from January’s total minimum amount that I need to raise. I have 5 days to get there, so please rush a small donation now. Thank you!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41098386/327352122/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTYyMmFlYS0xNzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGSr2YBJ1jGGVJKAV1Q3G0LIvLhQAdWHSdo_N37MU0g=) Tonight I’m going to a protest in Tacoma. We’re protesting an anti-homeless group that’s trying to get a camping ban passed in Tacoma. Do we _want_ people to sleep in tents? No, we want everyone to have homes. But since our homeless community doesn’t have homes, they should be allowed to sleep in tents without constant harassment and abuse. A year ago, two men went to an encampment and started shooting, killing a man trying to protect his tentmates and sending others to the hospital. There’s no excuse for people to be in this kind of danger. FEMA is giving localities free money to house people in hotels, yet people are freezing to death on the streets. Why? Because homeless people simply aren’t a priority for local politicians. There’s no rich lobby pushing them to get everyone in hotel rooms. Instead, there’s a rich lobby pushing them to enact a camping ban. I’m running for Congress because in the richest country on Earth, no one should be homeless. Period. I will never waver in that vision. Tonight I’ll be at this protest. It would be a wonderful surprise to get back tonight and find out we raised $1,000 toward our January fundraising minimum. [**Can you chip in now to get me to $1,000 tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41098387/327352123/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTYyMmFlYS0xNzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGSr2YBJ1jGGVJKAV1Q3G0LIvLhQAdWHSdo_N37MU0g=) It would be a wonderful surprise to get back tonight and find out we raised $1,000 toward our January fundraising minimum. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = If you can, please chip in here so when I get home tonight, I can see that we’re $1,000 closer to our fundraising minimum for January: = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Idaho Must Do More to Reduce Taxes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
The Governor has called for at least a 17.1% increase in expenditures once accounting for increases in both spending and transfers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/01-26-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1cd146ba3b&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| How many of you have visited a business recently that had signs displayed, usually hand written, warning of reduced hours, longer wait times, or limited inventory? Across the country and right here in Idaho, labor shortages and an escalating supply chain crisis are colliding with rapidly rising inflation and a mounting market downturn to create the ideal conditions for a true economic crisis. This is not the time for Idaho to be massively increasing spending, yet the Governor has called for at least a **17.1% increase in expenditures** once accounting for increases in both spending and transfers. Meanwhile, tax relief is limited to a small half-percent reduction in the top income tax bracket and a one-time rebate, which will amount to just $75 for many Idahoans. Is this really the best we can do with a record surplus that's quickly approaching _**$2 billion**_? There are other ways Idaho could take action to put money back in Idahoans' bank accounts such as eliminating the grocery tax — a proposal Gov. Little claimed to support when he was running for office. Right now, there is [legislation introduced by Rep. Ron Nate](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=85fc1fc072&e=823fa8e224) to eliminate Idaho's sales tax on groceries, but House leadership has sent it to their special Ways & Means committee to die. Idahoans overwhelmingly support eliminating this regressive tax, yet the good ol' boys refuse to even give the bill a public hearing so Idahoans can have their voices heard. Likewise, Idaho must take steps to reduce property taxes and ensure that Idahoans living on fixed incomes are not forced out of their homes by increased local government spending. From large families with big grocery budgets to retired seniors facing the prospect of losing their homes due to skyrocketing property taxes, Idahoans are suffering as their state government sits on a mountain of surplus revenue. Instead of increasing spending, the government should be increasing efficiency, reducing spending, and giving every dollar of that surplus back to the taxpayers! I believe in keeping government small and giving as much money as possible back to the people, so they can use it as they see fit. Our taxes are too high, our regulations too numerous, and our spending too bloated. Our state's budget does not reflect the conservative values and frugal habits of Idahoans, and that is one of the reasons why our state desperately need a change in leadership.
---
|
## Our New Campaign Video
Did you get a chance to watch our new campaign ad? If you haven't seen it on TV, you can also watch it online. [**Click here**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ff00ce8514&e=823fa8e224) or click on the video below.
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3304202876&e=823fa8e224)
---
# **President Trump:_"Janice McGeachin will never let you down!"_**
| We've received a lot of positive feedback on the ad so far, and we're excited for more Idahoans to learn about our campaign to Make Idaho Free Again. We would like to show this ad to even more people, but we need your help. Would you donate [**$36**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6f15b86ecf&e=823fa8e224) to pay for one more airing of our commercial? Of course, that means that [**$72**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f0ca4f866f&e=823fa8e224) would pay for two commercials and [**$108**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2298996bdd&e=823fa8e224) would pay for three commercials. The more you donate, the more Idahoans will see our video and realize that our state has a real opportunity to secure our freedom in the upcoming primary election. You can make a difference in the future of Idaho by [**making a contribution**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f70f537729&e=823fa8e224) right now!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f473c84496&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=57b767dd45&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c88d7c9130&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5380d6a7a0&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a9c59f01ca&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=51ea177600&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

Hello to the Pacific Northwest,

I’ll be traveling to the beautiful fertile plains of South-Central Washington to support my friend Corey Gibson in his bid for Congress. [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78380&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXZlbnRicml0ZS5jb20vZS9wdXR0aW5nLWFtZXJpY2EtZmlyc3QtaW50cm9kdWNpbmctY29yZXktZ2lic29uLWZvci11cy1jb25ncmVzcy10aWNrZXRzLTI0NDExNDYxMjM3Nz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09SnVzdGlmaWVk)
[Event Details](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)
Corey is running against never Trumper Congressman Dan Newhouse who was one of and handful of Republicans that voted to impeach President Trump.

**So, I’m taking the fight to Dan’s doorstep**. From Jan 28th to 29th I’ll be at **[5 separate events](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)** in Benton and Yakima counties supporting rising GOP star and entrepreneur Corey Gibson.
[Event Details](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)
If you’re like me and believe that Washington’s 4th district deserves better representation than a has-been establishment RINO, come to one of **[five events](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)** supporting this up and coming MAGA Candidate.

I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Dr. Kelli Ward

P.S. **[Join me in Washington and together, let's Make Congress Great Again. ](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145887&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)**

| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is RETIRING later this year.**

[**Pledge to FIGHT LIKE HELL to confirm a pro-choice, pro-voting rights, pro-environment Supreme Court justice.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkaVzZC8ntOP5Uu5L80vCNm6GAECOABrIE9kdRYW1I8EP1mvQE8_zHs0fd0K1C5fHfUuU_hnXOvBh_91Ew42P_YUQS6P03qn4oxbP08RrEn3p_A1UpM59b-bZ6MbjQbvvki_1q5HgL28dBeRuilrcCtm4SqPPWQoDVJ9ffbW4fGVV5RMorKefQ8JQ0R2VA5Q26P4FWH4P7CC3nURIV1L-aYeq6oEQ_Fo_kpRanauJ59qHkoMObPX-N86v947Zb-HbxAVQ2ORKSAZGiT8DO8ozEIG7JOC-MjgNM9G9KzhyzvIFcnmMjJuCmZL6j02Lbq3K2NJHJyhmUxpGj2v-CJyVa5XBxTyg8qKADth1Qat7ytgNkY6R3MNkQAFPV43bL3sDU/3j1/8GMWFBFqQ5KqSD_rMFzT8g/h0/OYPdMxuudte4LykKvr42EkfPPw-EkAxFfhEjdmPFcbc)

After decades championing our reproductive, voting, and civil rights, Supreme Court justice Stephen Breyer has announced he is retiring later this year.
Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers have used bad faith political maneuvering to install a repressive, anti-abortion majority on the Supreme Court. They will spend MILLIONS smearing President Biden’s SCOTUS nominee. Wade_ decision anniversary to be the last. **
** **The battle to restore the Supreme Court’s institutional credibility will be long and challenging.**
****Congress must also do its job. We must pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to protect, expand and codify the protections of Roe. We also have to establish a Supreme Court that is not hostile to our fundamental abortion rights if we want permanent progress on this front.
As the next Member of Congress, I will champion necessary reforms including term limits and expansion to create a balanced and credible Court. **
** **Right now, we must stop the antiabortion bloc on the Court from expanding. We must ensure EVERY Democratic Senator is united and confirms a champion of our rights.**

Peter,
Joe Biden campaigned and was elected on a platform of being a common-sense, middle-of-the-road Democrat who could unify what he saw as a fractured nation. In his first year in office, he has been nothing as advertised.

Biden has leaned into the woke, progressive politics that are eroding America. | Team, the retirement of Justice Breyer is a sudden reminder of _one of the many reasons why it’s important that Democrats control the U.S. Senate._

Over the course of four years, Mitch McConnell broke the Senate to achieve one goal: **making sure the Supreme Court took a far-right turn.** Breyer’s retirement is a reminder that if Mitch was in charge, he would abuse the system again to ensure a far-right Supreme Court.

That’s why protecting our razor-thin Senate majority is so important. **_Arizona is the biggest target_** when it comes to Senate control – we have to make sure we fight to protect OUR Senate seat!

clean_body: | | | We can’t let Mitch get control again | | | Team, the retirement of Justice Breyer is a sudden reminder of one of the many reasons why it’s important that Democrats control the U.S. Senate. Over the course of four years, Mitch McConnell broke the Senate to achieve one goal: making sure the Supreme Court took a far-right turn. Breyer’s retirement is a reminder that if Mitch was in charge, he would abuse the system again to ensure a far-right Supreme Court. That’s why protecting our razor-thin Senate majority is so important. Arizona is the biggest target when it comes to Senate control – we have to make sure we fight to protect OUR Senate seat! When McConnell had control, he was constantly creating fake rules and standards in order to push far-right judges onto the bench – halting confirmations for hundreds of federal judges plus the Supreme Court. Mitch pushed as many ideologically extremists onto the federal bench as he could. And if given control of the Senate, he’ll finish the job. If we don’t protect our Senate seat, Mitch will gain control and all progress will be stopped again. We can’t let this happen! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Team AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . # [“Increased Immigration Flows” Under Biden Cause Record-Breaking Court Backlog](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57727&L=26692&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5jcmVhc2VkLWltbWlncmF0aW9uLWZsb3dzLXVuZGVyLWJpZGVuLWNhdXNlLXJlY29yZC1icmVha2luZy1jb3VydC1iYWNrbG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
The Biden administration’s controversial open border policies are slamming the overwhelmed U.S. Immigration Court system, creating the largest backlog of cases in history. A new report issued by Syracuse University’s Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse (TRAC) reveals that the backlog is “growing faster than ever, burying judges in an avalanche of cases.” At the end of December pending cases reached a shocking 1,596,193, according to government figures obtained by TRAC under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). To put things in perspective, researchers point out that if every person with a pending immigration case gathered, it would surpass the population of Philadelphia, the nation’s sixth-largest city. Migrants with open cases will wait nearly five years for a court decision determining their status in the U.S.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57727&L=26692&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5jcmVhc2VkLWltbWlncmF0aW9uLWZsb3dzLXVuZGVyLWJpZGVuLWNhdXNlLXJlY29yZC1icmVha2luZy1jb3VydC1iYWNrbG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: re: You’ve been assigned to Anderson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We’re launching a 254 County Mobilization Plan.
#
We wanted to make sure you saw this.
The secret to winning in a state as big and diverse as Texas is to not write anyone off. No county is too small, too Republican, or too _anything_ for us to show up, organize, and compete for their votes. We need to go _everywhere_ and talk to _everyone_.
**In that spirit, we’re excited to share our 254 County Mobilization Plan.**
To reach every single voter, we need a budget for organizing and advertising in each corner of Texas. It’s critical we raise enough resources to launch a full-fledged campaign in each of Texas’ 254 counties. That’s where you come in!
**We’ve assigned you to sponsor Anderson County in Texas.** More than 28,856 voters are registered there, and we’ve set a goal of raising $14,428 to launch our 254 County Mobilization plan. **Can Beto count on your help to reach Anderson County voters?** **⇢**[**Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52049?refcode=ema20220126-173390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=4&akid=173390%2E444211%2EfOKZBU)**⇢**[**Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52049?refcode=ema20220126-173390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=5&akid=173390%2E444211%2EfOKZBU)**⇢**[**Make a $100 donation to reach 200 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52049?refcode=ema20220126-173390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=6&akid=173390%2E444211%2EfOKZBU)**⇢**[**Make a $250 donation to reach 500 voters in Anderson County.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52049?refcode=ema20220126-173390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=7&akid=173390%2E444211%2EfOKZBU) **[Sponsor Anderson County»](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52049?refcode=ema20220126-173390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=8&akid=173390%2E444211%2EfOKZBU)**
---
It’s true that most Texans live in big cities and counties. But you cannot expect to win in a state like Texas if you write off the rural counties, which are so vital to the future of this state.
Because these places have voted reliably Republican over the last two decades, you’ve seen many state and national Democrats write them off. And because those Democrats stopped showing up, Republicans didn’t have to either. There was no competition for votes.
**Our 254 County Mobilization plan gives us a BIG edge.** You would be surprised at how many people will vote with us if given a chance to hear from our campaign. In counties where most people vote Republican, competing for votes will help us close the margins. name: =?utf-8?Q?Charlie=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Charlie Urges The RNC To Pick Pittsburgh for the 2024 GOP Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=2324d6ff0e&e=df21354de5)
---
| Read Charlie’s letter to RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel urging her to select Pittsburgh as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention:

Dear Chairwoman McDaniel,

I’ve enjoyed our time together at RNC meetings and on the stage at CPAC. I’m writing to urge you to select Pittsburgh as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention.

Pittsburgh has everything the Republican Party needs for a successful convention and more — plentiful energy, a skilled and dedicated workforce, a growing tech sector and easy accessibility to other parts of the country and the world.

The region’s abundant and affordable energy is driving manufacturing, innovation and technology advances. For example, the Royal Dutch Shell natural gas cracker plant being built in the region represents a multibillion-dollar investment and thousands of construction jobs in our area with similar plants to follow. The estimated $200 million economic impact the convention will bring to the region will be an additional boost to the local economy.

Selecting Pittsburgh will also be historic. The first Republican Party national convention was held in Pittsburgh on February 22, 1856. Later that June the first nominating convention was held in Philadelphia. Pittsburgh has not hosted a convention for either party since then. It’s time to change that.

Holding the convention in Pittsburgh will also give the Republican Party an opportunity to showcase the expanding strength of the Party in southwestern Pennsylvania. Allegheny County has the highest number of registered Republicans of all 67 Pennsylvania counties in the state and in recent years the surrounding counties have all gone from deep Blue to Red in both voting and registration.

Read Charlie's full comments **[HERE](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=f429d7413c&e=df21354de5)**.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. This isn’t the email we wanted to send. | | Let’s be clear: the GOP’s refusal to pass voting rights is despicable, blatantly partisan, and a betrayal of our democracy. But Massacre Mitch and his Republican cronies are ELATED: So it’s more important than ever before that we protect pro-voting Democrats like Dr. Ruiz. Without them, we’ll have NO DEFENSE against Republican voter suppression... | | | | | | In the face of defeat, it’s our duty to preserve our democracy. Thank you for sticking with us. – Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

We’re fired up more than ever to defeat Henry Cuellar this March. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRUS9w4tAmu9Z7Zom-2dHdwLa6XA7XTp9MuHG9nQwEH33fRGuqF2Ll-x3JMx0qhN6S_GtzrYd7Nlz3Sdt-3GI2CKceMR1Jan9PxfPTrwNz56hAFpXkbBnL_y5NGOlHXoM7nEmUTuE_vL2t02qbXECGRFjRFaGOVq9IfTkeRUvoC4lUzKVoeZFsiSHp_tJ810lCYwNSjBOeNBKNzL2uasVpHSPhWr7FZQYRKxtsokEmAamGUcZAv7-4lwAFbz7QYjvbFhFAqjrqpcj-GgTTqt84BEIhuwCkPUmnGv2YLMF5hCv/3j1/7aBRWea2SDWR8cMS7Rgoog/h0/4QVXFIr4Mzf4s2yD6OhrhpRchrUdk7iiks2PeXMX9Hw) Peter,

We’re all in. And we’re ready to finish what we started.

As we approach early voting and the primary, we need all hands on deck. This is our one and only chance to cross over that finish line and win. And we need to win because only Jessica is fighting to bring progressive values to Congress and represent the best interests of Texan families.

[**_But for her to win, we need all hands on deck right now. clean_body: We’re fired up more than ever to defeat Henry Cuellar this March. | | | Peter, We’re all in. And we’re ready to finish what we started. Despite all that has unfolded this last week, our campaign is not losing sight of what is important: working to deliver change to South Texas families. As we approach early voting and the primary, we need all hands on deck. This is our one and only chance to cross over that finish line and win. And we need to win because only Jessica is fighting to bring progressive values to Congress and represent the best interests of Texan families. Henry Cullar has sold out our district and continues to uphold the status quo. And we’re tired of it. We are tired of being sold out to Republican corporate interests. We are tired of a representative who only delivers for his donors in Congress. Jessica is the change we need in South Texas. She brings a bold, new vision for what our district can and should be. She is a fighter, who will fight hard for all of our dreams and for all of us to thrive. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We’re not backing down. It’s on. Thank you for your support, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

**Holding our Senate majority just became more critical than ever, so we’ve activated an EMERGENCY TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH!**
[**Rush $5 _(becomes $15)_ to keep our Senate majority, and the fate of the Supreme Court, out of Mitch McConnell’s hands >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6094?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220126-SCOTUSAlert-BreyerRetires-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220126-SCOTUSAlert-BreyerRetires-Pros-sl1&akid=2756%2E9716520%2EDOX3_A)

This is huge, team.

Justice Breyer’s reported retirement means that **an open Supreme Court seat is imminent.**

The next Supreme Court justice will make decisions that will impact the country for **decades to come** \-- from reproductive rights to voting rights, and so much more.

So much of our progress is on the line, and **Mitch McConnell has already threatened to do ANYTHING he can to stop President Biden’s SCOTUS nominee’s** confirmation in the Senate.

**We can’t let Mitch McConnell steal ANOTHER Supreme Court seat** , which is why we activated an emergency **TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH** to stop the GOP from taking back the Senate and controlling the Supreme Court!

**[Rush $5 (becomes $15) or more to help us protect our Democratic majority so we can stop the conservative takeover of the Supreme Court.](https://go.dscc.org/go/6094?amount=5&t=9&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220126-SCOTUSAlert-BreyerRetires-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220126-SCOTUSAlert-BreyerRetires-Pros-sl1&akid=2756%2E9716520%2EDOX3_A)**
