name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: A racist relic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Manchin and Sinema joined Republicans in standing behind the racist filibuster to block two voting rights bills.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220126-2748-header&t=1&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)
Last week, we witnessed another act of obstruction to the President’s agenda on the part of Senators Manchin, Sinema, and their Republican colleagues.
**Both Manchin and Sinema joined Republicans to stand behind the racist filibuster,** blocking two voting rights bills that would not only protect Americans’ right to vote, but expand access to vote-by-mail and advance automatic voter registration.
**Let’s make it clear: You cannot call yourself a Democrat when you stand behind a racist relic from the past like the filibuster.**
In fact, Republican leader Mitch McConnell congratulated Manchin and Sinema for their "courage" in upholding the filibuster.1
Republicans have historically used the filibuster to block advancements in civil rights and liberties for Black and brown Americans, and they continue this racist history by blocking voting rights protections today.
[If we are to advance voting rights and dismantle the racist filibuster in 2022, we need a surge of grassroots support right now to help AOC keep up the pressure in Congress — can we count on your urgent $3 contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220126?refcode=em20220126-2748-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2748_2526796_Ntq-dF&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220126?refcode=em20220126-2748-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2748_2526796_Ntq-dF&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)**
Your contribution will support our movement as we fight to keep up pressure to pass the _Freedom to Vote Act_ and the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , and as we work to elect more progressive candidates who will be a voice for all of us in Congress.
Progress is possible, and your support today will make a huge difference as we double down on our efforts to protect voting rights.
Thank you,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [CNN](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10375?t=22&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220126?refcode=em20220126-2748-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=23&refcode2=2748_2526796_Ntq-dF&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220126-2748-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=24&akid=2748%2E2526796%2ENtq-dF)**
---|---

---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We are running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio
body:
HELP SAVE AMERICA

| [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=6499c394e67042dcbd297917705d12e9&_e=JofO6nMDBCRpSqXFI13gdZOyUtcAk-Md_Mj_zApXQuv7P_M0bIQPl88-4DVTOOHGEVwEbjrpusZwVTUmIyJ3himADm2IcQ7KxaH2FBePOQVc3zJQQxcAHXPdNrjXrVEvrj1N5p5KWMi3yzeRLpzvvzYUEPPldQ3IG2SGc35yQVCK1cRy_1ZccnD3pJNJVGONRD7CUnzhDF0FFEHoR0yNjYw92TG9le3JvmBceh8zk4Pll5EssbOJzOCs1HSQF4pZQtXtN_JRKrwZL2cBvTHdWQGGscBfTwt5SOsr-fGymhcJlYGyVTfJcV52ZS2sypmLRJT3SA46GwsuadypZFeG1GCtmDusnN1KHlgTDMIEd96AZL_v50HJuBOAaBKkiq-d7WRSaF3K-TusQP8xUHjhAYPsWXdaQN7bggzjy9KFYVMg6rLF8Or1gpvnm_zK6TxRtRIP4Ywt7xgopdglB1zrhh33-sSRf0f8lp2fDDPG2f0mnpt6-ZE42JUqBFK3EDQW4rKXcKwV69b8EIj7i13xnyxv4HYNCx_GrklmkZA2RuqwP15a03PXv6Bi9B3oIBJv)
---

Friend,

**_The 2022 mid-term election will determine the fate of our country._**

We need leaders who will continue President Trump’s vision. **We need more conservative fighters like Jane Timken.**

_Jane called me earlier today, worried because her End-of-Month fundraising deadline is coming up, but she is short of her goal._ I assured her that Americans are determined to protect their country and do what it takes to support Republicans, like her, fighting for their freedom.

Step up to the plate. Prove me right, and don’t let Jane or America down for this **CRITICAL DEADLINE.**

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61f1c46daa66c111cf087c48&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61f02121f009f46e3790d52a%26ss_email_id%3D61f1c46daa66c111cf087c48%26ss_campaign_name%3DWeekly%2BUpdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-26T22%253A00%253A58Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=TusJXWOfZU31hLcf8DBGv412-ts%3D)
---
|
#### **Whitmer Adopts Barrett Pension Tax Cut**
This week, we got news that Governor Whitmer plans to adopt my pension tax cut legislation - this is a huge win for Michigan seniors!The pension tax cut is something that I care deeply about. In fact, it is the first bill I introduce every term as a legislator. The state made a promise to seniors that we would keep the government out of their hard-earned benefits. For years, we have broken that promise. I was committed to honoring our commitment to pension earners and I am proud that we were finally able to provide much needed relief to Michiganders.Read more about the tax cut here.
---
|
---
|
---
#### **Barrett Participates in Michigan March for Life**
Last week, hundreds of pro-life advocates from across the state gathered at the State Capitol to participate in the annual Michigan March for Life. As a father of four, the fight for life is personal, and I was honored to be involved in the rally.I have been a firm defender of life as a state legislator, and I look forward to continuing the fight in Washington as your next Congressman. The photo on the left below is me and other pro-life colleagues after I led the Pledge of Allegiance and on the right is me and Ashley at the Washington DC March for Life in 2005.
---
| | |
---|---|---
|
---
#### **Help Get Tom on the Ballot!**
Michigan requires congressional candidates to get 1,000 petition signatures from registered voters in the new 7th District in order to get on the ballot.**We need your help!** There’s two ways you can help...
1. Print this [downloadable petition](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61f1c46daa66c111cf087c48&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dropbox.com%2Fs%2Fm3r384znyfpih7i%2FNominating%2520Petition.pdf%3Fdl%3D0&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=_8Bw9VishvxsuAX-D9KOGiCxOJ4%3D) on **LEGAL PAPER** and circulate to friends and family who live in Eaton, Ingham, Clinton, Shiawassee, and Livingston Counties, or...
2. Send an email to [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) and coordinate getting some petitions from the campaign to circulate.

---
|
---
|
---
[_ _ DONATE _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61f1c46daa66c111cf087c48&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=bXL1CCrAVihyxbU9Cgr6bLuAroY%3D)
---

name: are you in to re-elect Katie Porter?
subject: Just real quick...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#teamkatie

Minnesotans are made of tough stuff. When temperatures drop, we are ready with salt, sand, and a shovel by the door. Thanks to failed Democrat policies, we're seeing an incredible rise in inflation. As a result, this winter brings with it something that many Minnesotans can't prepare for: rising energy costs. Friends,

We don’t need any more Career Politicians.

Absolutely not.

Career Politicians are out of touch. They don’t stand up for our everyday Alabama values because they don’t even know what they are. They’re too busy making deals with special interest groups and lobbyists in Washington.
**That’s why I’m proud to sign the TERM LIMITS pledge.** [ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=35f94d99375c41d091e94455833cabd4&_e=bgvcUIc93pg6vHh8CAi65ANwdZ8BTwZXHYvw3NbkYLCA0BEAsx0rFVPDGHYZ92PJPiu7gnRBrYJQVQFCeP-Rgbo0lvB7l34tLbGrj35MxwOVIcBCDt_GVHeWnOdykbNLr6Gt1WUmdLFst-iSmeiHjYGiXkio9mlNeTUG40_7zhV3O0PeAU1nmCg7Fw0gbrE8CdnXx7E3u9BzAQXuAPJRCfKfePnmie5TbsvUz0ldmkm_bFfAUvSnA0EXWnJBeQAHGDrsqlEfs1_Xdz_tnHrB0ORyrqSvqxPKSzPYcR0qSAcbuocLjaR9hQBX4JQMc0wcWPV0y6zgeXtfskHkuFV4VsuF4A76EjgJgg5rqpI6lhZV08Lqa0yMjQrFvYLd7usrOMx_SDq2yJf3_d_lkA5IFrqPmoMi5XjmGfR5_upiP72J7BbDiBP0YJA-uY7Vx9nbm3LtXxNMSaGqJE7NqMJovIKa7ZJOsepy9nE02Xh3OFcjEWodR1hWY5070bN_7loB1lALHYsQkAUbiaC0hOABYQOIekL59CLEMeirCcQlmeo1ysrqjd16vQnzRlECwNRwzsmW85G5YeWShIM8sH9fOg%3D%3D)

I’ve lived a life of service. I served my country for 22 years in the Army, where I was captured and held as a Prisoner of War during October 1991. I serve my country now as a business owner who creates jobs and supports the U.S. military. I am running for Senate to represent real Americans – the ones who I go to church with, work with, and live with.

**We can’t keep electing Career Politicians. We need to establish term limits.**
**Support my campaign today

clean_body: We don't need more career politicians | Friends, We don’t need any more Career Politicians. Absolutely not. Career Politicians are out of touch. They don’t stand up for our everyday Alabama values because they don’t even know what they are. They’re too busy making deals with special interest groups and lobbyists in Washington. That’s why I’m proud to sign the TERM LIMITS pledge. I’ve lived a life of service. I served my country for 22 years in the Army, where I was captured and held as a Prisoner of War during October 1991. I serve my country now as a business owner who creates jobs and supports the U.S. military. I am running for Senate to represent real Americans – the ones who I go to church with, work with, and live with. We can’t keep electing Career Politicians. We need to establish term limits. Support my campaign today 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 | | "Durant for Senate" | "Durant for Senate" | "Durant for Senate" | "Durant for Senate" | "Durant for Senate" | "Durant for Senate" Thank you, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. name: Tyler Kistner
subject: What America will we leave for our children?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41261abdccb494e815f18d3f53f7d44&_e=yIAM7GAf0XM-lvTL9-Svo4vuzGFt0NdDSHRH05YL8_qTVaO6XRf3SYLTWFrWBH_0iDzR5OHrWluRs-6QQZnjHDFJH2ga3MpXUvK35bGCS4Yj6EAMG6R7Hno2EeWQRNsU9AZEJ8Nu5A7j1W1ag6CooA2jdJ8USWXTDCGw47AtV7o03FKggV2D93Qk80lGGE3Kd-Pw1npqQp_TixTu40yC8vDNA3WsJ_4SU3BON7YdaTEWpCrzvYF6VRmrn_oPe9euMrH9ie4PsMmVHl4sLCU-WBmJhTP7hCbAuUXPnJT9E5ESQzbr38y9HYOSDuweMPDYmMy9pMcizo4khrfELNxShnHiAcV9_KyDDkejE87NpYEoCcTlEPM4uOc_UqDb3xCp)

---
Peter,

Is there anything you wouldn’t do for your children? _Grandchildren?_

My names Tyler Kistner. I’m a father of two and I would do absolutely anything for my kids.

_I’d fight for them._

_I’d sacrifice for them._

I will do anything to protect their future.

But their future depends on the choices we make today as parents.

What America will we leave for our children?

Peter - our kids today are being taught to hate themselves, to hate this country. They’re watching criminals burn our country to the ground. _They’re being taught that rules don’t matter, and you can do as you please._

With the direction our country is headed in right now - our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream.

My kids deserve a shot at the American dream - _so do yours._ My children are the answer to every question about why I’m running for Congress.

You see, I watched radicals burn Minnesota to the ground in 2020. Democrats’ answer to that? _Defund the police._ As a parent, and a native-Minnesotan, feeling unsafe in our own homes terrifies me.

The America that I took an oath to serve is built upon freedom - not tyranny. Peter, I’m running for Congress today to defend our freedom and leave a country I’m proud of to the next generation. **_Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction._**

When I ran in 2020, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. Like that race, all eyes are on this seat again because Republican’s only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take our country back from the intolerant Left. [**Will you be on the right side of this fight?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41261abdccb494e815f18d3f53f7d44&_e=yIAM7GAf0XM-lvTL9-Svo4vuzGFt0NdDSHRH05YL8_qTVaO6XRf3SYLTWFrWBH_0iDzR5OHrWluRs-6QQZnjHDFJH2ga3MpXUvK35bGCS4Yj6EAMG6R7Hno2EeWQRNsU9AZEJ8Nu5A7j1W1ag6CooA2jdJ8USWXTDCGw47AtV7rtA9CNLjscF8V27xt5wuftWe2EIB_LhSxoV9g9NZS-xomK7R-naK86sN8KgF94RkcHKzogw8KwcwPpHhWuzBhR1c-dlDSUlspCYstjzouf6fsUjmkJOFIMy2SUUkxAXGl-ccuuPSFAwZHJQWhfJIfER1GE6_OianveM5vChOsq3RkdvTZ2mUsP9dsgtR9tL7WEwC0_nWMYA5PTPPnBmCyV)

[** ****Save America:
Think of Our Kids **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41261abdccb494e815f18d3f53f7d44&_e=yIAM7GAf0XM-lvTL9-Svo4vuzGFt0NdDSHRH05YL8_qTVaO6XRf3SYLTWFrWBH_0iDzR5OHrWluRs-6QQZnjHDFJH2ga3MpXUvK35bGCS4Yj6EAMG6R7Hno2EeWQRNsU9AZEJ8Nu5A7j1W1ag6CooA2jdJ8USWXTDCGw47AtV7rUL1X8xOt8sm1Da-j7ZvPrunc4TwCvi8slB2Q74Ph16FgaOKKk3rr3ILQZwtaPK3MfT92MB_bL1DL6fMM99xF3p8y2UYeCAtiedtUae_WwsjmZ9q4w7ARzA2Q4Ca4zeDduEaCgxbxvRTrg6q4fYUCj9dD7Y5jbBCfm-mFfY4l4RY2iQG7Mhlch94p_HfdCy277ogafttfJIK1qV8eM4Nok)
This isn’t about Left vs. Right, it’s about right vs. wrong - we are fighting for the heart and soul of our country. [**It’s time to save our country for the next generation.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41261abdccb494e815f18d3f53f7d44&_e=yIAM7GAf0XM-lvTL9-Svo4vuzGFt0NdDSHRH05YL8_qTVaO6XRf3SYLTWFrWBH_0iDzR5OHrWluRs-6QQZnjHDFJH2ga3MpXUvK35bGCS4Yj6EAMG6R7Hno2EeWQRNsU9AZEJ8Nu5A7j1W1ag6CooA2jdJ8USWXTDCGw47AtV7peIwZGHb__2-vnOsxS-CnyUDiPg59XIFlCrWcyFGbHhy9gOPZAMqcHTd2iyxe6m0dSgpd3pac3WC5QtjvqlkvpADIBbAEB6ZMXAXfQ9ECKd1PgZmDWZf3lZsZGjL9mr3dLNaVGW9hdG-00HeBECYHJ6N4oZ-fh_gxzPMFr_5w5jLeSNcx1-3C7I6jGOX-THc8uLZLCaaLhyy3b5tFSGfAF)

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. [**Will you join me?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41261abdccb494e815f18d3f53f7d44&_e=yIAM7GAf0XM-lvTL9-Svo4vuzGFt0NdDSHRH05YL8_qTVaO6XRf3SYLTWFrWBH_0iDzR5OHrWluRs-6QQZnjHDFJH2ga3MpXUvK35bGCS4Yj6EAMG6R7Hno2EeWQRNsU9AZEJ8Nu5A7j1W1ag6CooA2jdJ8USWXTDCGw47AtV7p8yQJBqXMqrKdAG8QpBTKQ0EN4UTMVnNx9XBHqUnSGswn_1NTRbAghTh5GXpdWpqhETWjuaWFUznxdlkA5OQo-RiOI1N87GpgdPtFJq3ggRgwRoLCbqmFDZbkg8K0C6H5ja1tw_eFGH4z4cZ77Wcx-HmWyF9igpEplzn8hhaU_TYpOBryogIgHfbraNQ-XozV-nRys1SIuG7wKGJc382T-)

Let’s take our country back.

| **_Tyler Kistner_**
* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

clean_body: Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | Peter, Is there anything you wouldn’t do for your children? Grandchildren? My names Tyler Kistner. I’m a father of two and I would do absolutely anything for my kids. I’d fight for them. I’d sacrifice for them. I will do anything to protect their future. But their future depends on the choices we make today as parents. What America will we leave for our children? Peter - our kids today are being taught to hate themselves, to hate this country. They’re watching criminals burn our country to the ground. They’re being taught that rules don’t matter, and you can do as you please. With the direction our country is headed in right now - our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. My kids deserve a shot at the American dream - so do yours. My children are the answer to every question about why I’m running for Congress. You see, I watched radicals burn Minnesota to the ground in 2020. Democrats’ answer to that? Defund the police. As a parent, and a native-Minnesotan, feeling unsafe in our own homes terrifies me. The America that I took an oath to serve is built upon freedom - not tyranny. Peter, I’m running for Congress today to defend our freedom and leave a country I’m proud of to the next generation. Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. When I ran in 2020, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. Like that race, all eyes are on this seat again because Republican’s only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take our country back from the intolerant Left. This isn’t about Left vs. Right, it’s about right vs. wrong - we are fighting for the heart and soul of our country. I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. - Let’s take our country back. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: They called me a self-hating Hispanic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but fell 6,588 votes short. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a841934ca114ce28bf5901089f342dd&_e=WVFXs16RlQWEhwYx2H2haVmccgTGt2x345Y3Cm9Gsy7_bk1bV21K4HDXV5NCL_ztKmIKHnHHCced9Qw8-QRCxcfFFmGf6noYJzAQwX7kZEa955pURfrwGyJImHwd0glkoXnt8usnLSvfpnJ708IEZR2wcgCs1InvIX7jHBcaEboxMYERszijWqfK8nq8zYUNA3vQJjZRDAPU53ibzx7PO4P8RnQmviy9VwakSMRBVRjYahjjMdpWN90eIMEZsTIdAOnvE9P_B0jzyj0tTHC6dmL-8I58r7si4foazlLgLP5oHzKenFEgAgxQof0ltBTC34nTT_OEtieysdNRu7AIMV1ygygtweoRLdUL0vjdEV30D_waLdK9QhSj2CeXkOGCeB1xdcyDEjC6UoSTYcr0Ol_0GnY8chKLeR-yV_Kv6YJicspgoK4zUE3-wbVLdVYVYc_Uk4kXiAX56gzudUvBDvcwF1oYS2iipS_CFJ8L5S3Pu-NAjHf9THp3wxsyccQz)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a841934ca114ce28bf5901089f342dd&_e=WVFXs16RlQWEhwYx2H2haVmccgTGt2x345Y3Cm9Gsy7_bk1bV21K4HDXV5NCL_ztKmIKHnHHCced9Qw8-QRCxcfFFmGf6noYJzAQwX7kZEa955pURfrwGyJImHwd0glkoXnt8usnLSvfpnJ708IEZR2wcgCs1InvIX7jHBcaEboxMYERszijWqfK8nq8zYUNA3vQJjZRDAPU53ibzx7PO4P8RnQmviy9VwakSMRBVRjYahjjMdpWN90eIMEZsTIdAOnvE9P_B0jzyj0tTHC6dmL-8I58r7si4foazlLgLP58nL2MDBAAWyIVWUjQvptw7G0m9R5WXlKd8Sm18a8jooyZ9JBo-DS0df7BjgdfjJh4nk60WF_nTJw_8W7Br8SWmqFhysDyYOk5ORah8blck8AzwKmr8ci95mrzbK62JOICV91V_JKYiOArLrYr1pRBdVSznmKcU9BlRws3VIgjbw15re9LEAUtC4f2RpgAMH_Z_UYX_WJfSOSqxMhYZ_hQ)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a841934ca114ce28bf5901089f342dd&_e=WVFXs16RlQWEhwYx2H2haVmccgTGt2x345Y3Cm9Gsy7_bk1bV21K4HDXV5NCL_ztKmIKHnHHCced9Qw8-QRCxcfFFmGf6noYJzAQwX7kZEa955pURfrwGyJImHwd0glkoXnt8usnLSvfpnJ708IEZR2wcgCs1InvIX7jHBcaEboxMYERszijWqfK8nq8zYUNA3vQJjZRDAPU53ibzx7PO4P8RnQmviy9VwakSMRBVRjYahjjMdpWN90eIMEZsTIdAOnvE9P_B0jzyj0tTHC6dmL-8I58r7si4foazlLgLP4PB5sGQwPwIg1LQBFwVMZs_ejkD81f9ankHFcaKdOUPhKIAG73VttRVGpg3YbK_kDMyughpDaopokHq8h6bVoDehsOBsA2U4i-cBfDv7T20c0fj6CfYTrFImcGCrofYp7Qi5mdMWuTl8cRhNvlDKbtY-o12jGa_4I22ucRoCF0dZwTSanRXx1AuDOfs8kZgl91_AyctwUDcn2DB8nx8vMF)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a841934ca114ce28bf5901089f342dd&_e=WVFXs16RlQWEhwYx2H2haVmccgTGt2x345Y3Cm9Gsy7_bk1bV21K4HDXV5NCL_ztKmIKHnHHCced9Qw8-QRCxcfFFmGf6noYJzAQwX7kZEa955pURfrwGyJImHwd0glkoXnt8usnLSvfpnJ708IEZR2wcgCs1InvIX7jHBcaEboxMYERszijWqfK8nq8zYUNA3vQJjZRDAPU53ibzx7PO4P8RnQmviy9VwakSMRBVRjYahjjMdpWN90eIMEZsTIdAOnvE9P_B0jzyj0tTHC6dmL-8I58r7si4foazlLgLP5faevu9VrgdYIokMsSs6nbf-1nDufemIcBoeWjH0SPaeJ33ftT3Z3NTrzRZOqKLeFwk7516OjE3W9M0lo1Nz62K8Bz49HDbGD1uQm4N3IS-tlulNys9OWsmwq0W56O2DD5sQXiwbldnLgMjpCZs3bJRR8dX9NHjO2N-OgvRTpu8RzsuQ6oKcXPJPAcx_hB2jzE1EJOVRY73PfTvAXs2Z8O)

Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

clean_body: I nearly made history, but fell 6,588 votes short. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516 Don't want to receive our emails?

The June primary may feel far away, but grassroots contributions are crucial to ensure we are prepared for whatever comes our way. Your support allows us to invest in key resources like campaign staff, on-the-ground organizing efforts, and voter outreach.

**Republicans only need to flip five seats in 2022 to take back control of the House, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat. And between a newly drawn district and a new Republican opponent, Sara needs all of us to step up and show that we have her back.**

If Democrats lose the House majority next year, we’ll lose all the progress Sara and her colleagues have made on the issues that matter most to American families and workers, like universal child care and health care, combating the climate crisis, and protecting reproductive rights.

[_**So please, friend, with just five days until the deadline, will you chip in $5 to keep Sara in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41095322/327316192/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220126-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBhNWNlNy1mZTdlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkOfApKp5b-dcXFUDqFqpMKp5VijBVO0kLIH7wnCCkc=)

| | | Friend, **_Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is set to retire_** , and it just might leave a big decision in the hands of liberal Washington politicians like Maggie Hassan, Chuck Schumer, and Elizabeth Warren... **If we thought that D.C. was holding back the 603 before, just wait until progressive Democrats shape the highest court in the land for decades to come!** You and I know that if they get their way, this pick will be nothing more than a far-left activist who is set on remaking our nation into something that none of us recognize, and none of us want. It’s yet another reason why we need to win big in New Hampshire this year and flip the U.S. Senate red! **_[Will you support that effort today?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODcyMDQ3NjYxMTA4OTU5MjQyJmM9dzRvMiZlPTAmYj04ODM2NzAwMDYmZD13NWM0bjhm.9IVPZK399lFeEEboInI00qm38hsPpP_fWk4nX2jphQI)_**

And our best chance of stopping D.C. from making this bad choice might just be winning in a razor-thin Senate. ** That’s why I hope you’ll get behind my launch to become New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator - I want to make sure Washington doesn’t hold us back even more!
